T-34 Heavy Tank Land Structure Map The T34 Heavy Tank was an American design for a heavy tank. It was evolved from the T29 Heavy Tank and T30 Heavy Tank in 1945, sporting a 120 mm (4.72 in) modified anti-aircraft gun. Extra armor plating was applied to the rear of the turret bustle as a counterweight for the heavier 120mm T53[3][4] main gun. The vehicle was deemed too heavy and no production orders were placed.[5] Land Structure

This build was made for The Corporate Hub Roleplay, a community of people roleplaying in a fictional universe entirely created by us, with its own lore and history. Far in the future, on an Earth ravaged by natural disasters, city-states, alien empires, and large corporations of equal power fight for power on a fully built Minecraft landmass. There are elements of futurism, as great airships roam the skies under the fleets of their respective factions, plasma bolts fly across battlefields, and automated tanks roll through cities. Cobblestone Maker Other Map This project was inspired by WTFMinecraft on Youtube:http://www.youtube.com/user/WTFMinecraftThis project allows you to get Cobblestone without having to dig through the ground! How this works, the Lava placed before the Water interacts with each other, creating Cobblestone between the two elements. When you are provided with Cobblestone, the player will mine it, and it will drop down the pit into a current. Less often, your Cobblestone will be destroyed in the Lava.Getting back to the way this project works, as you mine the Cobblestone and it drops into the water, it drops in a basement section; with a current of water pushing the Cobblestone near the entrance. A Chest is provided for extra space :P Hopefully you enjoy, and remember, this was inspired by a very important Minecraftian on Youtube called WTFMinecraft! Minecraft, Water, Lava, Cobblestone, Maker, Basement, Pit, Entrance

This resembles not only a safe house for yourself, but as a little shack for the peasant, villagers or citizens that live through your town!http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/wooden-house-original/Anyways, this entrance contains 4 dispensers, to shoot arrows and snowballs at animals, citizens or unwanted monsters. Inside the towers itself also have Stone Pressure Plates to open up your doors in a jiffy, in case of some dangerous situation happening. The description of this project doesn't have much entertainment and information, only because it's late at night and I don't know what to say. I guess I will laugh at myself because I do stupid things when I am tired, but don't want to go to bed. So, haha, laughing at yourself CAN feel good. RDF 5x5 Condensed Display v.3 [Even better inputs] Redstone Device Map This is my 5x5 horizontal, condensed display prototype created for the Redstone Development Foundation (I was formerly part of the UTD, but have since left due to irreconcilable differences)It's a dumb display. There are labeled switches that manually control which torch is lit. Though it can easily be hooked up to anything to display characters, numbers, a game, etc...It is scalable up to a usable maximum of 100xchunkmax. The new design can easily be modified to whatever size is desired. As can be seen with the "Minecraft" screenshot.The cross section screenshot shows the minimum size of a 5x5 display is (5x6x13). Each additional row only adds 2 to the overall height, and each column only adds an additional 1 to the width.Feel free to use it however you wish! Redstone Device

Minecraft Cannon Redstone Device Map This is an upload of a fairly basic cannon. I am posting it here because after browsing through the schematics available. I really didnt see any cannons, and they are soooooo much fun. Fires 21 TNT total, 18 as the primary charge, 3 as projectiles, and is completely automatic. *EDIT* I kept the TNT count low on purpose. A larger cannon can fire the projectile outside of the games draw distance, meaning the TNT never actually lands. The "timer" on the projectile charge is set to 24 ticks (about 2.4 seconds) which is not quite the maximum, but helps keep the footprint of the device a little smaller.* I have added a few signs on the cannons structure to help avoid misplacement of TNT while loading. So hopefully its at least mostly user friendly, and should be fun for those less experienced with using a cannon in minecraft. I will upload a couple of pics here to show it loaded (Yes, they were taken at night... Im very very lazy). Again, I hope its pretty user friendly. Im fairly sure the design is at least mostly original, though Ive watched so many videos while learning to build a decent cannon. If anyone elses design, in whole or in part, is uncredited here. I apologise it's purely unintentional. So... enjoy Redstone Device

Pulsar core tower Redstone Device Map A tower of dispenser guns which will (eventually) go from bedrock to sky limit. Each dispenser floor has a "pulsar core" which, when connected to the outer rings, fires all dispensers rapidly. 8 arrows per second per dispenser, so when all are firing it'll belt out 160 arrows per second (in different directions of course) per floor.Will update the schematic as i build it higher. Currently it has 4 dispenser levels, so it'll fire 640 arrows per second if all are activated. Each dispenser can fire for 2 whole minutes with 9 stacks of arrows. The schematic contains enough redstone floating around to activate all the floors, simply connect the pulsating core to the outer rings, climb a ladder, and repeat. I would greatly appreciate it if you used this link to download the file, just click "skip ad" in the upper right corner of the site to reach the mediafire download page: LINKAdditional NotesCauses a bit of lag when fully activated... not too bad though Complex, Redstone, Smp, Tower, Redstone Device, Machine, Gun, Arrow

2 wide, 2 high, tileable D-flipflop for redstone screens Redstone Device Map 9 of these devices stacked in a cube in this example. It can be expanded infinitely.This is very useful for redstone screens, as this doesn't take much space. From the changing of the clock, to the changing of the output takes 4-5 ticks. Sadly I had to use a number of repeaters, which was unavoidable.The hard thing about 2x2 tileable circuits is that there are a ton of connections that you just can't make. To change horizontally, you have to use a torch. You can't place an upright torch, nor can you power a wire on a different level as the torch itself. You must use a repeater to change vertically. You need to be very careful with single pieces of wire, etc. It just wasn't easy.It's pretty easy to build if you take the images as reference, so I hope this is useful to someone. :)This was made on the Redstone Development Foundation (RDF) server, the server designed for redstone developers. Redstone Device

15-bit sync up-counter Redstone Device Map This device can count from 0 up to 32767. In the video I've hooked it up to a 17-clock. If in perfect conditions, the server ticks would be 1/10th of a second, then my counter would keep on counting for over 15 hours before resetting.The sync part means that all bits change at the same time, an most common method is a ripple counter, which updates the Least Significant Bit (LSB) first, and the others after it. I found that is was actually pretty easy to do this in mc, and I'll look into making an up/down-counter too.It's constructed using a 2-wide tileable T-flipflop (TFF) I made. 2 wide tileable circuits are better than 1-wide circuits, since 1-wide ones waste space. From the clock change to the changing of the bits takes 3 to 4 ticks, depending on which way the bits change.The clock pulse should be 4 ticks. As you see in the video, I used a Rising Edge Trigger (RET), though some like to call it monostable circuit. It should be noted that there needs to be an equal amount of ticks between each pulse as you have bits. This cannot be avoided. So in a 15 bit counter, you need to wait 15 ticks. This is designed so you can remove any excessive bits. If you have 10 or less, that means that if you count using a button, you can't mess it up. If you need more than 15 bits, you can epand the clock line and expand the counter itself.I think I can pretty much say this is the fastest way of counting in minecraft, I don't think this can be improved much, nor do I think it can be compacted a lot. If someone has found a way of speeding this up, please let me know. :)This was actually pretty easy, I will try making an up/down-counter up next.This was made on the Redstone Development Foundation (RDF) server, the server designed for redstone developers. Redstone Device

Three blocks high piston elevator Redstone Device Map I did not improved this one much after I made it for the first time, but it does work. The problem is that I had to cope with was that extended pistons can't be puled back by sticky pistons and sticky pistons pull back only one block. This is also the reason that I used sand, to make it less complicated. To lower the elevator (a 2 by 2 blocks platform) it needs a lot more complicated signal which is difficult to create with logical gates so I used a very useful technique for a memory cell which can be seen at the end of this YouTube video. For the elevator to go up press the left button and for going down press the right button. If you would press the wrong button at the wrong time it will cause the memory cell to get out of sink with the elevator itself. So it is far from perfect, but the main idea works. Maybe in the future I might improve it (one button input and toggle up and down) and make it even higher.But I mainly want to show you how useful, handy, clever and so forth this memory technique is. Because this why you are able to do much more complicated actions. Redstone, Redstone Device, Elevator, Pistons, Device

UTD Utilities IAD2 (Industrial Adding Design) Redstone Device Map For More Information About The Union for Technological Development:UTD Main ThreadCreated by larslolxz for the UTD.Using the method from the UTD "Snap", 0-delay repeaters, this adder uses that and thus takes for any length about 3-4 ticks to compute its result. however, i advise to turn all signals off for about 2 ticks when putting in a new signal(not necessary, just makes it faster) as other wise when you, say, put 1111 and 0001 together it'll take 3 ticks, but if you take make it into 1111+0000 immediately it has to propagate the loss of Couts.I truly believe this can only be made marginally faster (2 ticks or so), so this is actually the fastest adder around, and it's not really worth it to optimize the speed (however, the size may be optimized, as it is BIG.) It contains a couple weird wiring quirks which are there to prevent piston bugs. Enjoy. Redstone Device, Union, Beast, Tech, Computer, Technology, Development, Titan

UTD Utilities IAD1 (Industrial Adding Design) Redstone Device Map For More Information About The Union for Technological Development:UTD Main ThreadCreated by larslolxz for the UTD.This full adder is designed for optimum speed. a 64-bit adding calculation will take 102 ticks with it. how does it work? it calculates the values for Cin = 1 and Cin = 0, and outputs either of these based on the real Cin, using pistons.because it uses pistons, it takes only 1.5 ticks. but, it has a base value of 6 ticks, which it uses to calculate the values.thus, added to the (N*1.5) is 6. thus the actual adding speed is (Nbits*1.5)+6.it uses some tricks such as going into the previous adder's space, and is not very compacted down. this is mostly a proof of concept. the pistons are horizontal because vertical pistons rely on an orientation glitch to work properly. if the orientation is wrong, they go wrong.anyone using it won't have much trouble figuring it all out, as i don't expect people without knowledge of redstone to use it.TL;DR: this is the fastest adder ever made. Toll Door Redstone Device Map Ever wanted to charge others for entry to an area? Here's how...This simple system opens the iron door when a single item of your choosing is dropped into the hopper. The key that makes this possible is the 2-hopper system. The bottom hopper is held static by a redstone signal. With 22 items (of the same type) spread in each of the hopper's slots, the redstone comparator attached to it will be balanced on the cusp of sending out a 2-block long signal. When a player tosses the correct item into the top hopper, it falls into the second hopper, stacking with the item you've already spread inside, and the balance of power shifts for just a tick. The comparator sends a 2-block long signal, activating the circuit. The single tick is enough to deactivate the redstone signal keeping the bottom hopper locked, dropping the player's fee into the chest for storage. Meanwhile, a second signal opens the iron door and keeps it open for a few moments while the player passes through. How long the door remains open can be tweaked by changing the delay on the series of repeaters. Et voila!I was asked the other day to make this project on the fly and so I've decided to share it with you guys. Hope you enjoy! Drop me a diamond if you do! Redstone, Redstone Device, Door, Lock, Pay, Toll

In-Game Day, Week and Year Counter With Display Redstone Device Map This is a 10x10x4 box that can be placed in your spawn chunk to track and display in-game days, weeks, and years. Placing it there makes sure that it will always be loaded.Do not rotate the schematic when you place it. MCEdit 0.1.6 does not correctly rotate comparators, and it will break the counter.There is a chest included in the schematic with the daylight sensor and directions on how to set up all the scoreboard values correctly. I've duplicated it here for easier reading/copy and pasting commands.Setup Directions/scoreboard objectives add day dummy/scoreboard objectives add week dummy/scoreboard objectives add year dummy/scoreboard objectives add showweek dummy Date/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar showweekTo make sure dates start out at 1, not 0:/scoreboard players set @a week 1/scoreboard players set @a year 1/scoreboard players set Week showweek 1/scoreboard players set Year showweek 1(Days will be incremented by 1 when you place the sensor.)If you want colors to help distinguish days/weeks/years:/scoreboard teams add Day/scoreboard teams add Week/scoreboard teams add Year/scoreboard teams options Day color /scoreboard teams options Week color /scoreboard teams options Year color Usable values are "black", "dark_blue", "dark_green", "dark_aqua", "dark_red", "dark_purple", "gold", "gray", "dark_gray", "blue", "green", "aqua", "red", "light_purple", "yellow", and "white".It's quite a bit of setup, but you only need to do it once and then you have an functional clock forever. :)Additional NotesMight be wonky in a multiplayer server; the clock requires someone to be on to correctly increment values. M1a2 Abrams battle tank Tusk 3D Art Map The M1 Abrams was designed by Chrysler Defense and produced under the General Dynamics brand. The tank was introduced in 1979, entered service in 1980 and is still undergoing production. The system has been featured in the 1991 Gulf War and Bosnia along with the US invasions of Afghanistan in 2001 and Iraq in 2003. Along with the United States, operators of the Abrams include Australia, Egypt, Kuwait and Saudi Arabia. As of this writing, roughly 8,800 Abrams have been produced in all its varied forms. In US military operations, the Abrams currently serves with both the US Army and the US Marine Corps.The origins of the M1 Abrams can be traced back to a failed partnership between the United States and West Germany in producing a new generation main battle tank system with the latest capabilities to combat whatever the Soviets were brewing (this turned out to be the T-72). The US Army was then fielding the M60 Patton series (its own origins lay in the World War 2-era M26 Pershing heavy tank) as their main battle tank and it was largely believed that the T-72 would outclass the Patton as soon as it arrived - likewise for the West Germans and their post-war Leopard 1 main battle tanks. The joint design became known as the MBT-70.The MBT-70 offered a low profile with a powerful main gun (152mm coupled to an XM-150 autoloader for the American model and an auto-loading 120mm Rheinmetall gun for the German model). The turret was sloped on all sides and set in the middle of the design and housed the entire crew (the remarkably low silhouette - at just over 6 feet tall - necessitated that the driver be placed in the turret with the tank commander and gunner). With the autoloader, operation of the MBT-70 required the use of only three personnel similar to Russian auto-loading MBTs. The hull was sloped towards the front, flat-faced at the rear engine compartment and showcased barely any surface exposure along the sides above the tracks. A 20mm cannon could be used in the air defense role, this springing up from behind the driver's cupola. A 7.62mm co-axial machine gun mount was standard on the MBT-70, and on any tank since World War 2 for that matter. The profile of the MBT-70 was characterized by its medium-sized road wheels with six fitted to a side. The American version of the MBT-70 would have fired a barrel-launched Shillelagh anti-tank missile at long ranges. Suspension was of an advanced hydropneumatic type that was fully adjustable on-the-fly by the driver. Despite it being a heavy 50+ ton tank design, the MBT-70 was reportedly able to reach an unheard of maximum speed of 52 miles-per-hour.Specifications for theM1 AbramsMain Battle TankCountry of Origin:United StatesManufacturer:General Dynamics Land Systems - USAInitial Year of Service:1980Production:9,200Focus Model:M1A1 AbramsCrew:4Overall Length:32.25ft (9.83m)Width:11.98ft (3.65m)Height:9.45ft (2.88m)Weight:69.5 US Short Tons (63,086kg; 139,081lbs)Powerplant:1 x Textron Lycoming AGT-1500 gas-turbine generating 1,500bhp @ 30,000rpm.Maximum Speed:42mph (67 km/h)Maximum Range:265 miles (426 km)NBC Protection:YesNightvision:Yes - PassiveArmament:ORIGINAL (M1):1 x 105mm Royal Ordnance M68A1 (L7) rifled main gun.1 x 12.7mm Browning M1HB air-cooled anti-aircraft heavy machine gun in commander's cupola.1 x 7.62mm M240 co-axial machine gun1 x 7.62mm M240 machine gun at loader's hatch2 x 6 smoke grenade dischargersSTANDARD (M1A1/M1A2):1 x 120mm Rheinmetall M256A1 (L/44) smoothbore main gun.1 x 12.7mm Browning M1HB air-cooled anti-aircraft heavy machine gun in commander's cupola.1 x 7.62mm M240 co-axial machine gun1 x 7.62mm M240 machine gun at loader's hatch2 x 6 smoke grenade dischargersAmmunition:40 x 120mm projectiles1,000 x 12.7mm ammunition12,400 x 7.62mm ammunition12 x smoke grenadesVariants:XM1 - Prototype Model Designation.M1 - Base Production Model; 105mm rifled M68 main gun; 3,273 examples produced.M1IP ("Improvement Production") - 105mm rifled M68 main gun; various upgrades.M1A1 - Upgraded from Royal Ordnance rifled 105mm main gun to Rheinmetall smoothbore 120mm main gun; armor upgrade package; decreased road speed to 41.5 mph.M1A1HC ("Heavy Common") - Based on M1A1; fitted with depleted uranium armor mesh; improved storage; 120mm smoothbore main gun; pressurized NBC protection system.M1A1-D ("Digital") - Based on M1A1HC; highly-evolved Abrams fitted with digital suite.M1A1-AIM ("Abrams Integrated Management") - Based on the M1A1-D; reconditioned former Abrams units; fitted with FLIR and various other sensors; onboard phone system and applicable communications; thermal sight for commander's 12.7mm gun.M1A1 KVT ("Krasnovian Variant Tank") - M1A1 models designed to mimic the look of Soviet-era tanks for training purposes.M1A1M - Iraqi Export Model; based on the M1A1.M1A2 - Land navigation system, new commander's Independent Thermal Viewer and new armor.M1A2 SEP ("System Enhancement Package") - Improved Road Speed to 42mph; increased combat weight to 69.5 tons; improved depleted uranium armor protection utilizing graphite.M1A1/M1A2 "Grizzly" CMV ("Combat Mobility Vehicle") - Dozer-fitted for Battlefield Engineering Vehicle assignments.M1 "Panther II" - Remote-Controlled Mine Clearing VehicleM1 "Panther II" - Mine Clearing Vehicle variant with Blade/Roller System .M104 "Wolverine" HAB ("Heavy Assault Bridge")- Bridgelayer based on M1 chassis.M1 ABV ("Assault Breacher Vehicle") - Prototype Stage for ultimate use by the US MarinesM1 ARV ("Armored Recovery Vehicle") - Single Proposed PrototypeOperators:Australia; [1.5] Automatic Bacon Machine Redstone Device Map This was created on a server one day and ended up being very efficient.How the machine works:Pigs will spawn at the top of the machine and after a while will be pushed by pistons into flowing water. The water will move the pigs to a drop with a layer of lava at the bottom. The fall will cause them to quickly fall through the lava and take a little fall damage. The pigs will finally die by burning and drop Cooked Porkchops (bacon) into some Hoppers. The Hoppers will carry the bacon to a Dropper and will either dispense or store it (depending on the position of the levers).The machine has 3 controls:Bacon DispensaryStore BaconPiston PowerBacon Dispensary will shoot out any bacon the machine collects.Store Bacon will take the bacon the machine collects and store it in a chest.Piston Power controls the pistons that push the pigs.Note when changing the levers:Excluding the "Piston Power" lever, only one lever should be up at a time. If both are up at the same time the machine will randomly dispense and store bacon.Both levers can be down, however. This will result in the machine not dispensing or storing any bacon.Since this was made on a server I have provided a schematic. Use MCEdit or WorldEdit to place it in a world.If you are to use this in a world, leave the sign with my name or have a sign with my name easily visible on the machine. Show some respect please! :)Any comments or criticism (not hating) are welcome! Redstone, Redstone Device, Schematic, Machine, Automatic, Bacon, Pig, Porkchop

The fastest piston retraction - makes sticky piston to not be sticky! Redstone Device Map Hey, I was inactive for a long time but now I gonna upload some redstone devices for you! ;pI found something that seems to be a bug, I was messing around with piston timing and when I made a double piston extender that retracts instantly I placed a block under the sticky piston, the sticky pistons pushed the block down but did not move it up. I expected it to move the block 1 up but it just didn't. I think it happens because when the bottom piston is unpowered but still didn't pull the block in front of it it already counts retracted and then it can be moved, so the extended-piston block realizes that there is no piston block next to it and disappears.This is not really a project, it's more something I want to show you in case someone find it useful. Redstone Device

Lockheed Martin JLTV (concept humvee replacement) Land Structure Map The Lockheed Martin JLTV is one of 3 vehicles that made it to the final testing phases for the US army and Marines. The other 2 competitors of the JLTV are Oshkosh Defence, and AM General. The JLTV was designed to be a armoured scout vehicle. The JLTV includes design elements of both the Humvee and the MRAP. This JLTV also has a V-shaped hull which allows it to have even higher survivability against IEDs since blast will be blown away from the crew inside and away to the sides. I've built two JLTV vehicles and one is the base model which has a flat back to allow for varying attachments on the back.(Utility, communications, equipment, fire support are some examples of add-ons for the back) The other model is sort of a armoured personnel carrier which is why the vehicle maximizes the amount of space for crew members. M3A3 Bradley CFV Land Structure Map Hey guys! Here is my M3A3 Bradley Cavalry Fighting Vehicle.I hope you enjoy!Info(Wikipedia)The M3 Bradley Cavalry Fighting Vehicle (CFV) is an American tracked armored reconnaissance vehicle manufactured by BAE Systems Land and Armaments (formerly United Defense) based on the Bradley Fighting Vehicle family. The M3 CFV is used by heavy armored cavalry units in the U.S. Army.The M3 Bradley CFV is very similar to the M2 Bradley IFV (Infantry Fighting Vehicle) and is fielded with the same powerful two-man 25mm Bushmaster Cannon turret with the coaxial 7.62mm machine gun. It only varies from the M2 in a few subtle ways and by role. The M3 is classified as an armored reconnaissance and scout vehicle and does away with the firing ports found in the M2 series. The M3 also carries more TOW missiles as well as more ammunition for its 25mm and 7.62mm guns.The Bradley family as a whole was originally intended to support the M113 Armored Personnel Carrier (APC), but ended up replacing it altogether. Today, the Bradley is fielded in conjunction with the M1 Abrams series of main battle tanks and often accompanies infantry squads into combat. In the 1991 Persian Gulf War, Bradleys and their powerful 25mm cannon / TOW anti-tank missile combination destroyed more enemy tanks than the M1 Abrams. Only three Bradleys were lost to enemy fire, however, at least 17 were lost to friendly fire. Improvements to the Bradley family have included enhanced identification features, as well as anti-tank missile countermeasures (for first generation wire-guided missiles only) and improved armor protection in the form of ERA. Sand Elevator Redstone Device Map Sand ElevatorYou'll find the description of this redstone device on this page. You can also download the map for free !Vous trouverez la description de ce système redstone sur cette page. Vous pouvez télécharger la map gratuitement !MustardSheepEnglishWhat is it ? :This redstone system is my first sand/gravel elevator working in 1.6.How it works ? : It's quite easy, the system works with a button, a rising-edge detector and few pistons. The sand falls from one side of the device, a piston pushes each block horizontally, then two other pistons are used to rise the blocks up.FrançaisQu'est-ce que c'est ? : Ce système redstone est mon premier élévateur de sable/gravier fonctionnant en version 1.6.Comment ça marche ? : C'est facile, le système fonctionne avec un bouton, un détecteur de front-montants et quelques pistons. Le sable tombe d'un côté du système, un piston pousse ensuite chaque bloc horizontalement, puis 2 autres pistons élèvent le sable de l'autre côté du mécanisme.Additional Notes*** Texture Pack ***CodeCrafted Texture Pack*** Mods ***Optifine HD B4Tested in 1.7.2 Minecraft, Redstone, Redstone Device, Sand, Piston, Elevator, Device, Sheep

Scoreboard Selector Redstone Device Map Scoreboard SelectorYou'll find the description of this redstone device on this page. You can also download the map for free !Vous trouverez la description de ce système redstone sur cette page. Vous pouvez télécharger la map gratuitement !MustardSheepEnglishWhat is it ? :This new redstone device is a selector which works with scoreboards and command blocks.How it works ? :That's quite simple, each button sets a variable called 'Select' to a different amount (1,2,3 and so on), then a redstone wire activates a line of command blocks (see the pictures) to check the variable for different amounts. Finally, in front of each of these command blocks, I placed a comparator and a redstone lamp (the output).Recommendations : If you want to use this system on your map, you'll have to type this command to create the scoreboard :"/scoreboard objectives add Select dummy"FrançaisQu'est-ce que c'est ? : Ce tout nouveau système redstone est un sélecteur qui fonctionne avec des scoreboards et des blocs de commandes.Comment ça marche ? : C'est assez simple, chaque bouton met à jour une variable nommée 'Select' à une valeur dépendant de celui-ci (1,2,3 etc), puis, un fil de redstone active une rangée de blocs de commandes (voir sur les images) pour tester la variable à différentes valeurs. Pour finir, en face de chacun de ces blocs de commandes se trouvent un comparateur ainsi qu'une lampe qui font office de sortie.Recommendations : Si vous voulez utiliser ce système sur votre map, vous devrez écrire cette commande pour créer le scoreboard :"/scoreboard objectives add Select dummy"Additional Notes*** Texture Pack ***CodeCrafted Texture Pack*** Mods ***Optifine HD B4Tested in 1.6.2 Minecraft, Redstone, Block, Command, Redstone Device, Small, Compact, Device

F-117 Night Hawk Stealth Fighter 3D Art Map The F-117 Nighthawk achieved global fame in the 1991 air war against Iraq. The aircraft was the world's first operational stealth platform and maintained a stellar service record during her tenure. Due to her advanced nature, the aircraft was held under strict secrecy for nearly a decade before a formal confirmation of her existence was announced by US authorities. From then on, the type went on to see combat service throughout several major global wars and subsequently maintained a stellar service record no doubt due to her unique qualities and expert pilot training. Despite the common nickname of "stealth fighter", the F-117 is in fact a strike-minded aircraft with qualities more akin to a bomber than a true fighter aircraft - she maintained no onboard cannon and was generally fielded with air-to-ground munitions.Country of Origin:United StatesManufacturer:Lockheed Aeronautical Systems Company - USAInitial Year of Service:1982Production:59Focus Model:Lockheed F-117A NighthawkCrew:1Length:65.88ft (20.08m)Width:43.31ft (13.20m)Height:12.40ft (3.78m)Weight (Empty):29,498lbs (13,380kg)Weight (MTOW):52,503lbs (23,815kg)Powerplant:2 x General Electric F404-GE-F1D2 non-afterburning turbofan engines generating 10,800lbs of thrust.Maximum Speed:646mph (1,040kmh; 562kts)Maximum Range:690miles (1,111km)Service Ceiling:65,617ft (20,000m; 12.4miles)Rate-of-Climb:0 feet per minute (0m/min)Hardpoints:0Armament Suite:STANDARD (Internal Bomb Bay:2 x 2,000lb bombs carried in an internal bomb bay. 3d Art, Aircraft, Stealth, Military, Night, Bomber, Fighter, Airforce

E-2 Hawkeye Air Structure Map he Northrop Grumman E-2 Hawkeye is an American all-weather, carrier-capable tactical airborne early warning (AEW) aircraft. This twin-turboprop aircraft was designed and developed during the late 1950s and early 1960s by the Grumman Aircraft Company for the United States Navy as a replacement for the earlier E-1 Tracer, which was rapidly becoming obsolete. The aircraft's performance has been upgraded with the E-2B, and E-2C versions, where most of the changes were made to the radar and radio communications due to advances in electronic integrated circuits and other electronics. The fourth version of the Hawkeye is the E-2D, which first flew in 2007. The E-2 was the first aircraft designed to be an AEW aircraft from the outset, as opposed to a modification of an existing airframe, such as the E-3. Variants of the Hawkeye have been in continuous production since 1960, giving it the longest production run of any carrier based aircraft.The E-2 also received the nickname "Super Fudd"[2] because it replaced the E-1 Tracer "Willy Fudd". In recent decades, the E-2 has been commonly referred to as the "Hummer" because of the distinctive sounds of its turboprop engines, quite unlike that of turbojet and turbofan jet engines. The E-2 and its sister, the C-2 Greyhound, are currently the only propeller airplanes that operate from aircraft carriers. In addition to U.S. Navy service, smaller numbers of E-2s have been sold to the armed forces of Egypt, France, Israel, Japan, Mexico, Singapore and Taiwan. Air Structure, Aircraft, Carrier

F-4 Phantom II Air Structure Map Today marks the start of my fall aircraft series.Today's entry is the McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom IITheMcDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II[N 1]is a tandem, two-seat, twin-engine, all-weather, long-rangesupersonicjet interceptor fighter/fighter-bomber originally developed for theUnited States NavybyMcDonnell Aircraft.[1]It first entered service in 1960 with the U.S. Navy. Proving highly adaptable, it was also adopted by theU.S. Marine Corpsand theU.S. Air Force, and by the mid-1960s had become a major part of their respective air wings.[2]The Phantom is a large fighter with a top speed of overMach2.2. It can carry over 18,000 pounds (8,400kg) of weapons on nine externalhardpoints, including air-to-air missiles, air-to-ground missiles, and various bombs. The F-4, like other interceptors of its time, was designed without an internal cannon. Later models incorporated aM61 Vulcanrotary cannon. Beginning in 1959 it set 15 world records for in-flight performance,[3]including an absolute speed record, and an absolute altitude record.[4]During theVietnam Warthe F-4 was used extensively; it served as the principal air superiority fighter for both the Navy and Air Force, and became important in the ground-attack andreconnaissanceroles late in the war. The Phantom has the distinction of being the last U.S. fighter flown to attainacestatus in the 20th century. During the Vietnam War the USAF had one pilot and two weapon systems officers (WSOs),[5]and the US Navy one pilot and one radar intercept officer (RIO), achieve five aerial kills against other enemy fighter aircraft and become aces in air-to-air combat.[6]The F-4 continued to form a major part of U.S. military air power throughout the 1970s and 1980s, being gradually replaced by more modern aircraft such as theF-15 EagleandF-16in the U.S. Air Force; theGrumman F-14 TomcatandF/A-18 Hornetin the U.S. Navy; and the F/A-18 in the U.S. Marine Corps.The F-4 Phantom II remained in use by the U.S. in the reconnaissance andWild Weasel(suppression of enemy air defenses) roles in the 1991Gulf War, finally leaving service in 1996.[7][8]It was also the only aircraft used by both U.S. flight demonstration teams: the USAFThunderbirds(F-4E) and the US NavyBlue Angels(F-4J).[2][9][10]The F-4 was also operated by the armed forces of 11 other nations. Israeli Phantoms saw extensive combat in severalArabo Israeli conflicts, while Iran used its large fleet of Phantoms in theIrano Iraq War. Phantoms remain in front line service with seven countries, and in use as anunmanned targetin the U.S. Air Force.[11]Phantom production ran from 1958 to 1981, with a total of 5,195 built, making it the most numerous American supersonic military aircraft.[2][12] Air Structure, Aircraft, Vietnam, Phantom, Napalm

Chandlery Land Structure Map This is a small dockside chandlery.What is a chandlery? A chandlery, or ship chandlery is "a retail dealer who specialises in supplies or equipment for ships, known as ship's stores. For traditional sailing ships, items that could be found in a chandlery might include: rosin, turpentine, tar, pitch (resin), linseed oil, whale oil, tallow, lard, varnish, twine, rope and cordage, hemp, oakum, tools (hatchet, axe, hammer, chisel, planes, lantern, nail, spike, boat hook, caulking iron, hand pump, marlinspike), brooms, mops, galley supplies, leather goods, and paper". (thank you again, Wikipedia).So basically this is a small store where sailors can purchase stuff necessary to sailing the high seas. This example has a small dock so the boats can tie up right outside. The design is made to be placed along the coast or in a port-town. Store is on the ground floor, living quarters are up in the tower.I am making this schematic available to the public so others can use them in projects of their own.Feedback is very welcome so leave a comment if you find this interesting or useful.As with all my designs, best used with the JohnSmithLegacy texture pack.Like this design? Amazing Warehouse of Mystery and Magic Land Structure Map Welcome to the Amazing Warehouse of Mystery And Magic!!!What's so amazing, mysterious and magical about this warehouse?Well, frankly... nothing. It is a small wooden warehouse. But I had to make you look at this page somehow (and if you are reading this, obviously it worked). I mean, it's a warehouse; it is a big room filled with shelves and crates. No matter how much I try, I can't make that exciting.So what is it really? This is a small wooden storehouse intended as a resource for other builders. Drop it in near the market, the harbor or the city walls and boom, instant storage. It's not exciting, it's not wondrous and it certainly isn't magical. It's ordinary and functional. Then again, that is all it is really intended to be. I'm making this available to other builders to put in their maps so they don't have to construct one it themselves. It's a time-saver and convenience. Medieval Apartments 3 Land Structure Map Another purely functional design intended to help flesh out a Medieval city or town.Like many of my designs, this one has a story behind it too. This building was taken from a Dungeons & Dragons tabletop game; it was the home to a local crime kingpin known as "The Fatman". The ground floor is a warehouse area where he stores his stolen goods. The second floor, a sitting area for his goons to hang out between jobs. The third floor is the crime-lord's personal apartment (complete with walk-in vault to store his ill-gotten treasures), and the fourth, top floor is where his servants live.But for those 7 billion (minus 5) who have no interest in my D&D campaign, just consider this a modest apartment for the middle-class part of a Medieval-era town.Note: I've dropped the structure on a 16x16 tile (1 chunk) for display purposes, but I recommend the tenement abut other buildings directly.I am making this schematic available to the public so others can use them in projects of their own.Feedback is very welcome so leave a comment if you find this interesting or useful.As with all my designs, best used with the JohnSmithLegacy texture pack.Like this design? Focke Wulf Fw-190 Air Structure Map TheFocke-Wulf Fw 190WÃ¼rger(English:Shrike) was a German single-seat, single-enginefighter aircraftdesigned byKurt Tankin the late 1930s and widely used duringWorld War II. Powered by aradial engine, the 190 had ample power and was able to lift larger loads than its well-known counterpart, theMesserschmitt Bf 109. The 190 was used by theLuftwaffein a wide variety of roles, includingday fighter,fighter-bomber,ground-attack aircraftand, to a lesser degree,night fighter.When the Fw 190 started flying operationally over France in August 1941, it quickly proved itself to be superior in all but turn radius to theRoyal Air Force's main front-line fighter, theSpitfire Mk. V.[2]The 190 wrestedair superiorityaway from theRAFuntil the introduction of the vastly improvedSpitfire Mk. IXin July 1942 restored qualitative parity.[3]The Fw 190 made its air combat debut on theEastern Frontin November/December 1942; though Soviet pilots considered the Bf 109 the greater threat, the Fw 190 made a significant impact. The fighter and its pilots proved just as capable as the Bf 109 in aerial combat, and in theopinion of German pilotswho flew both, provided increased firepower and manoeuvrability at low to medium altitude.The Fw 190 became the backbone of theJagdwaffe(Fighter Force), along with the Bf 109. On the Eastern Front, the Fw 190 was versatile enough to use inSchlachtgeschwader(Battle Wings or Strike Wings), specialised ground attack units which achieved much success against Soviet ground forces. As an interceptor, the Fw 190 underwent improvements to make it effective at high altitude, enabling it to maintain relative parity with itsAlliedopponents. The Fw 190A series' performance decreased at high altitudes (usually 6,000m (20,000ft) and above), which reduced its effectiveness as a high-altitude interceptor, but this problem was mostly rectified in later models, particularly in theJunkers Jumo 213inline-engine Focke-Wulf Fw 190D series, which was introduced in September 1944. In spite of its successes, it never entirely replaced the Bf 109.The Fw 190 was well liked by its pilots. Some of the Luftwaffe's most successfulfighter acesclaimed a great many of their kills while flying it, includingOtto Kittel,Walter NowotnyandErich Rudorffer. Air Structure, Aircraft, Germany, Europe, Nazi

YF-23 Black Widow Air Structure Map TheNorthrop YF-23orNorthropo McDonnell Douglas YF-23was an American single-seat, twin-enginefighter aircraftdesigned for theUnited States Air Force(USAF). The design was a finalist in the USAF'sAdvanced Tactical Fighter(ATF) competition, battling theLockheed YF-22for a production contract. Two YF-23 prototypes were built with the nicknames "Black Widow II" and "Gray Ghost".In the 1980s the USAF began looking for a replacement for its fighter aircraft, especially to counter the USSR's advancedSu-27andMiG-29. Several companies submitted design proposals; the USAF selected proposals fromNorthropandLockheed. Northrop teamed withMcDonnell Douglasto develop the YF-23, while Lockheed,BoeingandGeneral Dynamicsdeveloped the YF-22.The YF-23 was stealthier and faster, but less agile than the competition. After a four-year development and evaluation process, the YF-22 was announced the winner in 1991 and entered production as theLockheed Martin F-22 Raptor. The U.S. Navy considered using the production version of the ATF as the basis for a replacement to theF-14, but these plans were later canceled. As of 2009, the two YF-23 prototypes were museum exhibits.[1][2] Air Structure, Aircraft, Series, Usa, Experimental

MQ-1 Predator Air Structure Map TheGeneral Atomics MQ-1 Predatoris anunmanned aerial vehicle(UAV) built byGeneral Atomicsand used primarily by theUnited States Air Force(USAF) andCentral Intelligence Agency(CIA). Initially conceived in the early 1990s forreconnaissanceand forward observation roles, the Predator carries cameras and other sensors but has been modified and upgraded to carry and fire twoAGM-114 Hellfiremissilesor other munitions. The aircraft, in use since 1995, has seencombatoverAfghanistan,Pakistan,Bosnia,Serbia,Iraq,Yemen,Libya, andSomalia.The USAF describes the Predator as a "Tier II" MALE UAS (medium-altitude, long-endurance unmanned aircraft system). The UAS consists of four aircraft or "air vehicles" with sensors, aground control station(GCS), and a primary satellite link communication suite.[4]Powered by aRotaxengine and driven by a propeller, the air vehicle can fly up to 400 nautical miles (740km) to a target, loiter overhead for 14 hours, then return to its base.Following 2001, the RQ-1 Predator became the primary unmanned aircraft used for offensive operations by the USAF and the CIA in Afghanistan and thePakistani tribal areas; it has also been deployed elsewhere. Because offensive uses of the Predator areclassified, U.S. military officials have reported an appreciation for the intelligence and reconnaissance-gathering abilities of UAVs but declined to publicly discuss their offensive use.[5]Civilian applications have included border enforcement and scientific studies, and to monitor wind direction and other characteristics of large forest fires (such as the one that was used by theCalifornia Air National Guardin the August 2013Rim Fire).[6] Air Structure, Modern, Aircraft, United, States, Drone

Weather Clearing Device Redstone Device Map This is a simple weather-clearing device designed by VulcanoStrol for use on the Race for Wool map, Badlands Boogaloo, by iTruthful and Phorxy. It uses a minecart to activate a command block every few minutes that clears the weather for the maximum duration.This device makes glass ceilings above Race for Wool maps obsolete. I encourage mapmakers to update any older maps you may have made that include glass ceilings to remove them and add this device to them instead. Make sure to save your map after using the "/gamerule commandBlockOutput false" command, or else players and spectators will be spammed with a message indicating that the weather has been cleared for 99999 ticks every few minutes. Redstone Device

Killzone ATAC Air Structure Map The A.T.A.C. (Agile Tactical Air Component) is a flying assault vehicle used by the Helghast, capable of attacking vehicles or infantry. It is also a prototype fighter aircraft transported to Vekta for combat trials by the Elite Guard. Though originally built to offer room to a single pilot, later models were designed to be operated unmanned via remote control, due to a high number of crashes during live tests. The aircraft is a relatively small, fast, and extremely maneuverable attack vehicle that is armed with an awesome array of firepower.Though it has been under development for quite some time, the Helghast have gathered useful data during trial runs which has enabled them to make useful development modifications before the ATAC would go into final production. However, after the destruction of the SD platform on Vekta, the Helghast have been forced to push the ATAC into active service as part of their defense against the ISA invasion. F-86 Sabre 3D Art Map North American F-86 SabreTheNorth American F-86 Sabre(sometimes called theSabrejet) was atransonicjetfighter aircraft. Produced byNorth American Aviation, the Sabre is best known as America's firstswept wingfighter which could counter the similarly winged SovietMiG-15in high-speed dogfights over the skies of theKorean War. Considered one of the best and most important fighter aircraft in the Korean War, the F-86 is also rated highly in comparison with fighters of other eras.[3]Although it was developed in the late 1940s and was outdated by the end of the 1950s, the Sabre proved versatile and adaptable, and continued as a front-line fighter in numerous air forces until the last active operational examples were retired by theBolivian Air Forcein 1994.Its success led to an extended production run of more than 7,800 aircraft between 1949 and 1956, in the United States, Japan and Italy. Variants were built in Canada and Australia. TheCanadair Sabreadded another 1,815 airframes, and the significantly redesignedCAC Sabre(sometimes known as theAvonSabre or CAC CA-27), had a production run of 112. It was by far the most-produced Western jet fighter, with total production of all variants at 9,860 units.[1]Specifications (F-86F-40-NA)[edit]Data fromThe North American Sabre[73]General characteristicsCrew:1Length:37 ft 1 in (11.4 m)Wingspan:37 ft 0 in (11.3 m)Height:14 ft 1 in (4.5 m)Wing area:313.4 sq ft (29.11 m²)Empty weight:11,125 lb (5,046 kg)Loaded weight:15,198 lb (6,894 kg)Max. takeoff weight:18,152 lb (8,234 kg)Powerplant:1 Ã General Electric J47-GE-27turbojet, 5,910lbf(maximum thrust at 7.950 rpm for five min) (26.3 kN)Fuel provisionsInternal fuel load: 437 US gallons (1,650L)), Drop tanks: 2x200 US gallons (760L) JP-4 fuelPerformanceMaximum speed:687 mph (1,106 km/h) at sea level at 14,212 lb (6,447 kg) combat weightalso reported 678mph (1,091km/h) and 599 at 35,000 feet (11,000m) at 15,352 pounds (6,960 kg). (597 knots (1,106km/h) at 6446 m, 1,091 and 964km/h at 6,960 m.)Stall speed:124 mph (power off) (108 knots (200km/h))Range:1,525 mi, (2,454 km)Service ceiling:49,600 ft at combat weight (15,100 m)Rate of climb:9,000 ft/min at sea level (45.72 m/s)Wing loading:49.4 lb/ft² (236.7kg/m²)lift-to-drag:15.1Thrust/weight:0.38ArmamentGuns:6 X0.50 in (12.7 mm)M3 Browning machine guns(1,602 rounds in total)Rockets:variety of rocket launchers; e.g: 2 Matra rocket pods with 18SNEB68 mm rockets per podBombs:5,300 lb (2,400 kg) of payload on four externalhardpoints, bombs were usually mounted on outer two pylons as the inner pairs were plumbed for 2 200 US gallons (760L)drop tankswhich gave the Sabre a more useful range. A wide variety of bombs could be carried (max standard loadout being 2 1,000 lb bombs plus two drop tanks),napalmcanisters and could have included a tactical nuclear weapon. 3d Art, Aircraft, Military, Airforce, F86, Sabre

Huge TNT Cannon (1.7 Update) Redstone Device Map Hello everyone :)Some time ago I created a huge cannon made out of obsidian which was supposed to fire TNT. Back then it was only possible to accomplish this using dispensers and a lot of redstone wiring.With the 1.7 however(And the introduction of the /summon command), this cannon was completely re-done! The only thing that is still similiar is the design and the fact that it shoots TNT.Features:-Fires TNT by simply pressing a button-3 different power modes that will make the primed TNT travel different distances(weak,normal,strong)-A special overdrive mode that will make the cannon shoot TNT continously-Unlimited ammo, you will never have to refill the cannon!-Fancy designAll you have to do to use it is download the schematic(s) and place it in your world(Do NOT rotate it*). Now you can climb onto it and try it out, it's very simple.*Important sidenote:The cannon that you get from the schematic from PMC needs to face east all the time otherwise it wouldn't work(Because of the way the /summon command works). If you want it to face any other direction you can download a folder with schematics for all the 4 directions. If you rotate the schematic it won't work so always make sure to use the proper one ;)Here you can get all the schematics:www.mediafire.com/download/jforgpau8cywa1w/4cannons.zipI also prepared a world where you can test the cannon against some targets. It's nothing special but the world also includes the "Human Cannon" which shoots you straight up in the air which is, as I think, a nice feature. Minecraft LAN whitelist box Redstone Device Map Alright, so you start a LAN world in a public place and load up your survival world to play with your friends. The next thing you know, some griefer logs on and blows all your hard work up.Has this ever happened to you? The worst thing about it is that you have no defense. On LAN, there's no whitelist, ban or kick options. Fortunately, for you I've devised a simple but effective way of dealing with it.I call it "The LAN Whitelist Box™". This box does essentially what the name says, it provides a whitelist for your defenseless LAN worlds!So how does it work? After turning it on, it will constantly kill anyone who isn't authorized to be on your server. At anytime, you can remove people from the server too, just in case the TNT comes out (Use /scoreboard players set [your "friend's" name] Whitelisted 0).INSTRUCTIONS:Insert schematic into world/load up pre-made worldEnter world and start machineAdd friends using /scoreboard players set [your friend's name] Whitelisted 1Open LANPlay LAN griefer-freeNOTE:You will need to use /scoreboard players set @p Whitelisted 1 before turning the machine on if you download the world Redstone Device, Schematic, Easy, Lan, Whitelist, Protection, Greifer

[Aetherian Project] Hemorian Armies - ATS Type 21 "Scarab" 3D Art Map When the greatforges and war factories at Galruun were reclaimed from the Iulen Tribe, the Hemorian Directorate, as a result of heavy casualties among infantry units during the reclamation, immediately sought to design armored transports for their forces. The Scarab was one such design. It sports heavy armor plating, capable of shrugging off most average sized artillery shells. However, there are reports of incendiary weapons cracking the lighter material between the armor, allowing fire to enter the chassis.The Scarab sports a very light armament; one light gun located at the rear. However, troops on the deck of the walker make up for that with their own weapons, and as the Scarab has a very small interior, most soldiers will ride on top. Usually, the only thing in the chassis of the Scarab is fuel, the engine, and cargo being used on the front lines.Additional NotesFor a different faction in the Aetherium project. All will be explained in a few upcoming lore posts.Until then, - Kero 3d Art

DeathSwap for 3 players Challenge / Adventure Map 3 Player DeathSwapHave you ever wondered is there a way to play SethBlings DeathSwap map with 3 people? Well now there it is!Drumbledore's Army modified the original DeathSwap game by adding one more player to it. Now you can enjoy the game with another friend, with no mods required. As you need one Player to be the teleport dummy you need to have at least 4 Players in the server to play. 3 player DeathSwap is a minigame where 3 players compete for life and death. At the beginning players teleport for a very long distance away from each others. First you must gather some wood to get the other people killed. As the game is in progress swaps will happen in random period of times. The players basically swap to each others locations at the same time, and that way you have to kill the others.To play just use our example map or import the .schematic into any world near spawn.Don’t forget to enable Commandblocks in your server.properties too.Make sure to leave a diamond if you really liked it, it would really help us out! :) Adventure, Challenge

ATMO: The minecraft atmosphere creator Redstone Device Map Want to set a mood for your adventure map? Want to change your world to eternal day? Want the sky to magically glow? If you want any of these, ATMO is for you! ATMO is an atmosphere generator, meant to set a mood in your adventure maps, as well as control weather and day/night cycles. This current build of ATMO feature selection between eternal day, night, rain, thunder and clear weather as well as special effects such as glowing skies and sped up time. It is very simple to use and is quite effective. It is easy to upgrade, so if you want any new weather effects, custom timesets or faster/slower day/night cycles, feel free to post it in the comments. I'll try my best to add them to ATMO in it's future updates. Redstone Device

Redstone Day/Night Fire - Flush! Fast! Compact! Redstone Device Map This contraption, measuring just 7 x 4 x 8, changes from lit at night (with netherrack) to inconspicuous during the day!When night time comes, the netherrack is swapped with the stone bricks, then that netherrack is lit by the dispenser. In the morning, the netherrack is swapped back for your wall block and the fire extinguished.It changes its state in less than a second and is completely survival/recourse friendly.It is small enough so they can be lined up along a wall and the fire provides enough light to keep mobs from spawning on a two block floor.Also, it contains only ONE daylight sensor, so you only have to make ONE hole to the surface!This took forever to compact and make perfect (it was frustrating) =PYeah, that's about it! Download, Diamond, and Share! Redstone, Redstone Device, Compact, Torch

Auto-Fueling furnace bank - resource minimal! Redstone Device Map I have two applications of the same design for you today. Both of these systems are resource-minimal and distribute fuel evenly between 8 furnaces.Note: initial start-up requires 8 stacks of coal before top row begins to fill and system becomes fully operational.Additional NotesHow it works:The top trapped chest is filled with your fuel and is held until you close the lid. A comparator disables the hoppers leading into the furnaces, allowing the coal from the top chest to be evenly distributed into the two lower chests. Once the top chest is empty, the lower chests will be released to fill the hoppers below.IMPORTANT NOTE!: The bottom row of hoppers should have 4 of their 5 slots filled with any non-fuel block. This will hasten the filling of the top row of hoppers. Redstone, Redstone Device, Automatic, Auto, Furnace, Fuel

Single Transporter Pad Mark III Redstone Device Map This is a complete Star Trek inspired transporter Pad. This is the third update to my design. The redstone has been cleaned up a bit, and there is easy access to all parts of the wiring. This design can have only one per-programmed "Transport" location. This makes use of command blocks to achieve the "transport". This build has transport "Beams" that surround the player on all sides for a few seconds before the teleport takes place. Unlike my transporter Room designs the transporter pad can't be turned off, so be careful not to place it anywhere an animal could activate it. This has the same "Transporter Coil" design as the Mark III Transporter Room. With my knowledge of redstone this is the best I could do as far as compacting it. Should anyone have any idea's how to improve upon the design please feel free to contact me. Redstone Device

2x3 Flush Seamless Piston Door Redstone Device Map 2x3 Flush Seamless Piston DoorYou'll find the description of this redstone device on this page. Vous pouvez télécharger la map gratuitement !MustardSheepEnglishWhat is it ? : This system is a 2x3 Flush Seamless Piston Door which is really compact.How it works ? : My project looks a bit like my 2x2 Flush Seamless ; this one has been enhanced. It's basically a 2x2 Jeb Door linked with 4 vertical double-piston extenders and 2 sticky pistons for the 3rd row of blocks.To open the door, the Jeb Door opens then 2 double-piston extenders are used to "hide" the visible pistons. Diamond generator Redstone Device Map Hey guys, I'm back with another generator! Woo!I really need to stop that highlighting thing...IMPORTANTAnyway, this is a 1.7 comparable generator, although when you import it, there are some things you need to do.Break the block in front of the diamond, and jump down. Look for a lever leading into a redstone comparator. Turn that lever off and back on. next, look around and make sure there are no frozen repeaters (repeaters that have a current but aren't sending it). Place a block above or below the repeater and it should fix this glitch. That's all you need to do. Sorry about the inconvenience, but i don't think there is anything i can do to fix that. The Purge in Minecraft Redstone Device Map I have made a MCEdit Schematic that allows you to recreate the Purge in Minecraft.Upon pressing the button, a 10 minute timer will start. In these 10 minutes, you will play minecraft normally, farming, building a house. No PvP. After the 10 minutes, the Purge will start. During the Purge, you can grief, kill, and steal. After 10 minutes of the Purge, it will revert to normal, and the process repeats.The point of this is that you can just plop it in your survival server and add some more spice into the game. Its not a minigame or anything, just a different way to play survival minecraft.I hope you guys enjoy, please comment, diamond, and subscribe :D Redstone Device

Minecraft "Plugin": Mob Beheading [Snapshot 14w07a+] Redstone Device Map This mechanism adds mob beheading into your minecraft world! There is a 1/9 chance of a mob being beheaded. This whole system works on the new possibility in the snapshot 14w07a and up that dispensers can place command blocks, even command blocks with commands in them. Every time you kill a monster, it checks if a player has killed a mob. Next, it powers dispensers, which pick 1 of 9 possible command blocks: 8 of them are blank, 1 of them has a command that gives a player who has killed the mob (ie Zombie, Player, etc.) their head. The mobs that can be beheaded are: Zombies, Skeletons, Creepers, and Players (Sadly, it is impossible to get the head of the specific player that you killed: you will only get a blank Steve head). In order to install this system, put it in your spawn chunks (under or above the area that players spawn) using MCedit. Press the button on the side of the machine once you have imported it to start it! Thanks, please enjoy!Additional NotesThis system only works on the snapshot 14w07a or later! go to mojang.com/ to learn how to install the snapshot! Press the button on the side of the machine once you have imported it to start it! Update coming soon! Redstone, Redstone Device, Schematic, Head, Mcedit, Plugin, Snapshot, Beheading

Italian MAS (Motoscafo armato silurante) (Fast Attack Boat) [Only One on PMC!!!] Water Structure Map Motoscafo armato silurante (Italian: "torpedo armed motorboat"), commonly abbreviated as MAS was a class of fast torpedo armed vessel used by the Regia Marina (the Royal Navy of Italy) during World War I and World War II. The MAS boats were very widely used during World War 1 and also in World War 2. A significant success came in December 1917, when an MAS boat managed to sink the pre-dreadnought battleship SMS Wien in Trieste harbor. The greatest success of Italian MAS was the sinking of theAustro-Hungarian battleship SMS Szent István off Pula on 10 June 1918 by a boat commanded by Luigi Rizzo.This is lightly armed with a machine gun and 2 torpedoes with an occasional light gun. (not included)This recreation is 18 blocks in length and 7 as its beam.This ship is in part of a series which will also have the Schnellboote, the PT boats, and the British Motor Gunboat. As always, leave a comment, I always appreciate constructive criticism, and if you like it, leave a diamond behind, they are also appreciated. Enjoy! One Piece: Basics (+Haki) Complex Map What you will find here:Power-ups, sweet particle effects to demonstate your strength, a development system, the basics for future content.INTROHello everyone!I'm going to start a new series of minecraft redstone/commandblock mechanisms that provide the players with unique and powerful abilities, inspired from the popular manga/anime series One Piece. This is the first and most important piece of this whole project as it provides all the basic stuff to begin with.Everything will be multiplayer-compatible.LOREIn the One Piece universe there are some extremely rare fruits called Devil's Fruits. Each one is unique and holds unimaginable power and unique abilities for whoever eats it, who is known afterwards as a Devil Fruit User. Their drawbacks are that after eating them, the user loses the ability to swim, can't get rid of the powers nor can eat another fruit. There are 3 types of fruits, each with a special different characteristic:Paramecia Devil Fruits:A great variety of special abilities, such as creating quakes with your fists, creating and manipulating wax or even turning everyone around you into stone statueses.Zoan Devil Fruits:Grants the user the powers of an animal. Some rarer versions of this fruit can even grant the powers of an ancient, long extinct creature or a mythical beast.Logia Devil Fruits:It is consindered the most powerful type of fruit. It grants its user the ability to manipulate and transform into an element or material. 99% of these users cannot be hit by normal physical attacks.In the One Piece universe there is also an inner power within everybody that they can train and develop called haki. There are 3 types of haki as well: - The armament haki allows the user to create a force similar to an invisible armor around themselves or something they hold, allowing for enhanced attacks and greater defense. Physical attacks reinforced with haki can even hit the invicible logia types. - The observation haki allows the user to sense the presence of others, even if they are concealed from view or too far to see naturally. - The Conqueror's haki is a rare form of haki that cannot be attained through training. Only one in a million people have this ability. This type of haki grants the user the ability to dominate the wills of others and knock them out. The effectiveness of this haki depends on the difference in strength between the person using the haki and the person or persons the user is trying to knock out.THE PROJECT YOU ARE LOOKING ATSo, in this particular project I focus on some very basic things. These are:-All the MUST objectives for the future content to work.-Logia type invicibility and the possibility of someone with haki to hit them.-Basic, trainable haki. (including a lot of particle effects. yay!)-Optional death penanlty for devil fruit users. (they lose their fruit)In my minecraft version of the One Piece universe there are two types of armament haki. The offensive one and thedefensive one. As you increase your offensive haki you will get more powerful permanent strength effects, while increasing the defensive one will get you resistance effects.Offensive armament haki is maxed at level 10, where it grants Strength 10. That means 1300% more damage. And that means by using a diamond sword you can deal up to 110 damage with a single blow! You take one level of OAH for every 2000 damage you would deal if you didn't have any haki(approx). (the math: [damage dealt/haki level]+total damage dealt=total damage dealt). That means you would need to kill 100 players to level it up, or even more cows and chickens. HOWEVER, if you manage to kill a player you take a bonus equal to 20, which means you would need to kill only 50 players. From level 3 you can hit logia users. Defensive armament haki is caped at level 4, where it grants Resistance 4. That means 80% reduced damage. Just wear a diamond armor afterwards and you will be as invicible as a logia user is. You take one level of DAH for every 2000 you are dealt. No bonuses here. I consinder this one a little more difficult to max as, despite taking damage from a variety of sources, in general it is not really in your hand when you will be dealt damage (unless you go and jump over cliffs all the time... which is a little weird...). Also, as you level it up, you will take reduced damage, so it will take even longer to go to the next level.And yes. There is an easy way to slowly increase both haki at the same time. Just find a friend and start punching each other until you are both at the brink of death. Then take a break and heal yourselves. And then continue with your training. Etc etc. This won't get you leveled up prolly, unless you train a lot, but it will give you a great boost.Logia fruit users have Resistance 5. In my minecraft version of logia users, haki users aren't just able to hit them, but they also make them completely vulrenable to any damage from any source for as long as they are near them.IN-DEPTHOffensive armament haki:Level 1 needs 2000 damage. After that, each level needs 1538.5 damage (if no strength bonuses were given).In levels 1-2, attacking emits black particles.In levels 3-7, attacking emtis twice the particles.In levels 8-10, attacking emits four times the particles it does in levels 1-2.When level 3+ you are like a kryptonite to logia user. When in a radious of 5, they temporarily lose their resistance effect, which means they can take damage from any source.Defensive armament haki:Level 1 needs 2000 damage. Level 2 needs 2500 pure damage. Level 3 needs 3333.3 pure damage (lol). Level 4 needs 5000 pure damage.In level 1 you slowly emit semi-transparent black particles.In levels 2-3 you emit those particles in twice the speed.In level 4 you emit particles four times the speed they are emited in level 1.SCHEMATIC LEGENDWithin the emerald area you will find some necessities to test my project. In the diamond area you can observe the whole thing.Iron blocks provide OPTIONS (on/off).Every group of command blocks has a sign that gives a general idea for what thing these command blocks are used for.You will need to refresh the clocks in the diamond area after the import.Click the Installation button in the emerald area to create all the MUST objectives/teams.THINGS TO DO-Find an effective and good looking way to make observation haki into minecraft.-An agility development system.NOTE:Conqueror's haki can't be included in this pack because it contains abilities that can only target specific players.To make a long story short, it would be unnecessarily overcomplicated. Will include in future content though.ADDITIONAL PROJECTS None yet.DEVIL FRUIT PROJECTS - One Piece: Mero-Mero no Mi (Love-Love Fruit): http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/one-piece-mero-mero-no-mi/- One Piece: Suna-Suna no Mi (Sand-Sand Fruit): http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/one-piece-suna-suna-no-mi/If someone could check for multiplayer bugs and leave feedback, I would really appreciate it. C:Subscribe to stay tuned for more of these One Piece inspired things.Leave a diamond to show your support.But most importantly, leave your feedback! :D Complex, Pvp, Manga, Anime, Cartoon, Train, Skill, Training

One Piece: Bari-Bari no Mi Complex Map Along with this schematic, you will also need THIS one to make it work properly. Otherwise, at least do "/scoreboard objectives add user dummy user" or it won't work at all. INTRO Hello everyone! This is another addition to my series. It is not quite finished yet, but the problems I must face to finish it right now can't be solved without making it look a li'l ugly. It is fuctional though. The problems I must face reffers to a very particullar bug that I explain below. This bug is also the reason why, although this is the simpliest devil fruit I have made so far, it is also the most complex (wat).Multiplayer compatible. LORE In the One Piece universe there are some extremely rare fruits called Devil's Fruits. Each one is unique and holds unimaginable power and unique abilities for whoever eats it, who is known afterwards as a Devil Fruit User. Their drawbacks are that after eating them, the user loses the ability to swim, can't get rid of the powers nor can eat another fruit. There are 3 types of fruits, each with a special different characteristic: Paramecia Devil Fruits: A great variety of special abilities, such as creating quakes with your fists, creating and manipulating wax or even turning everyone around you into stone statueses. Zoan Devil Fruits: Grants the user the powers of an animal. Some rarer versions of this fruit can even grant the powers of an ancient, long extinct creature or a mythical beast. Logia Devil Fruits: It is consindered the most powerful type of fruit. It grants its user the ability to manipulate and transform into an element or material. 99% of these users cannot be hit by normal physical attacks. The Bari Bari no Mi (Barrier-Barrier Fruit) is a paramecia-class devil fruit that allows the user to generate barriers for defending or striking at will, turning the user into a Barrier Human. The main strength of this fruit is that it allows the user to form invisible barriers, though they can be solidified to become visibly transparent. This protects the user from attacks from either front or back. The barriers appear to be immovable by any outside force. The shield can also be used for offensive purposes, launching forward to create powerful forces to strike the targets.THE PROJECT YOU ARE LOOKING AT The user's abilities: Skill 1: Barrier: A completely invisible barrier appears without warning around the user, protecting him from any direct attack until it is deactivated.Skill 2: Barrier Crash: The user launches an invisible barrier dealing great damage to surrounding enemies in a 12-blocks radious.Another powerful fruit. Its main strength comes from the fact both skills have no visible effects, rendering impossible to know when they are activated (well, the first one. the second has the classic skillname-yelling that everyone around can hear). However, the user can't create barriers too close to themselves. Which means a player who is too close to them can't be blocked by the Barrier nor be hit by the Barrier Crash.And there is my main problem-bug. If the user is killed from inside the barrier while it is activated, it wont go away. The only way I thought of fixing it was by using an invisible-chicken-summon technique, but it 's quite noisy and bad looking.If someone knows a way to exexute commands at the death location of a player, please tell meh!IN-DEPTH Skill 1 is activated when slot 2 is selected. As soon as it is selected a hollow 5x5 box spawns around the user. As soon as it is deselected, the barrier blocks are replaced with air. This skill can protect the user only from direct attacks, such as arrows, fireballs or death lasers.Skill 2 is activated when slot 3 is selected. All entities within a 12-blocks radious are dealth 12 damage.so in-depth. much wowSCHEMATIC LEGEND Within the emerald area you will find some necessities to test my project. In the diamond area you can observe the whole thing. Iron blocks provide OPTIONS (on/off). Every group of command blocks has a sign that gives a general idea for what thing these command blocks are used for. You will need to refresh the clocks in the diamond area after the import. Click the Installation button in the emerald area to create all the MUST objectives/teams. One Piece: Mero-Mero no Mi Complex Map Along with this schematic, you will also need THIS one to make it work properly. Otherwise, at least do "/scoreboard objectives add user dummy user" or it won't work at all. INTROHello everyone!This is my first addition to my new series of commandblock mechanisms that can give players abilities and skills shown in the popular manga/anime series One Piece. It's the Mero-Mero no Mi! A powerful fruit that is used to turn everyone around the user into stone statueses.Multiplayer compatible.LOREIn the One Piece universe there are some extremely rare fruits called Devil's Fruits. Each one is unique and holds unimaginable power and unique abilities for whoever eats it, who is known afterwards as a Devil Fruit User. Their drawbacks are that after eating them, the user loses the ability to swim, can't get rid of the powers nor can eat another fruit. There are 3 types of fruits, each with a special different characteristic:Paramecia Devil Fruits:A great variety of special abilities, such as creating quakes with your fists, creating and manipulating wax or even turning everyone around you into stone statueses.Zoan Devil Fruits:Grants the user the powers of an animal. Some rarer versions of this fruit can even grant the powers of an ancient, long extinct creature or a mythical beast.Logia Devil Fruits:It is consindered the most powerful type of fruit. It grants its user the ability to manipulate and transform into an element or material. 99% of these users cannot be hit by normal physical attacks.The Mero Mero no Mi (Love-Love Fruit) is a paramecia-type Devil Fruit that allows a range of attacks which use emotions of lust or perversion to transform opponents into stone. Victims that have been completely turned to stone are incapable of consciousness unless the user de-petrifies them. If the intended targets have no lust towards the user, then the powers are nullified. This can be achieved either by being distracted by other emotions, such as pain and fear, or by simply lacking lust to begin with.THE PROJECT YOU ARE LOOKING ATThe user's abilities:Passive:Lust - Random player within a 15-blocks radius that can be petrified slowly summons heart particles around himself.Skill 1: Mero Mero Mellow - Everything within a radius of 15-blocks is petrified permantly.Skill 2: De-petrify - Everything within a radius of 15-blocks is de-petrified.Opposed to any other kind of mob, petrified players slowly emit heart particles. They are automatically de-petrified if they or the user dies. Any other mob will not be de-petrified in the case the user dieing. More experienced players know and can avoid the effects of this fruit. Also, other devil fruit users can't use their abilities while petrified.Finally, if the fruit user falls into 3-blocks deep water, they won't be able to get out of the water as they will be constantly teleported downwards. At depths 4+ they are guaranteed to drown. 1-2 blocks deep water is no problem.In order to use your abilities you must be both member of the team "mero" and have your "user" objective to at least 1.IN-DEPTHSkill 1 is activated when slot 2 is selected.When activated random hearts appear in a 15-blocks radious.Entities within 15-blocks are struck by this skill and instantly emit some heart particles.Mobs have 1.000.000 sec of the following effects:Slowness 10, Mining Fatigue 10, Jump Boost 150, Weakness 150.Players have their petrified objective set to 1, which grants them:Slowness 10, Mining Fatigue 10, Jump Boost 150, Weakness 150 and Blindness 1.Petrified players also slowly emit heart particles.The petrified objective is automatically set back to 0 if the player or the user dies.Players with experience level 25+ are not affected by this skill.Skill 2 is activated when slot 3 is selected.Entites within 15-blocks emit angryVillager particles.Mobs within radious are rid of the effects of the first skill.Players' petrified objective is set to 0 and within 2 seconds they are back to normal.The passive summons heart particles at a random player within 15-blocks that can be affected by skill 1.SCHEMATIC LEGENDWithin the emerald area you will find some necessities to test my project. In the diamond area you can observe the whole thing.Iron blocks provide OPTIONS (on/off).Every group of command blocks has a sign that gives a general idea for what thing these command blocks are used for.You will need to refresh the clocks in the diamond area after the import.Click the Installation button in the emerald area to create all the MUST objectives/teams.ADDITIONAL PROJECTS- One Piece: Basics (+Haki): http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/op-basics-haki/DEVIL FRUIT PROJECTS- One Piece: Suna-Suna no Mi (Sand-Sand Fruit): http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/one-piece-suna-suna-no-mi/If someone could check for multiplayer bugs and leave feedback, I would really appreciate it. Visible Barrier Redstone Device Map Visible BarrierI played around with the particle effects, and I magically got a visible barrier. This would mostly be used for decoration purposes, and to show people where not to go. This is useful because it's a way to have the barrier sign, without holding the barrier block.How to Build:1. Place your command block 3 blocks down from where you want the barrier to go. Insert this command into the command block: /particle barrier ~ ~3 ~ 0 0 0 1 12. Connect an output from a clock to the command block. The clock should be about the speed of a hopper clock.3. Cover up the redstone, and it works!If there is any way I can improve this, please tell me! I'd love to see this get improved. Redstone Device, Barrier, Snapshot, Visible
