TTC 1987 GM MCI TC40-102N Classic 3D Art Map Tried and TrueMany Canadian properties did not wish to purchase the RTS model which was being offered in the United States, therefore in 1981 GM produced an updated prototype New Look with a new flat front end and larger window configuration, as well as a restyled back end. The engineering changes made to the buses could be considered ‘evolutionary’ rather than ‘revolutionary’, therefore GM decided to call this updated version the ‘Classic’.In 1987 GM sold its bus building business to MCI, best known for building highway coaches. Classics were constructed at the former GM plant in St. Eustache, Quebec. MCI later sold this business to NovaBus of Quebec. NovaBus continued building Classics for several Canadian and US systems, and produced the last Classic for STO in Hull, Quebec in 1996.In 1987 TTC took delivery of 84 ‘Classics’. Originally these buses were distributed across several divisions with 10-15 buses at each garage. By 2002, the Classics were consolidated into two garages, Eglinton and Birchmount. These buses were retrofitted with UWE connectors for outside storage. The Classics were rebuilt in 2000-2001 and were retired by 2008, except for two, 6221 and 6223, which were used for Toronto Island service until 2010 when they were stored at Mount Dennis until they were removed off the roster in early 2012 and sold to Belka in 2013.The TTC nearly acquired another 135 Classics in 1995, however this order was as part of an agreement to save Orion Bus Industries. Instead, the Ontario government required that bus orders from Ontario systems would go to Orion and, as a result, the TTC acquired 135 Orion V buses instead (7000 - 7135). Smelt No More! {CutClean Vanilla Plugin} (Schematic) [1.8] Redstone Device Map What Is CutClean? CutClean is normally a plugin, (normally used in UHC) that eliminates Furnaces from the game. When you kill an animal, you get cooked meat! And when you mine iron or gold ore, you get the ingot, not the ore! And I have now re-created this in vanilla using command blocks, for anybody to use!Features:1: Pigs Drop Cooked Pork chops.2: Cows Drop Steak.3: Sheep Drop Cooked Mutton.4: Rabbits Drop Cooked Rabbit.5: Chickens Drop Cooked Chicken.6: You Get Flint Every Time You Mine Gravel.7: When You Mine Gold, You Get a Gold Ingot, Not a Gold Ore.8: When You Mine Iron, You Get an Iron Ingot, Not an Iron Ore. Features NOT Enabled.1: Mining Clay Gives You Bricks.2: Shearing Leaves Gives You Apples As If You Broke Them, Or They Decayed. (Impossible in vanilla minecraft)3: Fish Turn into Cooked Fish.4: Wood to Charcoal. xD5: Sugar Cane into Sugar.6: Cobblestone into Smooth Stone.7: Cactus into Cactus Green Dye8: all the rest that I can’t think of.If You Would Like Me To Add Any Of The Optional NOT Enabled Features, Let Me Know! [1.8 Vanilla] Other Map Hey everybody !This addon for Minecraft 1.8 is based on the popular Craftable Spawners, a seriously great mod made by TheBoo ! [url=/account/manage/projects/item/new/Link%20To The Mod]www.minecraftmods.com/craftable-spawners/[/url]I just recreated a bit of this mod in Vanilla 1.8, while making it a bit harder too...Remember, this is an early version of this addon, and this isn't the real mod ! Check the link up there !Basic TutorialHow to Pick the SpawnersFirst of all ,you'll need to find a real spawner in a naturally generated donjon, like Strongholds or Mineshafts.Then, rename a pick "SpawnerDrill", exactly like it's writen beside, and drop it on the op of the spawner !You'll get a "Broken Spawner", that'll be needed for getting custom spawners !Making the Ritual Room and Getting Custom SpawnersTo create spawners from your Broken Spawners, you'll need to make a Ritual Room !Simply just recreate the room like below. TThe grass blocks aren't needed, except below the peony, you can put what you want instead, and the red clay blocks aren't part of thr room, they're just the outline of it.To perform the ritual, simply drop a Broken Spawner, a Nether Star and a particular item depending on the spawner you want !BlazeBlaze PowderZombieRotten FleshSkeletonBoneCreeper [Coming in 1.2]TntZombie Pigman [Coming in 1.2]Gold IngotWither Skeleton [Coming Soon]BeaconIron Golem [Coming in 1.2]Iron BlockSpider [Coming in 1.2]StringWitch [Coming in 1.2]Potion of WeaknessDrop you Spawner on a Note Block to create the Spawner ! Don't place it like a normal block, you'll get a Pig Spawner !I can't do anything against this, 1.8 is great but doesn't give us anything to prevent block placing in surival ...How to Install the SchematicIf you don't have McEdit, download the most recent Dev/Build Version !http://www.mcedit.net/Import the Schematic, Google is your friend !You need to place it in the spawnchunks of your world. It's an area of 4x4 chunks around your world spawn.If you don't care about saving your original world spawn, simply import the schematic anywhere, then go to your world IG just above the point you placed the schematic and type /setworldspawn . It'll set the worldspawn at your current location !You're done ! You can go and play as you want, it'll be always loaded !! Important Note ! Due to 1.8 bugs, hopper clocks can sometimes freeze ! If so you need to go inside the schematic, and simply reload the items in the 2 hoppers clocks. Sorry for the inconvenience, blame Mojang ... Be sure to check it at least once after importing the schematic, cause it happens quite frequently while importing with McEdit !Upcoming Features [1.2] ! Spawner Upgrades & Mobs !- More Spawners ! Witch, Spiders, Creepers, ...- Small Bug Fixes- Spawners Upgrades ! Upgrade the delay, the spawn chances & more !Thanks for reading !Also, be sure to check these guys ! Realistic Sawmill (Command Blocks) Redstone Device Map Hi!This time I want to show You my redstone/command block project. It`s a Sawmill which transforms logs into planks in realistic way. It`s able to transform all 6 types of wood into corresponding planks. You simply have to put logs on the left part of line when piston hides and pick up planks from the right side. I`m considering expanding it with input and output modules using command blocks which would allow to put logs and take planks from chests, but it will take much more space. If I finish it, I will add links to separate threads to this project.Whole redstone is hidden in the room behind the piston and below whole Sawmill.Of course, it`s slower than crafting planks on Workbench but I`m sure that it could be a nice-looking addition for towns on medium and large servers. To prepare the clock to be used on servers, button, which starts the clock goes through a gate which prevents activating clock again and thus, make it stuck in "1" state. Another downside is that if You want to paste it on Your map rotated by 90* or 270*, You will have to edit 6 Command Blocks, because logs facing other sides have different IDs. In uploaded files, production line is parrallel with east/west axis.World Save is created on Flatland and Schematics has minimum of blocks in redstone section. Pick one which You prefer.If You want to build it manually, remember that wire connected directly to piston is delayed by two repeaters by 0.5 second. I personally advise to set gamerule commandBlockOutput to false before putting any logs inside the machine.I hope You will like it! Please leave comments or feedback below. Password Protected Chests Redstone Device Map I have created a command block system that can be used to lock chests in vanilla Minecraft. To use, import the schematic into your world and click the button under the "Startup" sign. Then use the "Get Lock" button to get a lock object.Works in both SP and MP, and in all game modes. Note that in survival, the Lock object is a one-time use (it is consumed on use), but you can have several in a stack. Also note that the key object is consumed when locking a chest, and that any object used to attempt to open a chest is also consumed. As such, there is a "cost" to locking chests.Any item can be used as a key, as long as it can stack. This includes items re-named in an anvil, so you could have a password system that combines both the type of key object and the password itself. Redstone Device

Vending system Redstone Device Map This machine I built for my mob arena. It uses T flip flops and an item sorter to take the item of your choice and dispense an item based on the button that is pressed. It will shoot out any items that aren't acceptable. More buttons/options can be added to or taken away from the machine by repeating the design. I have set it up to accept coal and to dispense mob eggs. So in other words, if you want five of two seperate items, push desired button, add five, wait and push next button, add five. Star Wars: Republic Gunship Air Structure Map The Low Altitude Assault Transport (LAAT), also known as the LAAT-series gunship nicknamed "Larties" by some clones, was a gunship series used by the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars. The series was produced by Rothana Heavy Engineering.The LAAT series gunships were designed to transport up to 30 clone troopers into combat and support them. It also had a rear hangar that could hold up to 4 speeder bikes to support reconnaissance operations or search and rescue missions. Early LAAT were in-atmosphere-only vehicles, requiring cruisers to land somewhere on the planet in order to launch. Although, with their range, it was common practice for cruisers to dip into the atmosphere, let the LAAT fly to the target zone, and be gone before combat even started. Later versions allowed it to fly through space and actually be used for boarding in ship-to-ship battles. Some versions of the gunship included Bacta tanks for medical transportation. Also sometime after the battle on Geonosis, an Alpha-Class Arc Trooper/Special Ops gunship was introduced with a new paint style, increased maneuverability and more flight time.WeaponsThe gunship's many weapon systems were designed for both air-to-air combat and air-to-ground support. For long range or slow/fixed targets the LAAT used 2 mass-driver missile launchers (atop the craft) which held a variable payload depending on the mission. 4 light air-to-air missiles hung below each wing (8 in total) for any in-flight targets. 4 composite-beam pinpoint laser turrets - 2 of which were manned by clone troopers and the other two remote controlled by the co-pilot/gunner (on each wing) had a wide field of rotation and could serve in both air-to-air and air-to-ground operations. 3 anti-personnel turrets (2 at the front, one at the rear of the craft) supported further ground operations by ensuring a clear path for the deployment of troops or vehicles.PerformanceThe gunship was proven excellent in its performance; so maneuverable, in fact, that only the most mobile of enemy craft could keep one in its sights. Even experienced pilots found it impossible to avoid its numerous weapons. These Clone transports were effectively used on the first battle of Geonosis when the Jedi found a droid manufacturing plant on the planet. They could carry 30 clone troopers to and from battle. The LAAT had been used on many planets and was very effective at getting troops into battle.NOTE: All info obtained from: http://starwars.wikia.com/wiki/Low_Altitude_Assault_Transport Dont forget to diamond and subscribe for more content like this! Hostile-Passive Mobs (Vanilla Command Blocks) Redstone Device Map Hey there!This is where I'm going to be uploading my progress on the Hostile-Passive Mobs project. What is the Hostile-Passive Mobs project, you ask? It is a project I'm working on in my single-player let's play world that makes creatures such as pigs hostile and/or dangerous! I've decided to put it on Planet Minecraft so you can follow along as I work on this vanilla command block project.How it Works: Basically there's a randomizer at the beginning which will only trigger every so often. When it does trigger a bunch of pigs get spawned on top of each other (using the Riding tag). Then a clock is activated which will send potions (poison, weakness, damage) flying from the top-most pig known as the Bacon Master. The Bacon Master as well as the other newly summoned pigs are all equipped with a thorns helmet so if you hit them they'll damage you. If you're not careful the Bacon Master can kill you and in your statistics page it will say that you have been killed by a pig 1 time(s) (which is the whole goal of my let's play series Talon's Oasis). If you mange to kill the Bacon Master he will drop the usual pig stuff as well as a pig head which you can wear (and it will have a use in future updates).Please Note: This is unfinished as of Episode 14. There are probably a silly amount of bugs in it. Feel free to comment here or on my youtube channel with bugs you find!Also if you are found this via Planet Minecraft it probably won't make much sense to you. This is intended as a side dish to my let's play series. If you want to learn what's going on watch the video. Block, Command, Blocks, Redstone Device, Vanilla, Lets, Mobs, Play

MineQuest 1.8: A Vanilla Minecraft 1.8 survival expansion!! Redstone Device Map Welcome to MineQuest 1.8: A Vanilla Minecraft 1.8 survival expansion! This was created to add more goals and features to the vanilla (similar to a mod) without having to install anything other than a map.Remember:Diamond If you like itSubscribe If you want moreComment If you have a Question/CommentOverview:MineQuest 1.8 has two main additions to Minecraft: Mining (BIG) and Boss fights (just one).Mining:The mining aspect remains the same during the early game, with one key difference: You gain experience as you mine. Experience, not to be confused with Levels or XP, is granted for mining stone and ores. The rarer the ore, the more experience you get.Woohoo, you get experience for mining. Now what?You spend that experience, of course! MineQuest 1.8 adds two books that you use to spend your Experience wherever you are. They are aquired through a device called a Book Infuser, but we'll learn about that later.With your book and some experience, you can aquire wonderful tools to help you mine more efficiently. Tunnel Borers, Stone Destroyers, Cobblestone Compressors, and much more!Boss fights:MineQuest 1.8 also adds a Boss fight! Much like the Wither, the boss in MineQuest 1.8 is spawned by the player. The boss fight is very difficult and very rewarding.Thank you so much for stopping by!Guides Survival, Block, Command, Redstone Device, Vanilla, Mod

Hatred Mode Challenge / Adventure Map Welcome to Hatred Mode.Now you must beware the dark wherever you turn. Monsters have grown stronger in the hatred of you.Hatred Mode creates a new survival experience for you. It increases the difficulty by replacing regular mobs with incredibly stronger versions of them. Only a few mobs are done, but more will come soon.Falling HatredFalling Hatred spawns throughout the surface of your world. They spawn Pure Hatred. Pure HatredThese spawn from Falling Hatred. They drop diamonds when killed. They're extra fast, and will set fire to a forest in a hurry.Hatred ZombieHatred Zombies are well armored, and armed with stone swords. They're faster than normal, and water does not stop their relentless pursuit.Hatred SkeletonHatred Skeletons do not use bows. They come straight at you with their axes. They are incredibly fast, making them very difficult to hit. Their armor has Thorns enchantment, meaning that they'll hurt you when you attack them with melee attacks.Hatred SpiderHatred Spiders are invisible, with only their eyes glowing in the darkness. They're even faster than the skeletons, making them very hard targets. They do not suffer knockback. They are completely silent, meaning that when you hurt them, you will not know, and you won't know when they are closing in.Hatred EndermanHatred Endermen will slowly close in on you. They are difficult to kill, and deal a wopping 20 hearts of damage if you let them get close. They are extremely slow, however, so letting them no get close isn't too much of a problem.Scrapped Ideas:The reason that Slimes are not upgraded in Hatred Mode is that they are too overpowered. After testing with them, it was found that they almost never die, and upon death, will split into 2 identical copies. That means that you will never kill them, they will jsut split into 2 again and again. Also, after giving them no knockback and a faster speed, they became unstoppable killing machines. Adventure, Challenge

Redstone Device Map Hello PMC!Today I have built a small redstone, 100% Vanilla device that will give you sticks when you break any type of leaves and dead bushes.The redstone mechanics are simple!Once you break leaves or a dead bush, a scoreboard score is set to 1, giving you a stick.Then it is set back to zero, all done in under a second!Some bugs:Mass leaf breaking with shears may bug the machine out, but it should set it back to zero after a secondHow to use it:Use mcedit to place it in your spawn chunk, then press the button to activate it.(Its is recomended that you put it high up the world, near block 256 so it doesn't get in the way!)Anyway thats it for me!I hope you enjoyed, please feel free to diamond if you did! Her foul laugh screeching in your ears like its trying to dig out you brain, driving you into insanity and beyond. Enchantment Extractor Vanilla Mod- Remove enchantments from items! [1.8] Redstone Device Map Hey Guys! This is a "vanilla mod" that I created that I like to call the Enchantment Extractor Vanilla Mod. This is a command block device that allows you to remove enchantments form enchanted items and then get those enchantments back, but as enchanted books. Removing enchantments is a feature I've always wantedi n the game. I feel like this device is a good addition to a survival world. If you get a bad enchantment on an item, you can just use the machine to remove then enchantments from the item, and then you can enchant the item again! Feel free to add this to your survival world!How to use:1. Turn on the machine2. Rename a dispenser using an anvil and name it "Enchantment Extractor"3. Throw the dispenser on the ground (using Q). Do not place it on the ground.4. Throw your enchanted item on top of the dispenser block. Do not place the enchanted item in the dispenser or nothing will happen.5. Your enchanted books will appear inside the dispenser and your item will be unenchanted!Features:Works with all in-game survival friendly enchantments (any enchantent that there is a book for). So an item with looting 9001 will not work.Causes little lag and is very fast.Multiplayer friendlyYou can rather download the schematic and place it into your world. Or you can import the two commands here into command blocks. If you import the commands, read the instructions on pastebin carefully.Thanks to CrushedPixel for the To One Command Block Filter: www.youtube.com/user/CrushedPixel/I hope you guys enjoy this vanilla mod! If you do feel free to diamond the project or check out my YouTube for more redstone creations! Chck out the pictures and videos above for more info. Thanks! Renault FT | 1:1 Scale Land Structure Map This is French light tank made by me in 1:1 scale.Wikipedia info:The Renault FT, frequently referred to in post-World War I literature as the "FT-17" or "FT17", was a French light tank that was among the most revolutionary and influential tank designs in history. The FT was the first production tank to have its armament within a fully rotating turret.[note 1] The Renault FT's configuration – crew compartment at the front, engine compartment at the back, and main armament in a revolving turret – became and remains the standard tank layout. Over 3,000 Renault FT tanks were manufactured by French industry, most of them during the year 1918. Another 950 of an almost identical licensed copy of the FT (the M1917) were made in the United States, but not in time to enter combat. Minecraft Adventure Map - "The Sunblade" - Prologue Challenge / Adventure Map Minecraft Adventure MapThe Sunblade"Prologue" Preffered Texture Pack https://www.johnsmithlegacy.co.uk/DescriptionYou lived a normal, quiet, easy life. Everything was fine in the world and then three weeks ago you left on a Hunting Trip. Upon returning home you discover that something has fell from the sky and landed in the middle of your village. Soon enough, upon request of your Uncle you have in your possession one of the greatest blade's every fashioned by the human hand and it is your sole responsibility to deliver it to its rightful owner and stop a war between Kingdoms before it can start.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Future InformationBefore playing the map I must stress that this maybe should not be described as an Adventure Map. It is more of an Introduction Map. All of the following information can also be found at the end of the map.The purpose of the map is to introduce an idea of a project I plan on starting. I will be attempting to create a series of Adventure Map's which will follow an Episodic Narrative and will continue and eventually conclude the story that I have started in this prologue. It goes without saying that I would love to create maps that are on a much larger scale than this one but this would take a long time if it was just myself and I doubt I would ever have enough time or skill to finish it. I would like to consider myself a good builder and writer but I have no skills in texturing or redstone really which is why I have created this map.I am planning to put a team together to help create this set of Adventure Maps. As you will notice when you join the map it is very rough. The world is randomly generated, not created using programs such as Voxel Sniper. I have tried to create a small realistic world to set this part of the story in but when it comes to things like command blocks I do not have much experience. Within this map I have attempted to use them in some of their most basic forms and one of the firt things you'll notice is that I was not capable of even hiding the pressure plates/tripwires which set them off which is once again why I am trying to recruit a team.To conclude, I am looking for builders, players skilled with redstone and command blocks, writers, texturers and more who would be interested in helping me. If so you can either PM me on here on add me on Skype at Brodie456 and express interest in helping with the map. I will try to reply as quick as possible. If you are planning on showing an interest in helping either message me straight away or play the map and see what you think. If not, feel free to play the map anyway and leave any opinions or constructive points below in the comments.Thank you for reading and hopefully I will hear from some of you soon.-Brodie456 Adventure, Challenge

MK's Binary Counter Redstone Device Map Admittedly, I'm kinda re-inventing the wheel here; ultimately this is just an incrementing binary counter.I came up with this out of need for a very fast binary counter. The one I had been using would ripple, taking 2 ticks per bit that was being toggled. This design makes all the bits about to be toggled next be prepped such that when the pulse arrives, they all toggle simultaneously. The reset line (grey) is also a bit more efficiently integrated in the design too. With a bit of further tweaking, I've gotten the 6-bit design fast enough to work on a 5-tick clock which I think is its limitation - on a 4-tick clock, torches start to burn out. Extending it with more bits may require higher-tick clocks to function properly.Notes:-Screenshots taken with the PG5's Restoner pack found here.-Didn't notice the schematic wasn't up. I've been having a lot of trouble trying to upload this damn file. Redstone, Redstone Device, Counter, Binary

Teleport Room with JSON Book Command Block Redstone Device Map This is the second project I worked on, and elements of the previously uploaded project are in this one also. I'll leave the signs and whatnot in there in case you wondered what the command blocks are for,Included in this is my existing JSON book for my server. I taught myself JSON book code for this, but you can use CrushedPixel's JSON Book Generator to do it easier than I did. I didn't know such a thing existed at the time I was investigating, but you can use my book as an example. Get a good text or code editor and you'll be all set. He also has a video on the book generator: JSON Book Generator VideoMy original book is based on TheWebmage's JSON "Magic" book: TheWebmage's Command Block book code, but has been heavily modified since then, with more pages and different things in there.I am uploading this because it's my favorite building in my server (pretty!) and also because it took me a while to work out the command blocks. Anyone starting with command blocks can learn something here. I located this building central to my world spawn, and when I did that, I basically had no reason to spend any time making minecart tracks anymore.Basically, this building contains these main conceptual things in it: 1) An easier way to travel, using the Teleport Room as a portal to various destinations2) The Easiest Way to Travel (using the JSON book, which kinda makes the Teleport Room obsolete), teleporting to people, relative teleporting in large block sections (I used this for exploring and getting out of jams in survival), teleporting to specific usernames. 3) Various other tools (are in the book) like: Potion Effects, several relative travel options to be used for exploring.4) World and Op CommandsThe room itself has a hole in the top in case you're working in Creative Mode and want to fly through the ceiling.Enjoy.Thanks,Durgadas Command, Blocks, Redstone Device, Travel, Book, Teleport, Json

Witch Sounds Redstone Device Map This combination of a resource pack and a command block invention adds Witch Sounds into the game.You can add it to the world either by inserting the schematic using MCEdit or by pasting a command into a command block and pressing a button. Once you have the command block setup, press the button that is on one of the command block lines to start it up - then play and enjoy hearing their sinister laughter. You also need to add the resource pack to the game the usual way.There are four sounds in the pack/invention:Footstep soundsIdle soundsTaking damage soundsDeath soundsAll of them have several variations in the resource pack. If you want, you can switch out the resource pack or make one yourself - just add sounds for:mob.witch.stepmob.witch.idlemob.witch.hurtmob.witch.deathIf you want to paste the command, copy it from here, and the resource pack is available separately here. Cloud Boots (Swift Boots) in vanilla Redstone Device Map I have made Cloud Boots (also known as Swift Boots and Wing Boots) in vanilla Minecraft! When you wear this pair of boots you will become a lot more faster! You will even be able to run on water!How does this work?:It is recommended that you watch the video before reading this. I made this concept using 1.8 commands. You have to play on Minecraft version 1.8 or above in order for this to work. A command block is testing for players with the score "cloudboots" on at least one. When it detects a player it activates a comparator that activates command blocks that will give the player speed 10 and jump boost 4. When the players takes of the boots the effects will be removed. You can also move fast in water. This was done thanks to the depth strider enchantment. Of course the level of the depth strider enchantment is more than what you can get in survival. The reason you can not see the enchantment on the boots is because of the hide flags option. The boots also has feather falling so that the player will take less damage from jumping. If you are using the world from the world download you can just press a button to get started. If you are importing the machine with MCEdit you have to replace every redstone block inside the machine. You also have to type in these commands before you can begin:/scoreboard objectives add cloudboots dummy/gamerule commandBlockOutput false (this one is not required for the machine to work, but it is recommended that you execute this command anyways.)Did you like this concept? Leave a diamond to show your support! Redstone Device, Cloud, Mod, Zelda, Items, Hover, Legendary, Boots

Soviet T-44 Medium Tank 3D Art Map The T-44 is a medium tank first produced near the end of the World War II by the Soviet Union. It was the successor to the T-34, offering improved ride and cross-country performance and much greater armor. Designed to be equipped with a powerful 85 mm main gun, by the time it was fully tested the T-34 had also moved to this weapon. Both tanks offered similar performance, so introducing the T-44 was not considered as important as increasing T-34 production. Fewer than 2,000 T-44s were built, compared to about 84,000 T-34's. Although the T-44 was available by the end of the war, they were not used in combat.Attempts were made to improve the T-44's armament with a new 122 mm gun, but the turret proved very cramped and the rate of fire was poor, on the order of three rounds per minute. Another attempt with a 100 mm gun seemed more promising although a number of additional changes would be needed to make a truly effective design. Design work on a slightly enlarged version of the T-44 began during the war and a prototype was produced in 1945. This newer design entered production in 1947 as the T-54/55 series of medium tanks, the most-produced tank of all time. 3d Art, Soviet, Tank, Union, Great, Revolution, October, T44

HOW TO MAKE:Get it by throwing wool into a full cauldron.Squeaky Clean Buckets: No use. HOW TO MAKE:Throw a rag and a empty bucket on the ground and it will create a squeaky clean bucket!More ways to get water: Throw a bucket into a full cauldron and you'll get a water bucket! (When its raining, set a cauldron outside , out in the open and it will slowly fill up with water: Perfect for sky block)Another way to fill up a cauldron: When theres a water source on top of a empty cauldron, it will put the water into the cauldron. *There has to be a entity (ITEMS DO NOT WORK) to push the water down.Mouse: Another mob, Drops raw Mouse and Mouse fur. XP-powered Gear [Only One Command] Redstone Device Map So, SimplySarc lately made a video about ideashe had for minecraft 1.9, including an XP-poweredweapon. I really liked that idea and decided to makea vanilla command block creation for this!Only one command!Click here to get to the pastebin.To set up the machine, just paste the command into a command block and power it. That´s all you need to do. Seriously. You can also get the command block as MCEdit schematic. What does it do?This machine adds XP-powered armor, swords, bowand pickaxe to your world. While wearing/holdingthem, your XP is getting drained slower or fasterwith different tools.Enchanted Helmet gives you water breathing.Enschanted Chestplate gives you strength.Enchanted Leggings give you regeneration.Enchanted Boots give you speed.An entire enchanted set gives you resistance without any extra XP-cost!Enchanted Swords give you night vision, invisibility and a shield.Enchanted Pickaxe gives you haste.Enchanted Bows shoot arrows that gives severalnegative effects to any player hit or closely missed by them.Does it work in multiplayer?Yes, this module is perfectly fine on singleplayer and on servers. Just make sure that command blocks are enabled on the server! Anything else?Please note that this might still be unbalanced for survival.Due to the fact that I don´t play survival too much, I couldn´t test it.Please also note that the enchanted bow only works on players!And when you shoot with the enchanted bow, make sure tomake a full draw, otherwise you may hit yourself with the effects!Crafting:Crafting works differently from normal minecraft in my modules.To craft stuff, just throw the ingredients on the floor.To enchant an item, simply put an experience bottle next to it!The XP-Bottle won´t get used!Enchantable Items:Chainmail ArmorIron and Diamond SwordsIron PickaxesMore modules!This is only one module of an entire series! Check out the others here:Autoplanting treesFirefliesNatural RegrowthSmokepuffsQuiversHelp me!Please report any bugs or errors to me so I can fix them! What do you want to see next? New Monster Suffocation Trap! Piston Map I finished a new mob trap that features pistons crushing monsters until they are killed. Unlike my other trap, this one requires a bit of explanation. It is a fast killer and does not accidently destroy drops, I think the only downside is wading against the water current. Anyways, here are the instructions: 1. Wait for optimal number of mobs spawned. 2. Pull the to crush monsters.3. wait until the sounds stop, then raise the roof. Repeat steps 1-3. When collecting, first lower the roof, wait until all mobs are killed, then place water on the brick block in the chamber, water will flood the area, disabling most of the mob spawners leaving only the pigmen spawner, who are neutral. Collect your items, then wade back to the doors, after being in the safe area, remove the water and quickly close the doors. This trap also comes with a small drowning piston trap for legit players. I also included an updated trap on the surface on my world save. The updated trap is also avalible as an mcedit schematic. Zombie, Redstone, Farm, Machine, Piston, New, Mob, Creeper

It has been parked in the world file for a while, but I had not remembered to upload the schematic.The idea was something that would look faster than an airship and could make use of the landing pad on the salvage yard. From what I have seen, the hardest thing to do well in Minecraft is to build small. Building big is relatively easy, particularly with McEdit and similar tools. The bigger challenge for me is to build detail on a small scale using a very limited set of blocks.This version is unarmed. The only mechanism is the hatch. Pass-Through Elevator Piston Map The elevator is 2W x 2L x 3H and the whole construct is 8W x 12L x 27H. There are two floors with a distance of seven blocks. It is of a pass-through design so it can be in the middle of a room and/or daisy-chained near multiple copies. Either side of each floor has a call button and an up or down button. The buttons are timed so the first piston doesn't trigger until after the button depresses, providing plenty of time to board the elevator.It's color-coded for easy customization: Glowstone are floor and ceiling of elevator, Light Blue Wool are floors, Cyan Wool are aesthetic walls and ceilings, Red Wool power pistons, Yellow Wool path buttons to beginning of piston chain, and Black Wool block undesirable redstone circuitry.I spent a lot of time tweaking blocks to fit all the buttons within my space constraints. My goal was to make it as compact as possible so it would fit well in the middle of a circular room.Additional Notesuse of SinglePlayerCommandstexture pack: DokuCraft_2.5_Light Piston, Elevator, 3x2x2, Passthrough

1 Wide Tile Table D Flip Flop Using Pistons! Redstone Device Map This is a D flip flop, and it is a one wide modular design (you can place another one right next to it) that is extremely compacted. If you're wondering what the hell a D flip flop is, its a simple circuit similar to an RS NOR latch. There is an input, which will not affect the output, but once the refresh button is hit, the output is "saved" to the current input.This is a great tool for constructing compact ram; however, the design is designed to be small not fast. If you would like to speed the ram up a bit, put an extra space in between each flip flop and replace the repeaters with wire. The extra gap will allow the wires to not interfere with each other. That version is less compact, but less repeaters means more speed. Have fun and enjoy! :) Redstone Device

4xAuto Cobblestone Generator w/o clock Redstone Device Map This is a Cobblestone generator. Actually it is 4 cobble stone generators in a very compact array. Connect the redstone leads to a clock and it becomes fully automatic.I have one of these on the survival server I play on and its quite popular.It uses sticky pistons to pull the new cobble block out of the generator, and then a piston to eject it upward. I prefer this method over pushing the new block out of the furnace with a piston because the sticky piston never prevents a new block from forming. Because it ejects the cobble up I typically build this 7 under the ground and use the ground as a 'harvesting platform'You could of course use pistons to route the output however you like. UTD "Android" 2-Directional Railway Station w/ Continue Minecart Map About The Union for Technological Development.Created by Blackberry PieWiring/tracks are orientation-dependent(but can be changed for any orientation needed). Included schematic should face NORTH when facing the front of the station. There is a signpost with the required orientation in the schematic.-----Functions:Two way station in which the cart comes to a stop, you can choose to continue(button press) or exit.If you exit the cart is returned to the cart dispenser.ANDYou may call a cart to go in either direction with a button press, hop in, then press the continue/go button to launch.Rider detection is not implemented because rational people should have no problems with station operation. iMine Other Map My first project! The iMine is a fully automated 32 TNT mining machine. It's most useful to start a mine with, and best if you edit one or two in when you start a new world. It's only one shot, but that's all you really need. The detonator is in the top room. Make sure that you dig at least a 3x3x3 hole at the bottom! I'm sure there are other machines like this, so I'm sorry if it seems like a copy of someone else's work. Please comment if you download to tell me your thoughts; I want to know what you think. Also, please let me know if you find any mistakes that you would like me to fix. Have fun!Additional NotesSURGEON GENERAL'S WARNING: TNT May Cause Explosions, Death, Loss Of Life, And Annihilation. Airship Fleet (Skyfish Mod 1) Air Structure Map The Modification 1 package for the Skyfish shuttle design came about several years after it had first been purchased in response to feedback obtained from many Skyfish pilots. Changes made included the installation of two side-mounted crew-operated bolt throwers and a pair of forward facing bolt thrower pods, improved structural design with significant metal reinforcements, a modified hull shape to increase manoeuvrability, cockpit design changes, increased cargo capacity to handle ammunition requirements and the addition of a three-point retractable landing gear system (although in some designs this was omitted due to its fragility).The cockpit's redesign prompted praise from the pilots of the Skyfish Mod 1, particularly in the increased viewing angles and new safety features. The dramatic increase in firepower has brought it into a frontline role, attacking ground troops and posing a severe threat to small airships.Additional NotesMany thanks to Khanaris for the original Mod 0 Skyfish. You can find a link to his work here, and to the original project itself here. In line with his tradition, no redstone workings can be seen from the outside or inside (although the pistons in the landing gear are bare, there was no way round that), and the texture pack used for the screenshots is Dokucraft Light. Air Structure, Airship, Shuttle, Khanaris

Lockable Door Redstone Device Map This is a door that I've been working on today. It has 2 switches, one on the outside that opens and closes the door, and one on the inside, which overrides the other switch. This means that if the indoor switch is on, the door stays closed, even if the outdoor switch says to open it. However, if the indoor switch is off, the outdoor switch will work properly. Hope you enjoy! Redstone Device

Nuclear Bombs Redstone Device Map I have been working on nuclear bombs in minecraft, and I am finally satisfied with the results. Just restart the clock on the machine, and press the button to get a bomb to use. It will be summoned at the top of the world, and will explode everything but non-explodables in a massive radius. Anything the blast touches will be instantly killed, and anything still living will be contaminated and poisoned to death. Just don't use it anywhere within 200 blocks of your house because it will be destroyed too. Contains some special effects that I think add a nice touch to the explosion. Block, Command, Redstone Device, Nuclear, Bomb, Explosion, Nuke

Ch'ŏnma-ho "Pegasus Tiger" 천마호 Main Battle Tank of the KPA 3D Art Map The Ch'ŏnma-ho or spelled as Chonma-ho (Chosŏn'gŭl: 천마호; Hanja: 天馬虎), which means Pegasus-Tiger, is one of North Korea's secretive indigenous main battle tank designs. The tank is also known by the name of 천리마 전차 (千里馬 or the "Chollima Tank"). The original Ch'ŏnma-ho is based on the Soviet T-62. There are at least five different operational versions of the Ch'ŏnma-ho. Since its inception, the Ch'ŏnma-ho has apparently undergone several extensive upgrades. Little public information is available about this tank, and its most recent public appearance was the 65th Anniversary Parade held in Pyongyang, North Korea, on 10 October 2010, celebrating the 65th anniversary of North Korea's ruling party. Block Effects Redstone Device Map Block EffectsHello! Today I have made a simple machine which will modify some blocks so that they will give you a certain level of a certain effect. You can different levels of the speed, jump boost, nausea, blindness, and slowness effects. For example, for speed, a light blue glass block would only give you Speed 1, but other blocks, such as clay, with the same color will give you the same effect but a different level. I included a chart to make it easy to see which blocks do what. Redstone Device

Type 59 Main Battle Tank of the People's Republic of Bangladesh. 3D Art Map The Type 59 (Chinese: 59式; pinyin: Wǔjiǔ shì; industrial designation: WZ-120) main battle tank is a Chinese-produced version of the Soviet T-54A tank, the earliest model of the ubiquitous T-54/55 series. The first vehicles were produced in 1958 and it was accepted into service in 1959, with serial production beginning in 1963. Over 10,000 of the tanks were produced by the time production ended in 1980 with approximately 5,500 serving with the Chinese armed forces. The tank formed the backbone of the Chinese People's Liberation Army until the early 2000s (decade) with an estimated 5,000 of the later Type 59-I and Type 59-II variants in service in 2002.The Type 59 was modified several times during its service with the replacement of the 100 mm Type 59 rifled gun with a 105 mm rifled gun. It was also the basis of several later Chinese tank designs including the Type 69 and Type 79 tanks. 3d Art, China, Type, Republic, Peoples, Bangladesh

Vanilla Mod: Outbreak Redstone Device Map Outbreak remains a challenge even for the most experienced players. With the need for water, exponential amounts of food, and most importantly caution, you are sure to perish quickly. Outbreak is a unique experience, bringing new features into the game using command blocks. Surviving isn't easy anymore, because a fast spreading disease is killing off animals across the world, and staying in one place just isn't safe. But the need for food and clean water creates a problem for players: stay and risk getting infected, or leave and quickly run out of supplies? Choose wisely, and of course, have fun playing!Import the schematic into your world, then press the button to start the game, and you will be supplied with info regarding the new features. Useful Mundane Potions! Redstone Device Map Here at Freelancer Labratories, we are always attempting to discover new and innovative technologies. We have developed a machine that allows all of your mundane potions to be put to good use!*Note* you can use the mundane potion by dropping it on the ground with Q, it affects only a small area just like any potion. No need to create a splash mundane potion!Some uses include:Instantly growing your crops. Pumpkin, Melon, Cocoa, Potatoes, Carrots, Wheat, even stuff like Ferms and Tall grass!Putting Fires out! this puts out fire within a small area, both mobs and blocks. However due to current technology we are not able to put Players out. At least you can save your sheep though!Automatically making farmland wet! If your like us, you know the feeling of planting your crops, setting up a farm, and forgetting to add water. Well you wont find that issue with mundane potions in hand now!Thank you for reading that. This project was suggested by a reddit user on r/Minecraft. If youd like to use the MCEdit Schematic, simply download, put the schematic into MCEdit, and place in any open spot in your world. Keep in mind that you will need to manually start the /fill clock, replace the sign that says "PUT REDSTONE BLOCK HERE" with a redstone block and you will be good, the clock must face in its original position so please do not attempt to flip it or rotate it in any way. Powerups- A Vanilla Minecraft Mod Redstone Device Map Welcome ladies and gentlemen! Today I will be introducing my first vanilla mod to y'all. A vanilla mod is a modification to Minecraft without any .class files or programming the game, usually done by command blocks. The total added lengths of the commands within the schematic box is over 3,000 characters. About the modThis mod adds, as seen in the title, Powerups! 10 of them! Its entirely operated by command blocks. 1. TrampolineTrampolines are made by putting one pressure plate on a slime block. They offer a jump boost effect when you stand on them, useful for elevators.2. Beacon CapacitorThese structures are quite expensive, requiring one redstone lamp below a beacon to be activated. Stand on them, and you get a resistance boost. 3. Lumber PlateIron pressure plates are now tree-chopping tools! These wonders can break your logs whenever you place 'em on a log, and stand on it. Not the most useful powerup, but still a useful one.4.Owl PadMade by putting a pressure plate on a redstone lamp, it grants night vision. Not for a long period but it works indefinitely! It is good for illuminating yourself during dark mining trips.5. Lava BathPut a lava bucket in a upward-facing dropper, and it grants you fire resistance! Especially useful for those dangerous nether expeditions.6. Scuba FormulaPut (in order) 1 Water Bottle, 1 Pufferfish and 1 Nether wart into an upward-facing dropper, and Bam! You can breath underwater.7. Edible StovePut a cake on top of a furnace, and you will have an instant saturation boost. This powerup fits perfectly into any type of kitchen furniture, and therefore serves as a "double function".8.Invisibility CloakStand in a banner above a upward piston, and bam! Invisibility! That's all to say.9. ObsidiMinerPlace a button on top of an obsidian block, and you can mine faster. yay more diamonds..---10. Care PackagePlace 1 upward-facing piston below a diamond block, and you get a dropper filled with goodies! Need we say more?!-Phew! It took me a long time to write all this, and a longer time doing all the commands! Hope you enjoy this creation, you're free to use this in any YouTube videos. Thanks for viewing, and goodbye for now! -Electrobyte from HeyQuadBlockers Redstone Device

Auto Chicken Farm w/ "Kill Half" Button Redstone Device Map Automatic Chicken Farm with a "Kill Half" Button. The chickens are stored in a two block space with hoppers under them and an automatic egg shooting system so they will increase in number infinitely. When the button is pushed, a piston will push the chickens in one block, dropping the chickens down to be killed by lava with a redstone system. There is a collection system for the feathers and cooked chicken.This build is relatively resource-friendly and can be done in survival (But of course, replace the iron and quartz blocks with cheaper blocks like cobble). In survival, trap a chicken or more in a 2 block space and start building from there, otherwise collect chicken eggs and leave your computer AFK for hours after a baby chicken is produced.Texture pack : DTIPackFeel free to modify it and repost it as long as you include the credit and changed some major parts yourself.Comments are welcome and diamonds are appreciated. Alchemy (Equivalent Exchange) in Vanilla Minecraft 1.8+! Redstone Device Map Alchemy in vanilla Minecraft!Create a transmutation circle, gather your resources, and get alchemizing! In order to gain something of a certain value, something of equal value must be produced. This is the first law of alchemy: Equivalant Exchange.Just throw your resources into the middle of your activated circle to add to your store of alchemy points! Then cycle through the resource selection to find your desired product and then look down and jump to alchemize it. Remember, bad things happen to those who try to alchemize more than what they have given. -- Point Values -- Coal - 1Iron - 8Gold - 16Diamond - 64Emerald - 16Redstone Block - 2Lapis Block - 18TNT - 102 Carrots - 12 Potatos - 164 Seeds - 4Blaze Rod - 8 (5 for return cost)Quartz Block - 2Please leave a diamond if you like this as it took me hours upon hours to make it! If you find this project uploaded on another website or from another user, please let me know!About PlaceableTrapsNeed a way to quickly kill many monsters at night? Need a way to protect your base from Creepers? Look no further than the Placeable Traps vanilla mod! You don't have to install any mods or plugins! Just place the box into a Minecraft 1.8 world and you can create traps anywhere in your world!How to UseUsing PlaceableTraps is simple! 1) Craft and place a block of gold. 2) Stand on the gold block to place your trap! 3) The trap will spawn harming potions to kill any monsters that get close! 4) To remove a trap, just punch the armor stand that spawns. Be warned! You won't get any gold back!RequirementsIn order to use Placeable Traps, you must have Minecraft 1.8 and MCEdit. Use MCEdit to paste the schematic into the spawn area of your world. Minecraft Luggage (Portable Chest) 1.8.x Redstone Device Map Hello! This is my first project. It is a redstone device that creates luggage aka, a chest that you can carry and teleport.Features:☀Luggage☀Ability to carry luggage.☀Ability to drop luggage.☀Ability to make a waypoint for luggage.☀Ability to teleport your luggage to a waypoint.How to Download & Install Schematics:1. Go to the MCedit homepage.Click here to get MCedit.2. Click MCEdit 1.0, located on the top bar of the website.3. After you click the button, you'll be directed to another page. Click one of the download buttons below the Windows icon. The download will start. Just wait til its finished.4. Once the download is finished, find your Downloads folder.5. When you're inside the Downloads folder, click the MCedit package.6. A window will appear. Click Extract.7. Once you click the Extract button, it will begin extracting its contents. When its done extracting, a folder will appear in the downloads section entitled "mcedit". Now go to the Documents folder.8. Click on the folder named "MCEdit". This folder is where player-made schematics, filters and brushes are kept. pictured below are the contents of the MCEdit folder.10. Download the schematic from a minecraft website.9. Drag your schematic file into the schematics folder.10. Go back to the downloads folder then click mcedit>mcedit.exe to run the program. The loading screen will appear.11. When it's finished loading, click "Quick Load" then click on any world to load it up.12. You are now in your world. Use the keys W,A,S and D to navigate your world. Press Right Click to look around.13. Press 6 to import a schematic. A window will popup. Click on the schematic you want to use.14. Place your schematic anywhere then click "Import". Don't forget to save it by pressing ctrl + s.15. EnjoyHow to Get Luggage:1. Place the schematic in your survival world.2. Load up your world.3. Enable luggage by pressing the button. (Note: You must make a dirt pillar to reach the button if you're in survival.)4. Get some supplies to make a minecart, a chest, a rail and an anvil. (Note: You can only have one luggage per world.)5. Craft a minecart chest then name it "Luggage" using the anvil.6. Place your luggage. (Note: When you place the luggage, you will automatically carry it.)How to Use Luggage:1. Use the "Drop" egg to drop the luggage. Use the "Pickup" egg to teleport the luggage to you.2. Use the "Sethome" egg to set a waypoint for your luggage. (Note: Only one waypoint can be set. Also, please don't kill the waypoint.)3. Use the "Sendhome" egg to teleport your luggage to the waypoint. (Note: You must drop the luggage before you send it home or else it will teleport back to you.)4. Use the "Removehome" egg to remove the waypoint. Minecart, Redstone, Chest, Storage, Redstone Device, Machine, Luggage

Assad Supporting Syrian Arab Army's Soviet PT-76 amphibious light tank ПТ-76, плавающий танк "Plawajuschtschi Tank" (Popular Project) 3D Art Map The PT-76 is a Soviet amphibious light tank which was introduced in the early 1950s and soon became the standard reconnaissance tank of the Soviet Army and the other Warsaw Pact armed forces. Overall, some 25 countries used the PT-76.The tank's full name is Floating Tank–76 (Плавающий Танк, Plavayushchiy Tank, or ПТ-76). 76 stands for the caliber of the main armament: the 76.2 mm D-56T series rifled tank gun.The PT-76 is used in the reconnaissance and fire-support roles. Naturally Spawning Custom Mobs - Minecraft Redstone Device Map Watch on youtubeMy youtube channelIt looks like many people want to know how to make custom mobs spawn naturally, at least I've seen a few topic on the Minecraft Forum where people wanted to know how to do that. So I decided to make a video about it. The contraption I built is mainly an example and it can be easily modified to spawn any custom mob you want. I have added three custom mobs. The first two custom mobs are easier to spawn, but the third one requires more command blocks because it needs a summon command instead of an entitydata one. That's because the third mob is actually a skeleton riding a cow, while the other two are not riding other mobs. The system consist in a timer giving points to each new mob. Then a randomizer activates a command block that tries to modify a mob with a low score, meaning that it was just spawned. With the skeleton that command block doesn't modify the mob, but it tags it so other command blocks can summon the new mob on its position and then kill the old mob. If you want to know more about this contraption, please watch the video and/or download the world save or the schematic file. Just remember to push the buttons to create the scoreboard objective if it's the first time you run this contraption in your world. IMPORTANT: You are allowed to use this particular design in your own projects, but remember to give credit to me and to make it clear that you are not the creator of this design. If you don't know how to give credit, leave a comment here or send me a message and I will answer. Redstone, Spawn, Block, Command, Redstone Device, Custom, Vanilla, Creation

LEOPARD 2A4 main battle tank Land Structure Map The most widespread version of the Leopard 2 family, the 2A4 models included more substantial changes, including an automated fire and explosion suppression system, an all-digital fire control system able to handle new ammunition types, and an improved turret with flat titanium/tungsten armour. The Leopard 2s were manufactured in eight batches between 1985 and 1992. All the older models were upgraded to 2A4 standard. Until 1994, Germany operated 2,125 2A4s (695 newly built and the rest modified older versions), while the Netherlands had an additional 445 tanks. The 2A4 was also license manufactured in Switzerland as the Panzer 87 "Leopard" or Pz 87. This version included Swiss-built 7.5 mm Mg 87 machine guns and communications equipment, and featured improved NBC protection system. Switzerland operated 380 Pz 87 tanks.After 2000, Germany and the Netherlands found themselves with large stocks of tanks that they had no need for after the Cold War. These tanks were sold to NATO or friendly armies around the world. Among these were Austria, who received 114 vehicles, Canada (107), Chile (140), Denmark (51), Finland (139), Greece (183), Norway (52), Poland (128), Portugal (37), Singapore (96), Spain (108), Sweden (160), and Turkey (354) were among the buyers of the surplus tanks.The Pz 87WE (WertErhaltung) is a planned Swiss modification and upgrade of the Pz 87. The modification significantly improves protection through the addition of the Leopard 2A6M's mine protection kit, thicker armour on the front glacis, and a turret equipped with a Swiss-developed armour package using titanium alloy. The turret roof armour is improved and the smoke grenade launchers redesigned. Further improvements enhance survivability and combat capability, such as a turret electric drive similar to the Leopard 2A5, a driver rear-view camera, an independent weapons station for the loader, and enhanced command and control systems. The fire control system is also upgraded, using the Carl Zeiss Optronics GmbH PERI-R17A2 fire control system. A remote weapons station containing a fully stabilized Mg 64 0.50 in (12.7 mm) machine gun is also fitted to the tank.The Pz 87-140 is an experimental variant of the Swiss Pz 87 with a 140 mm gun and additional armour, which was later used on the newer production variants.The Leopard 2A4CHL is the upgraded Chilean version of the Leopard 2A4 ordered by Chile in 2007. Upgrades include new electronics, sighting and information systems meant to elevate the Leopard 2A4's networking capability to be equal to that of the Leopard 2A6, a new suspension system and the upgrading of the tanks main gun to the L55 smoothbore cannon used on the Leopard 2A6. Other upgrades are remote weapon stations over the gunner and commander hatches fitted with the MG3 and HK GMG. The Leopard 2A4CHL also has improved roof and side turret armour and can be uplinked with Chile's battlefield control network.The Leopard 2A4M CAN is the upgraded Canadian version of the Leopard 2A4 acquired from the Royal Netherlands Army surplus. The Leopard 2A4M CAN is specially designed for the war in Afghanistan, based on experience gained by Leopard 2 operators. The first 20 were delivered in October 2010; of which just five were deployed to Afghanistan at the end of 2010 and operated until July 2011, when combat operations stopped. Though originally planned to be up-gunned to the L55 for consistency with the 2A6M CAN, the longer barreled guns (optimized for tank-vs-tank warfare) were found to be less than ideal in Afghanistan, therefore it was decided to retain the L44. In addition, only small areas of slat armour were added, in contrast with the fully caged 2A6M CANs. The protection of the Leopard 2A4M CAN has been further augmented by the addition of applique armour resembling that found on the most recent Leopard 2A7+ variant, but modified to fit the turret configuration of the 2A4. Of the remaining ex-Dutch Leopards, Canada will upgrade 13 for training use (9 A4's, 2 A4M's and 2 A6M's) and convert 18 to Armoured Engineering Vehicles (13 firm and 5 options). Canada has also purchased 15 2A4s from Germany as Logistic Stock Vehicles (for spare parts), and in February 2011 bought 12 2A4s/Pz 87 from the Swiss to be converted to "support vehicles" (likely Armoured Recovery Vehicles).The Leopard 2NG (Next Generation) is a privately funded Turkish upgrade by Aselsan that includes the application of modular composite armour (AMAP), upgraded optics, completely overhauled turret mechanics and a new fire control system on the work since 1995 and to be delivered by late 2011, which is intended to be used on the new Altay MBT. It was developed without an order of the Turkish Army, but might meet the requirements for the modernization of the Turkish Leopard 2A4s. The old powerpack and the L/44 gun barrel are kept, but the combat weight is increased to 65 tonnes. According to Turkish news sources, Finland is interested in getting the Turkish upgrade package to modernize their fleet of Leopard 2A4s. Land Structure

M939 WRECKER military truck Land Structure Map The M939 Truck is a5-ton 6×6 U.S. military heavy truck. Designed in the late 1970s toreplace the M809 series of trucks, it has been in service ever since.The M939 evolved into its own family of cargo trucks, prime movers,and recovery vehicles, with about 32,000 in all produced.U.S. Marine CorpsM923All models of theM939 share a common basic chassis, cab, and hood/fenders. The basictruck is a 6×6 (three axles, six wheels, all of which are powered)medium truck. Early M939s were rebuilds of M809 vehicle chassis by AMGeneral, with a new automatic transmission, cab, and hood/fender.Suffix –A2 are new production by Bowen-McLaughlin-York/BMY withlater model Cummins engine. The vehicles have a wide variety ofconfigurations and weights.Note that the motorand tire specifications, along with other improvements, apply to theA2 versions (and A1 versions) of each base model listed below. Thereis an M928, an M928A1, and M928A2.EngineThe M939 and M939A1models use a Cummins NHC 250 855 cu in (14.0 L) naturally aspirateddiesel engine, producing 240 hp (180 kW) at 2100rpm and 685 lbf·ft(929 N·m) at 1500rpm. This was the standard engine of the M809series. The M939A2 models use a newer and smaller Cummins 6CTA8.3 504cu in (8.3 L) turbocharged diesel engine producing 240 hp (180 kW) at2100 and 745 lbf·ft (1,010 N·m) at 1,500 rpm. All models have anAllison 5 speed automatic transmission with a two speed transfercase.[5][6]TiresThe M939 uses 11:00R20 tires with two tires per side per axle in the rear (rear tandemduals). The M939A1 and M939A2 series use oversized 14:00 R20 tiresand rear tandem singles. M939A2 series vehicles use a central tireinflation system (CTIS).WheelbasesThere are threewheelbases. The short, used for tractors and dumps, is 167 in (4,200mm) / 194 in (4,900 mm), the long ("standard"), used forcargo and wreckers, is 179 in (4,500 mm) / 206 in (5,200 mm), and theextra long, used for long cargo and expansible vans, is 215 in (5,500mm) / 242 in (6,100 mm). (Measurements are from the centerline of thefront axle to the centerline of rear bogie / rear axle). Land Structure, 3d Art

Personal Cloud 3D Art Map This is just a little cloud that will float over your head. In order for this to work you have to use a program such as MCedit to export a small machine with three command blocks in it that allow this cloud to float above your head. remember to me in minecraft 1.8+ if you want this cloud to work. you also need to go into the world you are planning to export this to and type in the following commands. /gamerule commandBlockOutput false/gamerule doTileDrops falseOnce you put put thoes commands into your world you can export the mechin in. to activate it break the redstone block in the middle of the machine then press Shift and place the redtone block back where the old one was. this will activate the machine and you should have a cloud floating above your head. Oh and one more thing this machine is kinda noisey so you probebly should not have it right next to your house. 3d Art

The Mongoose lacks weapons, but can carry a driver and a passenger. The passenger can fire their weapons, but they will not be able to zoom in.The Mongoose ULATV is one of the most maneuverable ground vehicles in the arsenal of the UNSC. It is a highly effective vehicle for reconnaissance and rapid transportation. The Mongoose is a difficult target due to its smaller size, but its high speed and light mass make vulnerable to crashes and flips at high speeds and over unstable terrain. To make matters worse, the design of the vehicle and its lack of armor leave both the driver and passenger completely exposed.The standard UNSC Marine Corps operating protocol in engagements against Covenant forces is to place a M41 Rocket Launcher-armed Marine in the passenger position to fire rockets against slow-moving hostile vehicles, while the driver uses the Mongoose's superior speed to evade enemy return fire. For quick and practical deployment, the Mongoose can be transported by Pelicans and Elephants.A modified version of the Mongoose, the M274-M Ultra-Light All-Terrain Vehicle, appears in Halo 2: Anniversary.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) UNSC Cyclops [1.8x+] Land Structure Map In-game version Description The HRUNTING Mark III Exoskeleton, also known as Cyclops, is a bipedal exoskeleton used by the UNSC Marine Corps during the early years of the Human-Covenant war. Based on Mark III Exoskeletons, the B variant was built for primarily non-combat military roles but has found uses in other, more unorthodox ways.After initially launching the Mark III line of exoskeletons in 2510, the Office of Naval Intelligence eventually scrapped plans for the armor and turned their efforts towards Project MJOLNIR. However in 2513the research team working at Weapons Research Facility T12A on Algolis, working on a separate project known as HRUNTING, evaluated the Mark III units and created the improved variant called "Cyclops."These one-man operated power suits, running off of a nuclear energy supply, could run for long periods doing menial tasks such as construction, transportation, terraforming and dock work. However, Cyclopes have been fielded in combat situations repairing damaged vehicles and, even more rarely, engaging in the destruction of enemy materiel and fortifications.Cyclopes served aboard the UNSC Spirit of Fire in 2531 and took part in engagements with the Covenant on multiple worlds. Parts of the Cyclops' technology would also be used by the Algolis group in the creation of a more advanced prototype armor known as HRUNTING/YGGDRASIL. (Credit for description: Halo Nation.) UNSC Mantis [1.8x+] Land Structure Map In-game version Description The HRUNTING/YGGDRASIL Mark IX Armor Defense System, also known as the Mantis, is an armored fighting vehicle. It appears in Halo 4's campaign, multiplayer, and in a few Spartan Ops missions. It was given the nickname Mantis because of its ability to ambush 18 heavily guarded Type-27 "Mantis" Anti-Aircraft Cannons during the Battle of Meridian on a legendary "Cherbourg Run." The Mantis is a powered exoskeleton armor defense system similar to the Cyclops. However, where as the Cyclops was designed only for labor and modified to function in combat, the Mantis was created specifically for combat as an evolution of an earlier model. It is equipped with several weapon and defense systems, including armor plating, energy shielding, two weapon pods on either side of the cockpit, and a stomp ability. The weapon pods typically contain a machine gun on the right pod and a five-shot rocket launcher on the left pod, but these can be replaced with other weapons.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) UNSC Scorpion [1.8x+] Land Structure Map In-game versionDescriptionThe M808 Main Battle Tank, commonly known as the Scorpion, is the most common armored fighting vehicle employed by the UNSC during the Human-Covenant war. It is used in operations requiring heavy firepower or an anti-vehicular platform. Combining firepower, resilience, and mobility, the Scorpion has proven itself formidable and earned the respect of friend and foe alike.The M808 model of Scorpion tanks first entered service in 2218 and has not changed much over its service.The Scorpion may not be the most powerful or the fastest of the UNSC's fleet of main battle tanks, but for the most part, it represents the best possible balance between mobility and firepower. Indeed, the vehicle's prominence among the UNSC armed forces is due to its low production cost, transportability, and overall firepower. Ceramic-Titanium armoring makes it almost invulnerable to small-arms fire and easily shrugs off normal ballistic and plasma weapons, while anti-mine software and electronics provide additional protection. The Scorpion has a range of 750 kilometers and utilizes a four-track design, each mounted on an independent, computer-controlled suspension system, which allow for deft maneuvering around large debris and other battlefield obstacles. The tank also features a small crew size, one operator and one machine gunner. While important material and VIPs can be crammed into the main cabin, up to four soldiers can safely be transported on the tread pods, though the use of these "jumpseats" is normally reserved for emergencies.The Scorpion's main weapon, mounted on a 360° rotating turret, is theM512 Smooth Bore High Velocity Cannon, which fires a 90mm tungsten shell, including S1 Canister Shells. Though this weapon can have difficulty penetrating the armor of some heavy vehicles, it is capable of disintegrating most targets in a single shot or gutting a Wraith in two to three, depending on where the shots hit relative to the target's hull. For additional offensive power, some Scorpions will instead mount a 105mm cannon. The M247T Medium Machine Gun serves as the tank's secondary weapon, delivering 7.62mm armor-piercing rounds with speed and thoroughness. It is mounted on a separate pintle-mount depending on the model.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Features1) Accurate, scaled and detailed replica. 2) Uses Aeon Ressource Pack by thesparko, and its patch by EzerArch. UNSC Grizzly [1.8x+] Land Structure Map In-game versionDescription The M850 Main Battle Tank, commonly known as theGrizzly, is a heavily armored UNSC tank developed bySergeant John Forge. It is similar to its older brother theM808B Main Battle Tank but much larger and far more powerful.The Grizzly is protected by thick armor plating which allows it to survive even the fiercest attacks and features dual M310 120mm Smooth-Bore High-Velocity Cannons mounted in its turret. These cannons can easily punch a hole through almost any Covenant vehicle and fire S1 canister shells to decimate infantry formations. A co-axially mounted M247T Medium Machine Gun gives it additional firepower.Smoke grenades were mounted near the turret.The Grizzly first entered service in 2509. Grizzlies were used to great effect during the Liberation of Harvest, and the UNSCSpirit of Fire contained a robust inventory of M850s during theextraordinary events of 2531. After the war, the 23rd Armored Cavalry was outfitted with a complement of M850s in addition to their primary force of M808s. The Grizzly tanks were used by the UNSC Army at the Battle of Draetheus V against the Covenant Remnant.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) UNSC Rhino [1.8x+] Land Structure Map In-game version Description The M-145D Mobile Artillery Assault Platform (MAAP), commonly known as the Rhino, is a UNSC artillery tank. Using a prototype plasma cannon, it represented the first successful attempt by the UNSC to introduce a reverse-engineered technology from the Covenant Empire. In the Human-Covenant war the Rhino saw limited service but gave an excellent showing of itself during engagements with the Covenant. Information gathered from them used to further along other projects. However, due to lack of resources for development of the original prototype line, there were not that many remaining by the end of the war.During the Battle of Arcadia in 2531, UNSC Pillar of Autumn was equipped with at least five Rhino prototypes for field-testing. Captain James Cutter of UNSC Spirit of Fire requested for and made use of the Rhinos to knock out a massive Covenant Energy Shield which defended an area of the planet's surface. In the follow-up investigation of the area a pair of Rhinos were destroyed in a confrontation with an incomplete Super Scarab.As conditions have improved for looking at older prototypes, the UNSC has begun to look towards use of the Rhino again, which is supported by one of the top procurement officers in the UNSC, Isaac Richardson.The centerpiece of the Rhino is its experimental 320mm main cannon codenamed "Zeus." Based on technology recovered following the Liberation of Harvest, the cannon harnesses and directs plasma energy in a manner similar to other Plasma weaponry. However in order to fire its Zeus cannon the Rhino must be engaged in lockdown mode, rendering the vehicle immobile. It is for this reason that the Rhino features an unorthodox orientation for its six tread tracks and is much wider than the Scorpion or even Grizzly tanks.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Features 1) Accurate, scaled and detailed replica. 2) Uses Aeon Ressource Pack by thesparko, and its patch by EzerArch. W12 "Lincoln" Tank (Realistic Tank) Other Map Hey guys! I wanted a tank to use on some of my worlds. So I made this one. I got a lot of good ideas by looking though the other projects. I'd like to thank the whole community! Anyways, I based this tank of an M1 Abrahms. I made it as realistic as possible, but I had to make some compromises becasue it's Minecraft lol. The seat in the rear (or the middle) is the "Tank Commanders" seat. The seat on the right is the gunner's seat. And the seat on the left is were the driver sits. In real life the driver doesn't sit in the turrent. I spent about 30 minutes trying to find a way to get a drivers seat in the middle of the hull. I gave up, got rid of the loader, removed the inner magazene door (gave the tank an autoloader), and put the driver in the loaders seat. Also, in the pictures there are some items from mods. Don't worry about that, in the download the tank is 100% vanilla. If you like what I've done with the mods, feel free to add the extra stuff yourself.
