CHALLENGER 2 main battle tank Land Structure Map The FV4034 Challenger 2 is a British main battle tank (MBT) in service with the armies of the United Kingdom and Oman. It was designed and built by the British company Vickers Defence Systems (now known as BAE Systems Land & Armaments).[5]The Challenger 2 replaced the Challenger 1 in service with the British Army and is also used by the Royal Army of Oman. Vickers Defence Systems began to develop a successor to Challenger 1 as a private venture in 1986. A £90 million deal for a demonstrator vehicle was finalised in January 1989. In June 1991, the Ministry of Defense placed a £520 million order for 140 vehicles, with a further 268 ordered in 1994. Production began in 1993 and the unit's tanks were delivered in July 1994. The tank entered service with the British Army in 1998, with the last delivered in 2002. It is expected to remain in service until 2035. Oman ordered 18 Challenger 2s in 1993 and a further 20 tanks in November 1997.The Challenger 2 is an extensive redesign of the Challenger 1. Although the hull and automotive components seem similar, they are of a newer design and build than those of the Challenger 1 and fewer than 5% of components are interchangeable.[6] The tank's drive system provides a 550 km range, with a maximum road speed of 59 km/h. It has a four-man crew.The Challenger 2 is equipped with a 120-millimetre (4.7 in) 55-calibre long L30A1 tank gun,[7] the successor to the L11 gun used on the Chieftain and Challenger 1. Uniquely among NATO main battle tank armament, the L30A1 is rifled, because the British Army continues to place a premium on the use of high explosive squash head (HESH) rounds in addition to armour-piercing fin-stabilized discarding-sabotarmour-piercing rounds. The Challenger 2 is also armed with a L94A1 EX-34 7.62 mm chain gun and a 7.62 mm L37A2 (GPMG) machine gun. Forty nine main armament rounds and 4,200 rounds of 7.62 mm ammunition are carried.In 2006, the Challenger 2 was considered to be one of the best protected tanks in the world.[8] The turret and hull are protected with second generation Chobham armour (also known as Dorchester). However, in Iraq that year, the front underside hull armour of a Challenger 2 was defeated by an RPG-29 despite being augmented with an ERA package.[9][10]It has seen operational service in Bosnia, Kosovo and Iraq.HistoryChallenger 2 Tank of the Royal Scots Dragoon Guards (Squadron D) during live fire training exercises on Bergen-Hohne Training Area (Germany)The Challenger 2 is the third vehicle of this name, the first being the A30 Challenger, a Second World War design using the Cromwell tankchassis with a 17-pounder gun. The second was the Persian Gulf War era Challenger 1, which was the British army's main battle tank (MBT) from the early 1980s to the mid-1990s.Vickers Defence Systems began to develop a successor to Challenger 1 as a private venture in 1986. Following the issue of a Staff Requirement for a next-generation tank, Vickers formally submitted its plans for Challenger 2 to the Ministry of Defence (MoD). Secretary of State for Defence George Younger announced to the House of Commons that Vickers would receive a £90 million contract for a demonstrator vehicle, a deal that was finalised in January 1989.[11] The demonstration phase contained three milestones for progress, with dates of September 1989, March 1990, and September 1990. At the last of these milestones, Vickers was to have met 11 key criteria for the tank's design.[11]In June 1991, after competition with other tank manufacturers' designs (including the M1A2 Abrams and the Leopard 2 (Improved)), the MoD placed a £520 million order for 127 MBTs and 13 driver training vehicles. An order for a further 259 tanks and 9 driver trainers (worth £800 million) was placed in 1994. Oman ordered 18 Challenger 2s in 1993 and a further 20 tanks in November 1997.Production began in 1993 at two primary sites: Elswick, Tyne and Wear and Barnbow,Leeds, although over 250 subcontractors were involved. The first tanks were delivered in July 1994.The Challenger 2 successfully completed its Reliability Growth Trial in 1994. Three vehicles were tested for 285 simulated battlefield days. Each day consisted of:27 km (17 mi) of on-road travel33 km (21 mi) of off-road travel34 main armament rounds fired1,000 7.62 MG rounds fired16 hours weapon system operation10 hours main engine idling3.5 hours main engine runningAn equally important milestone was the In-Service Reliability Demonstration (ISRD) in 1999. 12 fully crewed tanks were tested at the Bovington test tracks and at Lulworth Bindon ranges. The tank exceeded all staff requirements.The Challenger 2 entered service with the British Army in 1998 (with the 2nd Royal Tank Regiment in Germany), with the last delivered in 2002. It is expected to remain in service until 2035. It serves with the Queen's Royal Hussars, the King's Royal Hussars and the Royal Tank Regiment, each of which is the tank Regiment of an Armoured Infantry Brigade. Under Army 2020, only three Challenger 2 Tank Regiments will remain: the Queen's Royal Hussars, the King's Royal Hussars and the Royal Tank Regiment; in addition, a single Army Reserve regiment, The Royal Wessex Yeomanry, will provide Armoured Resilience.Deliveries of the Challenger 2 to Oman were completed in 2001.The Trojan minefield breaching vehicle and the Titan bridge-laying vehicle based on the chassis of the Challenger 2 were shown in November 2006; 66 are to be supplied by BAE Systems to the Royal Engineers, at a cost of £250 million.[12]A British military document from 2001 indicated that the British Army would not procure a replacement for the Challenger 2 because of a lack of foreseeable conventional threats in the future.[13] Land Structure

Command | RPG-fying Box Other Map Wanna add a RPG flavour to your Minecraft game ?This command is for you !And yes, this is only one command, you just have to select it and paste it in a command block and power it with redstone!With this command, you can completely change your experience of the game.I highly recommend you to use this on a new world as you can't access to everything if you don't have the appropriated level (especially Nether and diamond tools)* What does this command do ?When the box is active, some mechanics are slightly modified..New Life Regeneration System: You can't regenerate your life when you're fighting. When you're not fighting, your life will be instantly regenerated (60 seconds after the last hit you took)New Leveling system: Bake cake, kill monsters, trade with villager and more to get experience and levels. With each level, you also get a little bonusMob Scalling System: Mobs are scaled on your level: the higher you are, the harder mobs will be.* List of upgrades par levelLevel 1 : Ability to use Iron tools and swordsLevel 2 : HP IncreasedLevel 3 : Faster life regeneration, Ability to enter the NetherLevel 4 : Ability to use Diamond tools and swordsLevel 5 to 8: HP IncreasedLevel 5 : Ability to enter the EndLevel 9 : Faster life regenerationLevel 10 : All damage reduced by 20%See the commandThis command has been made for Minecraft 1.8. It does work on Single player and MultiplayerIf you're experiencing heavy lag when using it, try to remove the box and replace it again in another place (few blocks away should be fine) Rpg, Minecraft, Command, Redstone Device, Onecommand, Box, Mlakuss

UNSC Elephant [1.8x+] [Interior] Land Structure Map In-game version Description The M312 Heavy Recovery Vehicle, sometimes referred to as the Behemoth-class Troop Transport and commonly known as the Elephant, is a heavy UNSC Marine Corps Mobile Assault, Support, and Recovery Platform. It appears exclusively in Halo 3's multiplayer map Sandtrap, as a civilian variant in Halo 3: ODST and as a unit in Halo Wars. The Elephant is a mobile command base and repair vehicle and is able to pull an entire Shaw-Fujikawa Translight Engine by itself. It is armed with a forward M41 LAAG on the top right and a AIE-486H Heavy Machine Gunon the mid left. It is a three-level vehicle with the bottom level, the respawn locale that opens out into the rear cargo tray, the second level, a walkway around the cargo ramp and leads onto the driver's cabin, then a small elevated third level where the M41 LAAG is assembled. It features a crane, numerous firing ports and elevated positions for defending it. It has four tracks set up on each side of the chassis. Its chassis is as high as they are wide, providing stability. The Elephant can house a Mongoose in its lower bay, and can hold up to an additional three Mongooses in the front with two in the back with two Warthogs.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Features 1) Full interior. 2) Accurate, scaled and detailed replica. 3) Enough room in the vehicle bay to fit smaller vehicles of my own, and cargo. 4) Uses Aeon Ressource Pack by thesparko, and its patch by EzerArch. .SharingPlease give appropriate credit if you want to use this vehicle in a project that you will post. :) Land Structure, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Unsc, Elephant, M312

Better Multiplayer Sleeping Redstone Device Map Made at the request of one of my viewers, here is a command block system that lets you set a percentage of players on a server. When more than that percentage of everyone is in bed, time gets set to daytime.To use it, download the schematic file or paste the one command into a command block. Then hit the start button. You then need to set the percentage you want with this command:/scoreboard players set Percentage Sleep so for instance "/scoreboard players set Percentage Sleep 50" will make 50% of the server have to sleep for the night to be skipped.When a player gets in bed, a friendly message is displayed in the chat telling players how many more are needed for the night to be skipped. Steve's Nightmare Suite - The Dark Lord Cometh Complex Map Hello there, ladies and gentlemen. Gray Remnant here. Today, I’m submitting my first contest entry, and it’s for the Penthouse Sweet competition here on PMC. Now, your first question is probably something along the lines of “Gray, what the hell have you done?!?” That is a very pertinent question, and it has a straightforward answer. I’ve built Steve’s Nightmare Suite.You see, I was thinking about taking the obvious route and building Steve a glorious, posh penthouse suite fit for a king. But then I thought “why do that, when I can just create a chaotic scene of death and destruction?” So, instead of building Steve’s dream suite, I built the exact opposite: his nightmare suite.Why? Because, impossible as it is to imagine, I’m a somewhat twisted person with a very dark turn of mind. Which brings us to your probable second question: “What the hell is this?” With that question in mind, I think now would be a good time for you to read the background lore. Go for it! :DDid you enjoy it? What? You’re mad that I killed off Steve? Pfft, The Walking Dead does crap like that all the time and nobody seems to give a damn. Oh, and by the way, I’d like to dedicate the lore to my good friend, Horwitz1011. Though, he is ten times more evil than the ‘Dr. Horwitz’ depicted in that story. It’s true.So, let’s talk about what this build is exactly. This is the aftermath of a dark ritual that summoned a pandemonic demigod into our world. He is a primeval entity, who shan't be named, and he has sharp teeth, slimy skin, and four long, clubbed tentacles. The immediate effect of the dark lord’s arrival was the destruction of most of the suite, sandstorms that’ve caused a build-up of soul sand on the windows, and the presence of some endoplasmic goo from another dimension (because that always seems to happen in the movies).The process of building this was not dissimilar from the process I underwent to build the Temple of Oum Parkour Course. The process goes something like this:Step 1 - Build a nice, lavish structure with lots of shiny, luxurious interior work.Step 2 - Embrace the dark side, go crazy, and break everything!Step 3 - Add cracked stone brick, cobwebs, hanging moss, vines, iron bars, and cobblestone.Step 4 - Render to perfection.The only difference is that this time I also added a monstrous, inter-dimensional deity. Yes, because Steve’s nightmare wouldn’t be complete without that.Anyway, I’ll stop rambling so you guys can enjoy the build. Be sure to set the time to night, because it's meant to be dark and gloomy (/time set 15000). Thank you very much for your time. I hope you enjoyed my extremely unconventional take on this contest, and I hope it surprised you. If it didn’t, I’ll just have to try harder next time.Don’t forget to toss a few diamonds my way. I’ll see you guys next time when, hopefully, I’ll show you guys something a bit more uplifting and happy than this utterly depressing scene of death and destruction.-Gray Remnant Complex, Lord, Steve, Nightmare, Dark, Contest, Apocalypse, Destruction

Ice Delicacy Module - Vanilla Redstone Device Map This small module I made allows ice to break when you land on it from 2.5 or more blocks high. The player will still take fall damage. This only works in survival and adventure gamemodes. Only normal ice is affected by this module, so glass and packed ice will remain solid.Remember to turn your command block output off (/gamerule CommandBlockOutput false)One Command Module (paste the command into a command block) : http://pastebin.com/AwFZR5qYYou might have to reset the redstone block clocks after the module has spawned. To do so, locate any red wool block or redstone block, break it and replace it by a redstone block.This module has been updated and is now part of the Advanced Delicacy Module.The command was created using gentlegiantJGC's mcedit filter(http://www.mediafire.com/view/zy2bkckvb9jk5ww/one-command_structure_spawner_2_0.py)Enjoy :) Redstone, Block, Command, Redstone Device, Ice, Module, Break, Delicacy

[Redstone Device] Weapon Reforger by GerganaGZ - change your weapon's enchantments! Redstone Device Map Hey guys! This is another redstone contraption, by me! Early I want to make it one command, but the character limit sucks... So this redstone system you need to import it with MCEdit. So I will try again to make this system one command, but with more limits. TIP: If you are on slow computer, and use this for example on survival world, teleport faar, faar away from you survival cut, with MCEdit place the redstone system in that faar, faar away location, and then when you are back on Minecraft, simply over the system, after you started it, type /setworldspawn , so it will works everywhere!I hope you enjoy it! If someone can make a video for this, I'll be sooo much glad! Make sure if you like it, to give a diamond on it, and of course - have fun!First, how do I import this redstone system?First of all, you need to know how to import it, so if you know, just skip to "What makes this redstone system?" spoiler.1. Download MCEdit & the schematic for the redstone system2. Open it, if you're opening the program for first time, you need to wait!3. Click on "Quick Load" and them from it choose your world4. Now you see the buttons in the centre bottom (like the minecraft gui, but different), then choose the button "Import", after this choose from your computer the schematic file, that you download from this post, and click OK, or Save, whatever...5. You'll see now a green colored box - this is the redstone system, if you want to place it, choose a place and click with the Left Button of your mouse to the location and click "Import"6. Now you can quit, just click esc, click "Quit" and after that click the blue button "Save and Quit"Picture:What makes this redstone system?This redstone system specially is a system for a Reforger, that his name is Sord. He can reforge your diamond/iron sword or bow /change or give your sword's enchantments/. It didn't take levels or something, just drop a sword (it doesn't matter if is enchanted or not, he will give you new, or just delete it) to him and your weapon will be reforged. It works only with Iron Swords, Diamond Swords, and Bows. The enchantments are fully random and for the swords have more than 20 combinations, and for the bow - more than 15.It's 1/5 chance that Sord won't give your weapon after you reforge it (because it was breaked while reforging). And it's 1/4 chance to give you two same swords/bows, because while reforging, they are sliced at two.Sord is a custom villager, so you can trade with him for diamonds, emeralds and stronger swords and bows.Also Sord can walk:And also you can have bad luck at trading..How to use it?When you import the system to your world, just simply find the signs and click the button to start the machine.To summon Sord, simply place an armor stand, and drop to it:1x Diamond Block1x Emerald Block1x Gold BlockAnd then he will be summoned and for gift, he will gave you 3 to 13 same swords, that you can reforge. Ignore, while he is spawning, because it gives you a lot of swords, in that way he is choosing what to give to you. But rarely he won't gives you swords. To kill him, if you kill his "body" (the armor stand), you will see his particles, so aim at them. If you want to be sure, that you killed all the Sord entities, just click the start button again.This system works in singleplayer, and in multiplayer as well. But don't import it to Spigot/Bukkit server, it may not work!Also spawn only one time Sord, because if you spawn more than 1, it may have a lot of bugs with the reforge thing. Minecraft, Redstone Device, Vanilla, Reforger, Sord

UNSC Albatross [1.8x] [Interiror] Air Structure Map In-game versionDescriptionThe D96-TCE Albatross, formally known as the Dropship 96 - Troop Carrier, Equipment, is a heavy-lift dropship used by the United Nations Space Command. It was developed and produced by Ushuaia Armory.The D96-TCE Albatross has been in service since at least 2517. It is a vital part of the UNSC's logistical operations, capable of deploying personnel, vehicles, weapons, and supplies deep behind enemy lines. It serves as both an atmospheric and exoatmospheric craft capable of delivering troops and supplies wherever needed once a landing zone has been secured. Although the Albatross typically possesses no armament, its nimble maneuverability and heavily armored, expansive cargo bay allow it to transport troops, weapons, vehicles, and other supplies safely.The Albatross cargo bay is capable of transporting multiple vehicles and other heavy weapons at a time. Once it has landed, it lowers three metal ramps holding the bay, allowing its cargo to be unloaded. Once landed, the Albatross can be used as a makeshift base, indicating that it may also serve as a mobile field command post for the UNSC.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Features1) Full interior. 2) Accurate, scaled and detailed replica. 3) Enough room in the vehicle bay to fit smaller vehicles of my own, and cargo. 4) Uses Aeon Ressource Pack by thesparko, and its patch by EzerArch.Sharing Please give appropriate credit if you want to use this vehicle in a project that you will post. :) Air Structure, Aircraft, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Unsc, Albatross, D96

Graves Redstone Device Map I've remade Graves from the OpenBlocks mod in Vanilla Minecraft. When you die, instead of your items going all over the place and potentially burning or despawning, they get stashed into a Grave. When you come back and break the grave block, you get your items back. This is an amazing block that really should be a part of Minecraft - having to trek back is punishing enough without your items despawning.This is a command block invention for Vanilla Minecraft 1.8.*, and you can get it either by downloading an MCEdit schematic file or by pasting one command into a command block.Once you have the device in your world, press the button under the "Install" sign, and you should start getting graves when you die.I haven't tested it very thoroughly for different cases, especially multiplayer. It should work, but YMMV.To download the "one command" version, click here. Block, Command, Redstone Device, Grave, Openblocks

Minecraft | RE Survival Map (Schematic) | Random Effect Survival Other Map Update Log (Previous Updates) - click to revealUpdate v1.2-Fixed Bugs-Removed instructions to do because MC Edit loads entities to-Added Time Reseter and Random Effecter for examples to see what happens-Added way to set the worldspawn easilyWhat does the Random Effecter and Time Reseter do?The Random Effecter shows what happens every 30 seconds, it gives you a random effect and resets the time. The Time Reseter does what it's name implies, it just resets the countdown for the 30 seconds. Also the worldspawn setter is at the center, when you press the button it sets the worldspawn at the armor stand in the center, removes it, then removes the worldspawn setting structure for any inconviences._________________________________________________________________________________________________________Update v1.3-Fixed World Spawn Setter-Added Redstone Updater_________________________________________________________________________________________________________Update v1.4-Multi-Player Friendly-Added Particles to Effects-Added Sounds to Effects_________________________________________________________________________________________________________Update v1.5-Completely Fixed World Spawn Setter-Hopefully Last Version of Schematic-Update 1.6 coming with Premade Map with Custom Dungeons and AchievmentsUpdate v1.6-Added Main Map-Main Map Includes Portal Sheep-Leave feedback and suggestions to add to the map for future updates___________________________________________________________________________________________________________How do I install the Map?First you download MC Edit on: http://www.mcedit.net/downloads.htmlThe Website should show download links, once you download it, you can import is easily when you find it in your downloads, now when you open MC Edit, you select the world you want to by selecting Quick Load. It then, loads you world, then at your hotbar lookin option, you hover over all of them until you find Import, also quick tip when you need to select where to look toggle with right click. When you import it find it in your Downloads or wherever you put the schematic, then select where you want to put it. Once you've done that, you go into minecraft, press the Worldspawn setter, and start your adventure with the yellow stained glassWhat is RE Survival?RE Survival will be a Survival Map Schematic that you can import to most Survival Worlds that will be multi-player friendly if I can get enough people to let me know that they want it to be multi-player friendly.What's so great about RE Survival?RE Survival is a survival gamemode (obviously) where every 30 seconds the map will give you a random potion effect.The Effects It will give are:-Speed-Slowness-Haste-Mining Fatigue-Strength-Instant Health-Jump Boost-Nausea-Regeneration-Resistance-Fire Resistance-Water Breathing-Invisibility-Blindness-Night Vision-Hunger-Poison-Weakness-Wither-Health Boost-Absorption-SaturationHow do I start the map?As it shows in the map, you break the yellow glass block to start the map, then you break the red glass that falls from a structure that spawns when you break the yellow glass. When you break the red glass, you will recieve Jumper Boots that allows you to jump from your spawn safely.Rules-Do not switch gamemodes-Keep Inventory is allowed-If you are posting this on youtube, give me credit for the map by posting this link in the description.-Once this becomes multi-player friendly, teleporting will be allowed.Ask any more questions you have in the comments. CMS - Hopper (Combat Mech Suit) Other Map COMBAT MECH SUIT - HOPPER"Left leg actuator took a critical hit, left leg destroyed. I'm fine, I can still fight!"-1st Lieutenant Connors, 28th CMS Company DesignWith the dense AA (Anti-Air) defense network and the rather savage and suicidal nature of Starkan fighter pilots, aerial reconnaissance during the Starkan campaign was deemed suicidal. As such, the Coalition developed the CMS – Hopper. The Hopper is based around the CMS – Pillar’s frame design, which made production and maintenance fairly easier. The main purpose for this new unit is high mobility and low altitude reconnaissance, meant as replacements (at least, temporarily) for aerial reconnaissance. The Hoppers are equipped with a dual light fusion engine on its rear torso, which are also found on aircraft for enhanced speed and mobility. This also gave the Hoppers the ability to overcome gravity, giving it a good all-weather and all-terrain mobility compared to regular ground based vehicles and the Pillar. Although, compared to the Pillar, the Hopper is lightly armored, but smaller and with the addition of the fusion engines, this also made it a rather challenging target to hit.WeaponsTo keep the Hoppers as light weight as possible, its armament and firepower are significantly reduced compared to the Pillar. The Hoppers are only equipped with a dual incendiary cannons, each mounted on arm units for an enhanced field of fire. (The M61 would be a close real life equivalent of this weapn) The ammunition for the cannons are also stored inside the arms, to prevent damage spreading to the torso if ammo explosion were to occur. These arms are also high mounted, which allows the Mech to return fire behind cover while minimizing exposure. When used properly, these arms are also used as shields to mitigate damage from the main unit and into the arms. Furthermore, should the arms become severely damaged in which it would cause damage to the main unit through internal fire or otherwise, these arms can be jettisoned to prevent damage.Notable BattlesThe Raid on Torus Valley – The 28th CMS Company was tasked to raid an enemy weapons facility on Torus Valley. Due to the terrain, the Hoppers were able to sneak in behind enemy defenses. The destruction of the facility came in a rather small price. 8 Units were lightly damaged, 3 Hoppers were significantly damaged, and one Hopper was reported to have lost a leg after being shot by a sabot in the left leg's actuator. Surprisingly, the Mech was able to “limp” back home by using their jump jets. The Pursuit of the “Golden Harmonica” – After research and weapons testing facility – codename “The Golden Nest” was raided by Starkan forces, the prototype CMS – Harmony was seized from the coalition. The 6th CMS Battalion was immediately deployed to pursue the enemy transports and were tasked to retrieve or destroy the prototype. Although having lost 5 units with some units getting significantly damaged in the process, due to the mobility of the Hoppers, it took no more than an hour to retrieve the prototype back.Future DevelopmentsFurther enhancing on what the Hoppers specialized, the development of Combat Mech Suit – Harmony begun. This time, the Harmony is designed to be a cross between aircraft and Combat Mech SuitsInspirationMy main two inspirations for this design are the Terran Viking and the Clan ShadowcatNote: I built this like about a month ago, I hesitated on posting projects since the last time I tried uploading this, PMC did that offline thing and I pretty much lost all the typed up stuff I did. It got me rather... annoyed

Programmable BLAST MINER DRONES in Vanilla! [Command Block Creation] Redstone Device Map Ever wanted to build something that would automate mining and other simple tasks in vanilla? Well this module does exactly that while giving you the freedom to invent and choose how you use it! Hope you enjoy!Blast Miner Features:- Programmed by placement of redstone torch in inventory- Can set direction and it will mine till it reaches the edge of loaded chunks and collect the blocks it mines- Uses 2 levels of explosions separated by a small delay to increase mining efficiency of softer blocks then stone- As a hopper unit you can set a filter to program what items it will pick up- Has invulnerability and gives the items it drops invulnerability to explosions so they cannot be destroyed- Will stop when it senses lava, water, or a drop in its path- Can be put in passive mode and used on rails or in a stationary position as a block mining unit in machines and farms- Unit can be decrafted by placing an iron pickaxe in the first slot (not mentioned in video I forgot)- I purposely put this module on a slow clock to optimize performance for servers and low-end computersMap Download: http://bit.ly/1K6Yu5uMCEdit Schematic for Module: http://bit.ly/1RyfqsvWe run a gamemode 4 group server. My vision for this module was a new mechanic that the different builders and youtubers there could use to invent with in their builds in survival mode. This module allows for the creation of systems that were previously only possible with mods like industrialcraft and allows a lot of creative freedom for building new redstone designs in survival mode. Many new things are possible with it installed!I could of made it more complex and given more specific functionality, and I may in the future, but keeping it simple is sometimes more fun for users as it allows them to build with it and invent their own machines! At the end of the video I show 3 simple examples of automated machines I was able to invent using the miners in just about an hour. A whole lot more is possible! Please comment or post a video if you invent something cool with them! This module is optimized for use on a server and on low-end computers. You can always put these things on faster clocks with smaller motion increments to make it look smoother, but that doesn't add anything to their usefulness so I chose to put it on a slower clock. Also the timings and item collection will not work properly unless you have some delay in the system. Keep this in mind if you download and tinker with the system. This is the first installment in a new series I'm launching called the "Binary Bros" a series with myself and samuelInca that focuses on useful vanilla modules that can be installed into survival mode to enhance the game experience. We will probably not be doing any modules that just add cosmetic details like boss fights but instead focus on things that give you more cool tool to build with in survival mode. To Install:- Navigate to the video link and download either the world file I used in the video or the MCEdit schematic I exported- If you use the MCEdit schematic simply install it in the spawnchunks somewhere- Press the button to initialize the scoreboard objectives. - The units should now be creatable anywhere in the overworld! Let me know if you have any issues or suggestions!There are many ways this module can be extended in the future! Let me know what you think of these ideas:1. Controlling the motion with a renamed redstone torch in 1st slot rather than different slots.2. recognizing certain blocks to stop on or change motion direction when the module passes over it allowing you to program motion circuits for the unit while you are away3. Making it instead of taking a lot of TNT in the crafting recipe use up TNT placed in it slowly over timeAll these are easily doable with a few changes, but we found this first design easier to use on our server. Redstone Device

Functional Jet Packs for Minecraft 1.9 Snapshots Redstone Device Map NOTE: This requires at least 15w31a.This device adds jet packs to vanilla Minecraft. Jet packs can be used to fly in Survival mode (as well as Adventure mode and Creative mode). To use a jet pack, hold it in your main hand and jump or walk off a ledge.Jet packs require fuel. To refuel, hold a fuel bottle in your off hand. Note that fuel levels apply to players, not jet packs. Cheat jet packs require at least one unit of fuel, but do not consume it.How to add jet packs to an existing world:Install MCEdit if you don't already have it.Download the MCEdit schematic.Paste it into your spawn chunks. (If you don't put it into the spawn chunks, it will still work, but only within a certain range.)While not strictly necessary, I strongly recommend disabling command block output with ‘/gamerule commandBlockOutput false’ and ‘/gamerule logAdminCommands false’.Enter Minecraft and turn on the jet pack controller using the ‘Main Power’ switch.Alternatively, if you don't want to use MCEdit, simply download the world file (direct download • FileDropper) and play it on the snapshot.ChangelogVersion 1.2 (World download · World on FileDropper · Schematic download)• Added “cheat jet packs”, which still require fuel, but don't consume it.• Added a warning when the player is low on fuel while using a jet pack.• Jet pack exhaust now harms players and mobs.• Fuel is now limited — you cannot refuel if you already have more than an hour of fuel.Version 1.1 (Unreleased)• Jet packs now require fuel.• Added fuel bottles. Hold a fuel bottle in your off hand to refuel.• You now have to jump or walk off a ledge to activate a jet pack. This prevents accidentally flying when picking up or moving a jet pack.• [Gavin screaming]Version 1.0 (World download · World on FileDropper · Schematic download)• First released version.• Added a purpur case to the jet pack controller.• Added ‘Get a Jet Pack’ button.• Added ‘Information’ button.Version 0.2 (Unreleased)• Added main power switch.• Improved sound effects.• Added splashing sound effect when trying to use a jet pack underwater.• The jet pack system no longer interferes with Shulkers when jet packs aren't being used.• Particles are now more visible.• Jet packs must now be named ‘Jet Pack’, whereas previously holding any hopper would work.Version 0.1 (Unreleased)• Added sound and particles.• Added speed and regeneration effects.• Jet pack effects are now removed as soon as the player stops holding the jet pack.Version 0.0 (Unreleased)• Initial test of levitation triggered by holding an item. Futuristic, Modern, Command, Blocks, Redstone Device, Flying, Jet, Packs

Custom Crafting Table Redstone Device Map Hey World!Looks like you stumbled apon this here post!Today I will be going over my Custom Crafting Table! I have seen others like it, and desided I wanted to make my own. The schematic is the redstone and the bench, and a chilling area for your friends while you geek out! There is room for me to expand in the future, but for now, that space is for you to make your own recipes!My Recipes are in the back of the build. How To Make Custom Crafting Recipes1. Place down a container of some kind (dispenser or dropper recommended). This is what we will be using to craft our items.2. Setup a circuit. If you don't know how to do this, than this post is too advanced for you. I recomend learning more about redstone before you try and attemp anything like this.3. Place a command block wth a comparater running out of it into another command block.4. Wire the circuit to the first command block.5. type /testforblock (the coords of the container) (the container) (the data value) {Items:[id:minecraft:(your item),Slot:(what slot)b,Count:(howmany)b,Damage:(what data value)s}]}Example/testforblock ~4 ~ ~-5 minecraft:dispenser 0 {Items:[{id:minecraft:golden_apple,Slot:0b,Count:1b,Damage:1s}]}6. Now type into the second command block: setblock (the coords) (the container) (data value) replace {CustomName:"(custom name)",Data:1,Items:[{id:minecraft:(item),Slot:(slot),Count:(how many),Damage:(data value)b,},{id:minecraft:(second item),Slot:0,Count:1,Damage:0b,}]}If you want you can add more itemsExamplesetblock ~4 ~ ~-3 dispenser 6 replace {CustomName:"Crafting V2",Data:1,Items:[{id:minecraft:gold_block,Slot:1,Count:9,Damage:0b,},{id:minecraft:apple,Slot:0,Count:1,Damage:0b,}]}7. Place the items into the container.8. Done! You just made a custom crafting recipe!Still need help? Ask down below in the comments! Hopefully me or someone else will be there to answer your question! Redstone, Block, Craft, Command, Redstone Device, Custom, Device, Crafting

Fonte: Namtar-Class Defensive Support Air Structure Map Length: 20 metersWidth: 9 metersHeight: 7 metersNation of Origin: FonteManufacturer: Pegasus Corp.Era Designed: Post-Karkassian WarDescription: After the Karkassian War, scientists of Pegasus Corporation began looking over mainland technology. They were horrified to learn that the Beelzebub-Class was woefully under-equipped for long-term warfare. As proper installation of extra weapons and shielding would have been difficult and left the pilots needing to deal with awkward control placement, the scientists designed two ships that would go into battle with the Beelzebub-Class. The Namtar-Class is the more defensive of the two ships, carrying a more efficient shield generator than its sister class, Moloch. While Namtar-Class is considered to be a ship, it is actually classified as a ship modification in Fonte. It is heavily dependant on other ships for travel, as its thrusters are weak and its engine do not carry much fuel. Is armed with a single Fireball gun to clear simple obstacles. As it and the Moloch-Class were both designed with the Beelzebub-Class in mind, both were made with aquatic capabilities. Air Structure, Ship, World, Airship, Ships, Dead, Company, Modification

UNSC Darter [1.8x+] Air Structure Map In-game versionDescriptionThe D82-EST Darter is a dropship used by the United Nations Space Command to deliver supplies, such as rations and munitions, to forward bases. It is very similar in form and function to the D96-TCE Albatross, though it is larger than the latter.The D82-EST Darter has been in service since at least 2531. It is a vital part of the UNSC's logistical operations, capable of deploying personnel, vehicles parts, weapons, and supplies from rations and medical kits to any ground side base. It serves as both an atmospheric and exoatmospheric craft capable of delivering troops and supplies wherever needed once a supply pad has been constructed.The Darter's cargo bay is capable of transporting large amounts of supply crates at a time. Once it has landed, the underside splits down the middle lowering a metal pallet from the cargo bay, allowing its cargo to be dropped ground side to be unloaded. Once free of supplies, the Darter can reseal its cargo bay doors, returning to an orbiting space craft to resupply.(Credit for description: Halo Nation. UNSC Vulture [1.8x+] Air Structure Map In-game versionDescriptionThe AC-220 Gunship, more commonly known as theVulture, is a heavy gunship used by the United Nations Space Command during the early years of the Human-Covenant war. The premier aerial combat vehicle for extended air-to-ground battles, it is a successor of the older AC-47, AC-119,AC-130, and AC-163 gunships.Service HistoryThe largest ground-based aircraft fielded by the UNSC, the Vulture was originally produced to combat the rebel threat during the early years of the Insurrection, though its use during this conflict was viewed as unethical due to craft's immense firepower.Due to immense combat losses of the AC-220 by at least 2545, the AC-220 has slowly faded out of service. However, Materials Group is contemplating the revival of the AC-220, albeit with the newest tech and improved materials.SpecificationsIt is suspended by a series of directed-thrust jets on the craft's underside and, while its large size makes the Vulture slow, it can sustain incredible amounts of damage before final destruction. The Vulture's armaments mean even a handful of these aircraft can level an enemy stronghold or an entire city. Two pairs of GUA-23/AW/Linkless Feed Autocannons are used for targeting individual ground units, while two Argent V Missile Launchers mounted in the rear give it anti-aircraft firepower. A twin A-74 Sylver Vertical Missile Launcher allows the Vulture to launch devastating rocket barrages which blanket a wide area.Effective use of the Vulture requires highly trained UNSC pilots and gunners, which makes them expensive to use. This, coupled with the amount of time it takes to build one, means that the Vulture is usually only reserved for difficult and lengthy battle situations.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) UNSC Pelican [1.8x+] [Interior] Air Structure Map CGI versionDescription The Dropship 77-Troop Carrier, abbreviated D77-TC, or more commonly known as the Pelican, is an extremely versatile aircraftused by the UNSC. Used mainly for the pickup and transportation of various personnel, vehicles and equipment, it can also be used as a powerful support gunship.The D77-TC Pelican is mainly used for the rapid insertion and extraction of ground troops. They may deliver vehicles and vital equipment to the battlefield when required. The D77-TC has been in service for over fifty years, and is the primary tactical support aircraft of the UNSC. The Pelican is a multi-role aircraft; it is fully capable of atmospheric flight and can land almost anywhere without difficulty.The Pelican is also capable of limited spaceflight, which the UNSCuses as a primary method of delivering troops to the surface from orbit. Standard armament consists of one Class III externally powered projectile weapon at the bow of the craft, and one Class I gas-operated projectile weapon mounted at the rear, in the extended crew area. More heavily armed variants do exist, with multiple and more powerful weapons.[7]Payload CapacityThe Pelican is capable of carrying passengers and cargo using a combination of internal and external methods. The main compartment of the Pelican (sometimes called the "Blood Tray") has capacity for 15 people (10 sitting, 5 standing). Other variants have displayed the ability to hold considerably more as demonstrated throughout the Halo books. For example, the SPARTAN-II's were assigned a specialized Pelican, which was able to hold an entire team of twenty five, as well as fitting cutting gear to board a Covenant warship. Three Pelicans used for the SPARTAN-III Program carried 300 children, though this may have been because of numerous trips back and forth from the surface.The large aft overhang gives an attachment point for additional cargo and ordnance. Possible payloads include a Troop Deployment Pod, a Scorpion Tank, a Warthog, or eight Resupply Canister Type-B Capsules. The maximum payload of a Pelican is seventy tons.ArmamentStandard armament consists of a chin-mounted 40mm rotary cannon which was common prior to 2525, but was later superseded by a 70mm chaingun. These weapons are usually controlled by the pilot's helmet so that it would aim in the direction of the pilot's view, similar to the modern TADS/PNVS found on Apache gunships or the HUD system in a SPARTAN's armor. Some dropships boasted twin chainguns firing depleted uranium rounds.Missile pods, each holding eight ANVIL-II ASMs, can be mounted under each wing to engage more maneuverable or better protected targets. Fire control is typically delegated to the copilot, who is assisted by a helmet-mounted display. An M247 GPMG or a 25mm grenade launcher can be mounted facing out of the rear cargo hatch; the weapons can be folded flat against the roof of the internal bay when not in use by the crew chief or a passenger.PropulsionThe main engines are mounted in pairs in four nacelles, one on each wing and two at the rear. The nacelles can articulate independently, thus altering (i.e. vectoring) the direction of thrust and improving the dropship's low altitude maneuverability. Six ventral thrusters, two on each wing nacelle and one on each aft nacelle, allow the Pelican to land and take off vertically. These engines are capable of both space and atmospheric operation. The D77, although fully capable of orbital insertion, is too small to be equipped with a Shaw-Fujikawa Translight Engine, and thus is incapable of slipspace travel.The wings mounted on a Pelican seem extremely small, too small to support the weight of dropship and payload alone. It is speculated that it incorporates at least some lifting body principles, its own hull providing most of the lift necessary.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Air Structure, Aircraft, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Unsc, Pelican, D77

UNSC Dragonfly [1.8x+] [First replica on PMC!] Air Structure Map Inspired by this Mega Bloks design by YouTube user GWHunter1. DescriptionThe Dragonfly is a 4-rotor, heavy lift helicopter, used to transport large vehicles and equipment to remote locations, primarily in non-combat situations.As it has no armaments, deployment to a hot zone usually requires escort by Hornets or Hawks. The Dragonfly has a forward-mounted remote-control sensor pod that the pilot can use to monitor the attachment, status and release of his cargo.Each rotor has a heavy-duty winch next to it that can be independently controlled by the pilot or a ground-based colleague with a remote link. The lower rear stabilizers do double duty as landing skids.The UNSC Dragonfly can illuminate any landing zone with 7 belly and wing mounted high-intensity lights. It is also night vision equipped for covert operations.While its crews like to brag that the Dragonfly is “Strong enough to lift an Elephant!” – there is no documented evidence that this has ever occurred. Scorpions, Mastodons, and the occasional Vulture in need of repair are its typical cargo… although large supply drops to remote locations are becoming more common.(Credit for description: Spartan Bloks.) Features1) Accurate, scaled and detailed replica. 2) Enough room in the vehicle bay to fit smaller vehicles of my own, and cargo. 3) Uses Aeon Ressource Pack by thesparko, and its patch by EzerArch.Sharing Please give appropriate credit if you want to use this vehicle in a project that you will post. :) Air Structure, Aircraft, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Dragonfly, Unsc

Hlafton - BlackSmith [SCHEMATIC] Land Structure Map Today I'm bringing you guys the Hlafton Blacksmith from the small village on the northern coast of the lake. this build features an outdoor forging station with a showroom on the first floor of the house and a small living quarter on the second floor. I figured the blacksmith wouldn't want to sit over a hot oven cooking food after working at the forge all day so the build is placed nearby the tavern, where he can easily walk over and grab some food.I wanted to try something new with this build so there is a tower attached to the house. there's just a little viewing platform at the top to look at the surrounding area which I think has an awesome view right now! Theres a little desk, chair, and animal skin rug up there for the blacksmith to go and relax after a long day of work.Please note the schematic uses Metadatas from the conquest texture pack, in order to get the full effect of the building use conquest TP as well as Optifine. > Please Diamond/Favorite/Subscribe for more! Cheers, Failwhip USE THESE FOR BEST EXPERIENCE Turn off FireTick Conquest Optifine SEUS Ultra DoF Shader Better Foliage Mod Dynamic Lighting Mod You are free to use my builds on any server, if it is used for official use you must give me credit and if it is posted as part of a project on Planetminecraft or another website, provide a link back to this page. TTC: Bullpup Class Hardsuit - Mark 3 Land Structure Map Model #: Bullpup - Mark ThreeClass: Military HardsuitDesigner: Ultralight Co.Manufacturer: Ultralight Co. Aproved franchise holdersCost: Inquire for CostLength: 3.5 metersWidth: 3 metersHeight: 5.5 metersMax 1g Speed: 60 kphPowerplant: Westdyne type MicrodriveArmament: Ultralight Co. Module Light Weapons SystemCrew: 1 PilotThe Mark Three, is the second major overhaul of the incredibly popular Bullpup Class Military Hardsuit.While many of the Mark Twos (pictured in photo #4), are still in service throughout the Confederation, they are quickly being replaced by this new and much improved model. The new features include:The new powerplant:The new Highco Technologies' Westdyne type microdrive which was designed for the new Viper mkII fighter is both smaller and has a higher power output than the mark two's microdrive. This new drive allows for more fuelspace, which in turn allows the hardsuit to operate for much longer without refueling.The improved legs:The new Ultralight Co. M24 hardsuit legs improve on the previous model by using lighter and better mounted armor. While this does lower the durability of the mk3's legs, it allows for more flexibility and a higher top running speed.The new modular weapon mounts:This was both the most highly requested improvement and the easiest to implement. It allows for vast selection of Ultralight Co.'s light weapons systems to mounted, mixed and matched on the Mark Three Bullpup!-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------To best view this build, use this texture pack:CyberOpticsLBmod1.29it is a modified version of Cyber Optics uploaded with the permision of Scamper3396 Land Structure, Futuristic, Space, Future, Army, Mech, Robot, Infantry

Build-your-own working clocktower Redstone Device Map Just the bare bones of my clocktower with cleaned up wiring to the faces. Accurately keeps game time and resets itself every morning. Works in 1.8. Build your own tower around it! Don't block the day/night detector or the reset mechanism won't work properly. Also, you can change the clock faces but make sure to use solid blocks where the redstone connects to the lamps. Redstone Device

[1.8] Vanilla Realistic Heat Module - Metal Redstone Device Map This module allows the player to take heat damage when standing on a heated metal block (iron or gold block with fire under it). This module only works in survival and adventure gamemodes. It will not work with non-heated metal blocks. I will probably make it so that you catch on fire instead of instant damage.One Command Module (paste the command into a command block) : http://pastebin.com/pkNWND5YYou might have to reset the redstone block clocks after the module has spawned. To do so, locate any red wool block or redstone block, break it and replace it by a redstone block.The command was created using gentlegiantJGC's mcedit filter(http://www.mediafire.com/view/zy2bkckvb9jk5ww/one-command_structure_spawner_2_0.py%20)Enjoy ;) Realistic, Block, Command, Redstone Device, Vanilla, Metal, Module, Heat

Submersible Ground Assault Fighter/Strafer Air Structure Map The fighter can use it's redstone weapons without any mods or plugins, but to move the fighter, the plugin movecraft must be implemented on a bukkit or spigot server. The Slokovian Airship Fleet was thriving with developments and advancements thanks to the assistance of three weapons designers: Aldon Helan, Henry Geolovich, and Vincent Nord. Each of them worked together to contribute the large artillery turrets that would be mounted on their aerial warships and the fighters that were placed into mass production, When Aldon thought of the tactical advantage that a ground assault fighter would supply to the aerial superiority that was provided by a carrier, he spared no expenses working with his two close associates to build another fighter. Since the previous three fighters had submersible capabilities, Aldon thought he should mount the same capability on this fighter to avoid detection if it was travelling with a fighter squadron that was underwater. There was a major problem with this though: the lava mounted in front of the arrow dispensers would solidify on contact with water, so it was to be removed, but that would cause a severe decrease in the effectiveness of the arrow dispensers. Aldon turned to the ground asault mechanisms mounted on the destroyer classes that the Kingdom of Lanier for an idea. The broadsides on the destroyer class faced a similar issue, so it was devised that there would be an additional dispenser for every anti-aircraft fire gun that would dispense lava into a concealed chamber when necessary to conduct ground assault. The result was a medium sized submersible ground assault fighter that could submerge without any difficulty thanks to the togglable lava dispensers mounted next to the ground assault dispensers. Not only would this allow the craft to submerge, it would also elimiate the risk factors involved with having a fire-spreading substance constantly adjacent to the flammable wool, which made the Submersible Strafing Fighter a reliable and tactical advantage for light and nimble ground assault crafts. The craft was quickly placed into production by order of the Airship Fleet General Lokroskly, which gave the Slokovian Airship Fleet a necessary edge in carrier operations. Air Structure

UNSC Shortsword [1.8x+] [Interior] Air Structure Map Concept art versionDescriptionThe B-65 Suborbital Long-Range Bomber, more commonly known as the Shortsword, is a UNSC atmospheric bomber used primarily for short-range, heavy payload bombing runs against enemy ground targets, especially Covenant forces. The bombers were in use by the UNSC by 2531.The Shortsword-class Bomber shares a similar design to the GA-TL1 Longsword-class Interceptor. It features an elongated and angled wings, comparable to that of a Longsword, and retracted tail wings. This makes the Shortsword a versatile aircraft, able to deliver its deadly payload and provides it greater freedom of action at lower altitudes. A Shortsword's payload is interchangeable, capable of delivering conventional ordnance, or less conventional munitions into theatres of combat, dropping them onto the target zone at low altitude and high velocity. These strikes are launched from an orbital support ship, indicating at least a rudimentary exoatmospheric capability. Air Structure, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Unsc, Aircrafts, Shortsword, B65

Naval Dorsal Mounted Artillery Turret Redstone Device Map The Slokovian Army stumbled upon what could only be described as a gigantic battlefield. They discovered a massive war raging between three nations, one being the Kingdom of Lanier and the Free Town of South Haven against the Sivler Empire. They were incredibly stunned to see the aerial technology that each of these nations had achieved, being able to construct massive aerial warships capable of dominating the skies with advanced weaponry and heavy firepower. The Slokivian Army realized the potential that this technology could bring them, and immediately returned to the capital Purimait to report their incredible findings to the Premier Yalkov Bronovhic. Bronovhic was utterly impressed with the designs that these nations had constructed and set out to build his own air force with these incredible airships. He soon created the Slokovian Airship Fleet, and positioned General Jalkev Lokrosky as the head of this new fledging airship force. Lokrosky wanted heavy firepower mounted on these airships capable of turning any direction on the craft independently and carrying enough explosive power to breach even the thickest of armor that these nations had devised with ease. The weapons designers struggled for many months to build a design until a decommisioned Silver Empire officer Aldon Helan had found the Slokovian outpost of Korsov and joined the weapons designers, intent on fulfilling his new designing group with great success after the his misery of being decommissioned. Aldon submitted an experimental cannon that would be able to fulfill Lokrosky's demands with ease: the artillery cannon. It was a weapon concieved by the Sivler Empire towards the end of the War of Acquisition to easily penetrate the heavy armor of the advanced Kingdom and Pirate warships with ease from a long distance. Though the Silver Empire had not yet built a functional prototype, Lokrosky was determined to bring this cannon to the Slokovian Airship Fleet and ordered the development team to commence work on this new turret design. After many months of struggling to build a functional prototype, Aldon had finally built a fully functional prototype with the help of novice weapons designer Henry Geolovich. They built a turret that could rotate in any direction on the ship without having to be moved by the ship, rendering it a fully indepentent extension from the ship. It had a range of almost 500 meters and fired twenty metric tons of high explosive at a speed mach 2.5. It also had the adjustable arc, range, and accuracy that could easily exceed the newest condesning cannons that the shipwright Robert Bellamy designed. With one more modification to the prototype, the turret could now be submerged underwater and still function because of the fluid dispenser and timing mechanism in the firing chamber. Lokrosky was deeply impressed by the turret design and soon began mass production of this cannon for later use in warships. Even though this cannon consumed enourmous amounts of high explosive, the Slokovian Army had a great production rate of explosives that highly exceeded the amount needed for these new turrets. Lokrosky remained satisfied until he realized the potential that these cannons could have on a carrier design. General Lokroskly soon after his realization, began a constest to see who could design a cannon just like Aldon and Geolovich's that could be mounted on a carrier without obstructing it's flight deck. Practically no one submitted any relevant designs until Adlon and Geolovich met a retired pirate named Vincent Nord who worked with Bellamy on the second refit of the Shadow of the Deep. He soon joined forces with Aldon and Geolovich to construct a naval artillery turret that could be mounted on a carrier. Vincent gave both of them the idea that any structure above the flight deck besides a flight operations bridge would be considered an obstruction, the pirate gave them the secret that Bellamy was using to double the firepower on his new ship: to mount the turret on the underside of the ship rather than above it so it can rotate freely yet not cause any obstructions to incoming fighters. The three of them set off to work developing this new revolutionary turret and in a mere three weeks heavily modified the design they had previously so that it could be mounted on the underside of a ship. The result was a turret just as efficient, reliable, powerful, and versatile as the naval topside turret that could easily be mounted on the belly of an aerial warship. Lokrosky then ordered this new turret into mass production just like the topside version, and soon the Slokovian Airship Fleet gained the armament that they required to build their ambutious designs. The three designers were praised by both General Lokrosky and Primier Brhonovic for their outstanding contributions to the fledging airship fleet, and were promoted to the head developers of the research and development team for the Slokovian Airship Fleet. The Airship Fleet then began developing high-tech warships that were specifically designed to be armed with these revolutionary new turret designs. Soon, the fleet became a force to be reckoned with as the turrets mounted on these warships made them serious threats to the Silver Empire. the Kingdom of Lanier, and the Free Town of South Haven. Redstone Device

UNSC Sabre, Broadsword [1.8x+] [Vehicle pack] Air Structure Map SabreIn-game version Description The YSS-1000 Prototype Anti-Ship Spaceplane, usually referred to as the Sabre, is a space superiority starfighterused by the UNSC Defense Force during the Human-Covenant war. Its first known use was in Operation: UPPERCUT during the Fall of Reach.Operational HistoryThe Sabre was the result of the Sabre Program, a top-secret UNSC project, denied as a "preposterous rumor" by three UNSC administrations, in which SPARTAN-B312 was a pilot at some point during the Insurrection of Mamore. By 2552, the YSS-1000 served as the UNSCDF's primary planetary defense fighter. Reach had multiple Sabre fighters stored in launch facilities on the planet's surface. In addition, the orbital platform Anchor 9 had several Sabres stored in its launch bays. Gamma Station also had several Sabres stored.During the Covenant invasion of Reach, SPARTAN-B312 and Jorge-052 of Noble Team used one of these vehicles during Operation: UPPERCUT, in which multiple Sabres were used by Noble Team and a UNSC strike team to board the Covenant corvette Ardent Prayer in order to use it to deliver a makeshift slipspace bomb to the CSO-class supercarrier, Long Night of Solace. Before assaulting the Corvette, the Sabres were used to defend Anchor 9 against Covenant Type-27 Banshee fliers, Seraph starfighters and Phantom Gunboats. Noble Six and the other pilots were eventually able to land on the corvette after disabling its engines and destroying its fighter escorts in order to use it and the slipspace drive to destroy the supercarrier. The mission succeeded, but the Sabres were destroyed, as the strike team was unable to return to them due to damage to the corvette and was thus forced to abandon them.The Sabre continued to be produced after the fall of Reach.Design detailsThe YSS-1000 is a space superiority fighter, which can be launched vertically from a terrestrial launch platform using a system of detachable multi-stage rockets to propel itself out of a planet's gravitational pull and atmosphere. The Sabre's speed is similar to the Seraph's and also has an afterburner ability which increases speed for a short duration of time. The Sabre is also capable of performing complex barrel rolls, Split S maneuvers, and Immelmann turns.ArmamentsThe fighter's armament includes twin 30mm autocannon, as well as linked "Medusa"-type missile pods that can lock onto enemy ships. The Sabre also possesses energy shielding technology, and its targeting computer can identify enemy contacts from a long distance, as well as showing the distance to a selected target.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.)BroadswordIn-game versionDescriptionThe F-41 Exoatmospheric Multirole Strike Fighter, also known as the Broadsword, is a versatile and well armed A/X strike fighter typically used to engage space craft of equal or superior weapon capabilities and evasive flight capabilities in low to zero gravity conditions. As its kind has few equals within the UNSC's arsenal, the Broadsword was designed to address the incredible firepower and speed displayed by the fighters of the Covenant such as the Seraphand Space Banshee. The Broadswords shielding was influenced by the Sabre that covers the entire fighter and designed to withstand a direct hit from a pulse laser and likely added after 2552. These shields however are not rated for slipspace travel. The MJOLNIR Powered Assault Armor/Aviator is paired for use with Broadsword pilots.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Air Structure, Military, Vehicle, Halo, Unsc, Broadsword, Sabre, Aircrafts

UNSC Hornet, Falcon, Sparrowhawk [1.8x+] [Vehicle pack] Air Structure Map HornetIn-game versionDescriptionThe AV-14 Attack VTOL, also known as the Hornet, is a United Nations Space Command assault and reconnaissance aircraft. The Hornet is capable of fulfilling multiple combat roles from close air support to special forces insertion.The AV-14 is a vertical take off and landing aircraft (VTOL) that has been in service since at least 2424 and has played a role in multiple campaigns starting with Operation: TREBUCHET. It serves as the UNSC's Assault, Search, Reconnaissance, and Close Air Support Aircraft. The Hornet is an atmospheric only craft and as such cannot be deployed by orbital vessels unless a ship rated for atmospheric entry can deliver it to the battlefield. It is easier for the Hornet to be deployed from an air base located on the surface than from a ship.The AV-14 Hornet consists of a one-man cockpit and a rear section, extending approximately one meter backward. Variant models feature a tandem seating configuration, presumably allowing a second passenger to operate the aircraft's weaponry or navigation systems. At the top of this rear section are a set of wings with turbofan engines mounted on gimbals at the ends, providing the Hornet's main source of propulsion. The front of the Hornet contains a target acquisition and designation system which includes cameras and sensors. On each side of the cockpit is a jump-seat extending backward that doubles as a landing skid. These skids allow up to four passengers, though the additional weight runs the risk of overloading the aircraft.Although the AV-14 Hornet serves primarily as an attack craft, it can be reconfigured for a particular role. Variant models include the AV-14 Reconnaissance and the AV-14 Transport and dependent upon mission requirements can be customized accordingly.ArmamentThe AV-14 Hornet is armed with both anti-infantry and anti-vehicle weapon systems. The AV-14 Hornet can be configured with one of two anti-infantry systems. The first are a pair of high-mounted GUA-23/A Heavy Autocannons, located on either side of the cockpit, which can be elevated and depressed to a small degree without affecting the flight pattern of the Hornet. The second is a single, nose-mounted GUA-23 Linkless Feed Autocannon that fires .50 BMG rounds. The anti-vehicle system is composed of a Class-2 Guided Munition Launch System consisting of twin missile launchers mounted on the belly of the aircraft's landing skids. When triggered, each pod fires a single homing missile. In addition, the Hornet can be armed with two chaff pods to counter radar-guided missiles. When activated, they release copper nickel-coated glass fibers or silver-coated nylon fibers having lengths equal to half of the anticipated radar wavelength.While the AV-14 Hornet has a wide variety of roles and advantages, its greatest weakness is its light armor — making it susceptible to anything larger than small arms fire. Infantry atop of the vehicles landing skids are also at risk of taking enemy fire, as they have no protection at all which is why the AV-14 Hornet is often used to insert small strike teams, and not extract them during combat operations.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.)FalconIn-game versionDescriptionThe UH-144 Falcon is a troop transport tilt-and-transverse-rotor helicopter of the UNSC.Operational HistoryThe Falcon first entered UNSC service in 2497. UNSC Army garrisons on inner colony worlds used it extensively as a good, economical replacement for the Pelicans. From there, it has seen its fair use over the course of the Human-Covenant war as one of the UNSC Army's main air transport vehicles. It was seen during the Battle of Fumirole, providing air support. It was also commonly used by Noble Team in 2552, including their investigation of the Visegrád Relay, the First Battle of Sword Base, the Battle of Viery, the beginning of Operation: UPPER CUT, the Raid on New Alexandria, the Evacuation of New Alexandria, and theSecond Battle of Sword Base It was even used during theBattle of Mombasa on Earth, in the waning days of the Human-Covenant war.It is still in use by the UNSC Army in 2557.Design DetailsTwo Falcons can transport a fully-equipped fireteam faster than any other previous system, and provide overwhelming fire support in most weather conditions. The aircraft's crew consists of one pilot, two crewmen who may serve as door gunners, and three passengers. However, in multiplayer, there is only room for the pilot and gunners.There are two versions of the Falcon. Both have a chin-mounted autocannon, but the UH-144A has two side-mounted grenade launchers while the UH-144S instead has two side-mounted machine guns.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.)SparrowhawkConcept art versionDescriptionThe AV-22 Sparrowhawk is a United Nations Space Command VTOL aerial support aerodyne that appears in Halo Wars.First introduced in 2531, the Hawk is a formidable air-to-ground anti-tank aerodyne. It is used by the UNSC in a ground support and anti-armor role to hunt tanks and support ground advances. Developed during the early years of the Human-Covenant war, it first saw action on the planet Harvest during the end months of the Harvest Campaign. Although the Sparrowhawk was in wide production during the first decade of the war, the general cost of repairing and replacing it, as well as problems with its ducted fan propulsion system, limited the craft's deployment after 2550.Despite the Hawk's official designation as an Attack VTOL, the sheer weight of firepower it can wield caused some branches of the UNSC to classify it as a gunship.(Credit for description: Halo Nation.) Air Structure, Military, Vehicle, Falcon, Halo, Hornet, Unsc, Av14

Submersible Armored Interceptor. Air Structure Map This fighter requires movecraft to moveand fly, a plugin for spigot and bukkit servers. You do not need movecraft for the redstone devices, but to move and fly it requires movecraft. The Slokovian Airship Fleet was booming with fighter designs and soon gained many tactical advantages over their surrounding nations when it came to fighters. They had amassed a significant fleet in merely five months thanks to the developments of master weapons designers Aldon Helan and Henry Geolovich combined with Vincent Nord. They were sastified with their contributions until they realized that none of their fighters had any significant armor that could properly withstand aa fire gun barrages. They then set to work on developing submersible interceptor design that was completely impervious to aa guns from the frontal arc. They replicated the same ballast tank armor as they mounted on their first submersible fighter design except for making it many times more sturdy than the last attempt. They were nearly finished with the design, but a major flaw soon was discovered: The fact that the torpedoes on the aircraft were completely exposed and had no protection due to the fact that they would explode if any armor was mounted in front of them and they were launched with the armor still attached. Aldon soon worked around this issue by implementing a removable button on the front of the torpedo that would be broken by a piston mechanism before launch. They then presented their new Submersible Armored Interceptor design to the Slokovian Airship Fleet where it entered mass production. The fleet soon amassed enough variety and number of fighters to match and exceed the vast fighter division of the Silver Empire. With the fighter dilemma finally overcome, the designers could finally advance to the warships that the Slokovian Airship Fleet desparately required. Air Structure

Submersible Multi Role Fighter Air Structure Map This fighter requires movecraft to move and fly, a plugin made for spigot and bukkit servers. The redstone will work without it, but it requires the plugin to move and fly as well as fire it's torpedoes. The Slokovian Airship Fleet is amassing it's forces to build itself up against it's neighbors. After the weapons designers Aldon Helan, Herny Geolovich, and Vincent Nord entered the designing department, the new fleet began booming with new designs and innovations. They had already amassed a large quantity of fighters and turrets to be mounted on future warships, but the fleet was still not sastified with the fighter designs that it was employed with. Aldon and Henry debated about what fighter should be implemented into the forces that they had already recieved, and could not find a fighter that would be appropriate for their needs. That was until Vincent suggested combining many different roles into one light craft so that way the carriers had even more abilities and advantages during their operations. Aldon and Henry then set to work on building a prototype that would combine the torpedoes of an interceptor with the aa weaponry of a dogfighter and the bombing system of a fighter-bomber with the submersible abilities of their previous fighters and soon generated a small carrier mounted multi role fighter that would play a major role in the operations of the carriers that would soon enter the Slokovian Airship Fleet. It was submersible just like their previous designs and armed with one automatic bomb-dropper, three automated aa guns facing forward, and two three meter long torpedoes for penetrating enemy warship armor. This fighter was then commissioned into the Slokovian Airship Fleet after only days of building the prototype, and the fleet soon gained the tactical advantage of having varied weapons all mounted on one single fighter, which greatly reduced the number of fighters necessary for the fleet. Submersible Air Superiority Fighter Air Structure Map This is designed to work with the movecraft plugin for spigot and bukkit servers. The restone will work fine without movecraft, but it used movecraft to turn and fly. The new Slokovian Airship Fleet began experiencing a desire to construct light and nimble attack craft that could evade anti-aircraft defenses and protect larger warships from large fighter groups with ease. The General of the Airship Fleet, Korlov Lokrosky also requested that this new aircraft would be implemented with the latest advancements in stealth technology to assure that this fighter could evade anti-aircraft defenses with ease. The three best weapons designers the Slokovian Airship Fleet had in their ranks were called to this new task. Henry Geolovich, Adlon Helan, and Vincent Nord responded to the situation by beginning work on a new type of fighter that had barely been invented: the submersible fighter. The Silver Empire only recently designed a type of fighter that could submerge and rapildy ascend above the water in a quick ambush, so there were many doubts surrounding the technology involved in this fighter design. Aldon proposed combining the submersible fighter with the air superiority fighter as it was the fighter design best suited for attacking large fighter squadrons with ease. The ship also required durability and defense against anti-aircraft weaponry, so Aldon with, the help of Vincent, proposed a solution to that as well. Since the fighter required ballast tanks to submerge and rapidly ascend out of the water, both of them worked together in creating design that mounted these tanks on the front of the craft to assure that the fire gun bands mounted on both warships and on the nose of the fighter would simly reflect right off the surface of the ballast tanks, making the fighter very difficult to set alight. Merely one month after their realization, both Vincent and Aldon with the help of Henry Geolovich constructed a working prototype that combined the stealth of a submersible aircraft with the light and nimble capabilities of a dogfighter and the armor of a warship, making the Submersible Air Superiority Fighter. These traits of the new fighter gave the Slokovian Airship Fleet a major advantage over the large fighter squadrons and assault craft of the Silver Empire and the fighter squardons of the Royal Navy. A squadron of these craft could wait to suprise the enemy fighter squadron, use their size and maneuverability to quickly separate the squadron, and then destroy the crafts with the advantage of their ballast tank armor. The fighter's small size also meant it could be mounted on carriers, which gave the fighter an even greater edge because it could be rapildy deployed in a large battle. This new fighter design was placed into mass production and soon became the staple for almost all air superiority operations against enemy fighter squadrons. Air Structure

T-90 Russian main battle tank Land Structure Map The T-90 is a Russian third-generation main battle tank that is essentially a modernisation of the T-72B, incorporating many features of the T-80U (it was originally to be called the T-72BU, later renamed to T-90). It is currently the most modern tank in service with the Russian Ground Forces and Naval Infantry. Although a development of the T-72, the T-90 uses a 125mm 2A46 smoothbore tank gun, 1G46 gunner sights, a new engine, and thermal sights. Standard protective measures include a blend of steel, composite armour, smoke mortars, Kontakt-5 ERA, laser warning receivers, Nakidka camouflage and the Shtora infrared ATGM jamming system. The EMT-7 electromagnetic pulse (EMP) creator has been used in testing but not fitted to T-90s in active service. It is designed and built by Uralvagonzavod, in Nizhny Tagil, Russia. Since 2011, the Russian armed forces have ceased ordering the T-90, and are instead waiting for the development of the Armata Universal Combat Platform that is expected to enter service in 2016. Automatic Chicken Farm Redstone Device Map This building is an automatic chicken farm. No feeding or breeding is required. Only collection.There are chickens in the egg shaped portion that lay eggs that are collected and sent to a dispenser below which is hooked up to a redstone clock. This dispenser hatches chickens. When theres enough chickens in the room, the trapdoor will start opening and sending them to the furnace where they get cooked. Meat, feathers, and sometimes eggs, are collected and put into the chests on the first floor. Contents of the chests seem to be going into the bottom chest firstWhen copying into your map, sink into the ground until the doors are even with the ground*Redstone clock sometimes needs reseting. please monitor closely and play with the redstone repeaters as seen fit Redstone Device, Chicken, Farm, Automatic, Clock

Building tool: Vanilla worldedit [Minecraft 1.9] Redstone Device Map A custom terrain painter:create custom terrain in no time!MCEdit install info:1. Download schematic2. Go to mcedit and open the schematic in your world3. Go to coordinates 0, 0, 0 and find the redstone block in the corner of the machine4. Place the redstone block at 0, 0, 05. Go to your world and search for the machine (You can type in: /tp @p 0 10 0)6. press the button7. If 0, 0, 0 isn't in your spawn chunks or you have no idea what spawn chunks are, type: /setworldspawnInfo:1. First place some blocks on the chissled quartz blocks, this are your brushes.2. Select one of your made brushes with the book3. Put the Draw or Place mode carrot on a stick in your offhand4. Click to use item, click again when using draw mode to stop drawing. Draw mode keeps painting Place mode places paint only once5. You can edit the commandblocks as well6. You can turn stack mode on or off with the paint book7. Stack mode stacks the brush automaticcaly8. Use Place brush to place it as a block9. With the book you can toggle visibility of armorstands10. With the paint book you can give yourself the draw mode, place mode, and placebrush armorstand.11. In the book there are location options, so you when your building you can quickly edit your brushes/commands and go back: Remove locations: removes all locations Set location: set a location, so you can teleport back later Go to location: teleports you to the nearest location Go to machine: go to the machine so you can edit the brushes/commandblocks12. You can edit the time in a command block. (high number->longer time) This is useful if you're using larger brushes. With a longer time you have to wait before it places the brush. I added this so you don't get stuck in the blocks you just placed.If you like this creation, leave a diamond, favorite and subscribe for more!If you have questions or suggestions/ideas, put them in the comments below! Enjoy! Generator, Terrain, Redstone Device, Custom, Painter, Paint
