Springtrap Miniboss (Survival friendly!) Redstone Device Map Hello, everyone! Today I'm going to give you my Springtrap miniboss for 1.9!InstallationTo install the miniboss, follow these three steps:-Download the schematic-Drop it in your spawn chunks(you need MCEdit)-Press the button!Snapshots are finnicky! If you've followed the summoning process correctly and he isn't appearing, try moving within render distance of the machine. Make sure you are in snapshot 15w43c or newer!SummoningTo summon springtrap, you will first have to acquire 12 pieces of redstone dust, a wither skull, and a golden sword. Once you have all that, place your redstone in the following pattern on a flat surface to act as a dimensional gate. Next, toss the wither skull and golden sword in the center. The gate will summon in Spring bonnie which will promptly be inhabbited by the spirit of the murderer! Be ready, for once the suit is fully possessed, it will drop to the floor and attack you. You can also rename a skeleton spawn egg Springtrap, but that kinda takes the fun out of it. :PThe fightSpringtrap himself isn't so much a boss as a mini-boss, boasting 60 health and a couple special attacks. The first being that whenever you get near him, your vision will flicker. It's not only disorienting, but will cancel out your sprint. (It's not so easily caught in a still frame, but the blindness effect goes on and off rapidly.)Secondly, Springtrap attracts the spirits of his victims. As such, they manifest as phantoms; flying around and spreading black particles everywhere. He will summon these every few seconds if there is a player nearby. Lastly, Springtrap and the phantoms are fast and will follow you from a long distance away(50 blocks!), so be sure not to spawn him anywhere near your spawn point.It is recommended that you at least have basic diamond armor, if not enchanted, for this fight. Block, Fnaf, Nights, Freddys, Command, Redstone Device, Schematic, Boss

Minecraft Simple Trolls Redstone Device Map Hello and today I bring you, drum roll please! A Troll/prank machine.The first command is simple. It says herobrine entered the game. You can always change what the command blocks say.The second command is very odd. It teleports the player outside the world!How cool is that!The third command is the most simple.All it does is /kill @eE stands for entity.Entity means players mobs paintings droppeditems. So I recommend having a backup of the world before you do this command.The fourth command will trick theplayer into killing themself. (It is hard to explain what it does)The Fifth command, you will need to find out whatthat does.The Sixth command gives you a diamond sword with sharpness 10000.Have fun killing noobs!This is my first schematic so don't get mad if it is not the best.If you enjoyed this please leave a diamond favourite and subscribe!I will add more to this command if you want me to. Redstone Escalator Redstone Device Map This is a redstone escalator I designed after watching a video on Youtube. My brother helped me with ituntil I finished it. The concept is that first you get pushed up by a piston, then to the side by another piston. This pattern continues until you get to your destination. Th bottom pistons start at 1 tick and skip by twos. The top pistons start at two and skip by twos. This is so that the pattern can go like this: bottom, top, bottom, top, bottom, top, etc. Redstone Device

Runic Survival - Vanilla Mod Command Block Schematic Redstone Device Map Hey guys,This is my first vanilla mod, but I personally think I did a pretty good job.Over time, I will update this project, adding more runes and more crafting recipes.Feel free to make youtube videos of this, but please give my channel a shoutout - "Turtle Gaming - Hayden"This mod only works on singleplayer. It will not work correctly with multiple people in one worldThis schematic adds new items known as "runes". The four runes currently in the game are: The Ocean Rune, The Lava Rune, The Nature Rune, and The Death Rune. As well as runes, this adds some crafting recipes.Runes - click to revealOcean Rune:To craft the Ocean Rune, you must meet three requirements: you must be standing on a redstone wire, there must be a cow within five blocks of where you are standing, and you must drop an ink sac on the ground. When you have successfully met the requirements, you will be given an Ocean Rune. This rune, when used, will give you night vision and water breathing for five minutes.Lava Rune:Crafting a Lava Rune is similar to crafting the Ocean Rune. You must have a zombie nearby, stand on a redstone wire, and drop a piece of magenta dye on the ground. You will be given the Lava Rune. When used, you will get resistance and fire resistance for five minutes.Nature Rune:To craft the Nature Rune, drop a cactus green dye on the ground, have a rabbit neaarby, and stand on a grass block. You will get the Nature Rune, and the grass you are standing on will become coarse dirt. The Nature Rune, when used, gives the user five minutes of regeneration and jump boost.Death Rune:To craft the Death Rune, you will need to stand on a block of obsidian and drop an iron ingot and a nether brick. You will also need a Zombie Pigman. However, because the schematic is only to be placed in the Overworld, you will have to find a way to get a Zombie Pigman into the Overworld. When the Death Rune is used, you will get extreme regeneration, resistance, and strength. And a little bit of slowness.Crafting Recipes - click to revealThere are currently four items you can craft: Sponge, Rabbit Hide, Rabbit Stew, and Spawn Eggs.To craft a sponge, drop these four items on the ground: Sunflower, Raw Salmon, String, and a Wheat Seed.To craft a Rabbit Hide, drop these three items: Leather, Rotten Flesh, and a Water Bottle.To craft Rabbit Stew, drop a Cooked Rabbit, a Carrot, a Water Bucket, and a Bowl.To craft a Spawn Egg, you will need to drop an egg and a gold nugget. As well, you will need the items required for the mob you are spawning.When you craft a spawn egg, the mob spawned will have no AI. This makes them much easier to use for crafting runes that need a mob nearby.Mobs currently available with spawn eggs:Zombie (Rotten Flesh)Zombie Pigman (Gold Ingot)Rabbit (Rabbit Hide)Cow (Raw Beef)Pig (Raw Porkchop)Skeleton (Arrow)Wolf (Bone)Mooshroom (Red Mushroom and Milk Bucket)Ghast (Gunpowder)Cave Spider (Spider Eye)Spider (String)Sheep (Pink Wool)Creeper (Sand and Flint)Silverfish (Stone Brick)You can also spawn a Giant, using an egg, a gold nugget, and an iron pickaxe. Because there is no giant spawn egg, the giant is spawned immediately. Redstone Device

MSGT: Small Adjustable Arc Super Heavy TNT Cannon for Movecraft Vehicles Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Spigot/Bukkit server plugin Movecraft to make the turret turn. The redstone will work without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Scattershot: This specific TNT cannon fires 32 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator clock to rapidly dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 9 propellant per barrel, the cannon has a 270 block range). Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between for different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory: After the success of MCST, the Slokovian Worker's Union sought after the power of owning one of the strongest cannons ever invented: the Goliath Main Battery. Using the schematics for the MCST as a base, the engineers designing the cannon increased its size by 60 cubic meters and mounted eight different projectile sources in the dual barrel turrets of the MCST. What they invented was a nightmarish gun that fired an astounding 32 TNT per shot at incredible ranges. Her size meant that she could be mounted on a variety of medium sized or large sized warships, facing the nations around them with the terrifying prospect of facing a battleship that could both severely outmanuever and outgun all other heavy battleships with its firepower. Due to the sheer resource consumption of the cannon, little of them were produced, but when mounted on a warship, they would truly be a force to be reckoned with. Redstone Device, Small, Range, Cannon, Heavy, Long, Arc, Adjustable

MSANT: High Power Long Range Adjustable Arc Naval Cannon for Movecraft Vehicles Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Movecraft plugin for bukkit/spigot servers in order to turn. The redstone will work in vanilla without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Scattershot: This specific TNT cannon fires 8 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator clock to rapidly dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 18 propellant, the cannon has a 350 block range). Note with naval cannons there is a dispenser that contains water. This is for dispensing and retracting the water during firing. Do not load TNT into this dispenser. Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between four different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory:After the four cannons that were designed by Henry Geolovich for the Slokovian Worker's Union, their attention shifted back to the large bulky artillery turrets they possessed. They wished to update the technology with the latest mechanics that they had obtained from their first four turret designs. The Slokovian engineers used the new locking system and blasting control gate inside the firing chamber and wiring of the turret to decrease its size and make it more resource friendly. The final prototype was half the size of the original naval artillery turret, consuming four less TNT per shot. It also granted a much better scatter compared to the original, and the design entered production shortly afterwards. Redstone Device, Small, Range, Naval, Cannon, Heavy, Long, Artillery

In all your posts, simply sign it in the title or description #WeAreConquest. By doing this, we can truly demonstrate a united community and show people that there is more behind what we do than just pictures and videos. The more people who participate, the more chance people will ask what it means. _____________________________________________________________________________ Ok so, if I do this, and people ask what it means, what should I tell them? If this turns out to be something that might progress our community, we will look into creating a source where #WeAreConquest will lead and explain its meaning. Such a source would be a video/blog/forums/subreddit/etc. _____________________________________________________________________________ Alright, this might be a cool idea, and I might be interested, but where to post? Planet Minecraft - planetminecraft.com/ [r] Minecraft (Reddit) - reddit.com/r/Minecraft/ More links will be posted later (Written by Dukonred1) Land Structure, Weareconquest, Ravandorg

Gulliver Mod | 1.9 Vanilla Minecraft Redstone Device Map Hi! Welcome to my version of the Gulliver Mod in Vanilla 1.9.Edit: Discontinued for now.What is the Gulliver Mod?-A mod that allows your to shrink and grow.What has been changed?-Cannot shrink/grow other entities-Different crafting recipes-Only drinkable, two-minute-long potions-Shrunken player cannot walk through .5 block holes-- only 1 block holes.How do I install it?Instructions1.Make sure you have MCedit installed.2. Download the shcematic3. Open a world in MCedit (NOTE: The world must be preloaded through minecraft in 1.9)4. Click "Import" and locate the "Gulliver Mod Vanilla 1.9."5. Place it anywhere you want6. Close MCedit, open Minecraft, then open the world.7. Click the sign "[Activate]" and you are good to go!How do I shrink or grow?Instructions1.Place a cauldron down and fill it with water.2. Throw in a glass bottle. Particles should apear. (If you break the cauldron at THIS time, you will get your bottle back.3. Throw in either of the following options (Also, more purple particles will apear): -Mushroom Stew + Prismarine Crystals = Potion of Shrinking (2:00) -Beetroot Soup + Any sapling type = Potion of Growth (2:00)4. Wait a little under 20 seconds and do not break the cauldron. (No refunds now!)5. The corresponding potion will apear and the cauldron should be drained.(All of this info is listed my clicking the sign on the machine.)6. Drink the potion, and you should slowly transform.What can I do shrunken or grown?•Shrunken: -Walk through 1-block high holes -Look cool as little particles -Not much else -If killed, you become big again.•Grown: -Pave over grass and flowers - Get a view from high up -Hit in one of the 4 directions or down to break blocks (This uses Tnt of course) -Normal mechanics, although glitchy, remain relatively the same such as picking up items on the ground or not being able to walk through blocks. -If you are killed (i.e. the giant beneath you) then you die and become normal again.Known issues:-Tiny people can sometimes glitch through the ground-They can be pushed out of blocks if there is an air space nearby.-Occationally, they glitch and can't walk through a block at times. Usually this is fixed by jumping.-Giants can have a bit of strafing due to barriers pushing them or the "Hit detection" pushing them-When spawning in, if there is a cave beneath you, your giant can get stuck in it.Closing Information:This was originally going to be a "One Commandblock" installation, however, bugs prevented this. Also, there is a lever included with the machine to toggle on/off. This has been in developement for quite some time, so I hope you like it! Thats all for now! Cya! Redstone Device, Vanilla, Potion, Giant, Growth, Gulliver, Shrink

SWU Small Armored Interceptor: Small Fighter Aircraft for Movecraft Air Structure Map This fighter requires the Spigot/Bukkit Server Plugin Movecraft to fly. The redstone will work without any mods or commands, but for the ship to move, the Movecraft plugin must be installed. The plugin along with the tutorial for it can be found here: http://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/movecraft-reloaded---loraxe42s-fork/ Features:x3 Automatic Fire Guns: Used for shooting down enemy fighters and setting alight to exposed lifting cells. Controlled by the lever directly above the comparator in the cockpit.x2 3 meter torpedoes: Used for piercing enemy warship armor. Note that there are buttons in front of the torpedoes with pistons facing them. Push the button to arm the torpedoes. Then launch them using the LaunchTorpedo signs in the cockpit. If the torpedoes are launched before they are armed, they will explode, sinking the fighter and most likely killing the pilot. Frontal Armor: The fighter is coated in fireproof armor from the frontal arc. This gives it a great advantage when fighting warships and enemy fighters. Backstory:The fighter designs of the Slokovian Workers' Union were being produced with extreme efficiency due to their cheap costs and simplicity. Most of their original outdated designs had been replaced by the newest generation, except for the armored interceptor. They set to work updating the design and giving it smaller dimensions and compact size, allowing for the airskiff to have more versatility and ease of deployment on the future carrier designs. They also ridded it of its submersible capability as that was viewed as unnecessary and an overcomplication to the fighter. What they produced was a much more viable and disposable model that was superior to the old one in nearly every way. Air Structure, Small, Movecraft, Armored, Cheap, Interceptor

MSDSNT: Small Naval.Adjustable Arc TNT Cannon for Movecraft Vehicles Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Spigot/Bukkit server plugin Movecraft to make the turret turn. The redstone will work without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Dual Shot: This specific TNT cannon fires 2 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator locking system to dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber on a delay. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 10 propellant, the cannon has a 310 block range). Note that naval cannons have an extra dispenser containing a water bucket. This is to dispense and retract the water during the firing cycle. Do not load TNT into this dispenser. Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between 4 different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory:After the success of the MSDST, the engineers and designers of the Union set their sights on developing a naval version of their dual shot cannon. However, a series of misfortunes struck the Slokovian Worker's Union and the cannon malfunctioned multiple times, taking the lives of three of their technicians in the process. They pushed on despite the failures, and after two weeks of setbacks, finally finished their turret. Just like the MSDST, the MSDSNT was to become a fallback cannon in case the other scattershot turrets became too much of a burden on the ammunition of the Union. Redstone Device, Small, Tnt, Naval, Cannon, Movecraft, Arc, Adjustable

MSDST:Small Long Range Adjustable Arc Cannon for Movecraft Vehicles Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Spigot/Bukkit server plugin Movecraft to make the turret turn. The redstone will work without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Dual Shot: This specific TNT cannon fires 2 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator locking system to dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber on a delay. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 10 propellant, the cannon has a 310 block range). Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between for different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory: After the advancements of the many scattershot cannon designed by their engineers, the Slokovian Worker's Union realized their use of scattershots on nearly all of their warships would be disastrous if they were on a tight budget. They set to work building a more resource friendly cannon than all of which they built before. They decided to incorporate the dual shot technology into their cannons, however they noticed one flaw in the dual shot cannons employed in the War of Acquisition: Their range could not compare to the scattershots that they used. So they decided to install two more propellant dispensers in their standard firing chamber, giving the cannon ten propellant instead of eight. This gave the dual shot a range of over 300 meters, which was more range than almost any other cannon they utilized. These turrets were mass produced and stored in warehouses throughout the union, waiting to be mounted in case their ammunition supplies were depleted to dangerously low levels. Holes & Stuff - Blackh(•)les in Vanilla Minecraft [V 1.4] Redstone Device Map Hi! \o/That's our first published project. we hope you like it! :DMany thanks to MinecraftUniverse and JaredAlecRealm for showcasing our map!(The bugs they encountered are already fixed)Ever wanted to decorate your backyard with black, formless blobs of pure destruction, from which nohing, not even light, could escape? Well, now you can, Blackhholes have arrived to Minecraft! To start, one will need to have the mysterious Nether Star. It will need to be renamed Red Giant in an anvil, and then thrown into the ground. A huge star-like ball will appear. One will need to throw a block of iron at it, and a Blackhole will be born! I. Blackholes are lethal to almost any entity, except items, minecarts and players in gm1 (by default, you can change that). Perfect for traps and mob farms, (just don't get killed by them lol).II. Whiteholes spit out the items caught in their darker cousins, including mob drops. (Free stuff, anyone)?III. Wormholes are the astrophysical cousins of teleport pads. Step in one, and it will take you to the nearest whitehole (loaded chunks only). Fast travel in vanilla, sweet!If one wants to take ones fun to the next level, the powerful Tachyon Armor can be summonned by using wormholes and armor stands (see the chest near the redstone room for details). Good luck trying!If you have MCEDdit installed, all of this can be done in any world you wish, either survival or not. Just place the schematic at your spawn chunks, and voilá.Due to the amount of extra redstone we will have to add, Update 1.5 will take a (possibly long) while to be released. Meteors in one command block Redstone Device Map Command length: 29564Command link: http://pastebin.com/wPcsQjuKThere's also a MCEdit schematic which has a command block with it pre-set in.This adds 3 types of meteors that will randomly spawn (they'll take a while to come but you can change their speed with /gamerule randomTickSpeed )You can also make a block to detect meteors. It'll go yellow when it's about to strike, and red when one is falling. To make one, you place an iron block with redstone dust on top. Stand on top and it'll turn into the block.If your in creative mode you'll get spawn eggs for each meteor.The first type is just an explosionThe second is slightly bigger, but also adds dirt blocks that poison you if you get too close.The third is huge, and is actually 5 explosions from a technical perspecive.Please comment what you think and what you want me to do next. Automatic Potion-tipped Arrow Making Machine (15w45a+) Redstone Device Map Mojang patched out the glitch that my previous potion-tipped arrow making machine used... but no fear - here is a redstone machine for automatically creating potion-tipped arrows, with 100% optimal conversion rate and that can be used while AFK.Input is done through two hoppers - one for arrows and one for potions. The machine will activate whenever it has 6 or more arrows and a potion, and losslessly convert those 6 arrows into potion-tipped arrows for the given lingering potion. It can be loaded up with a very large amount potions and arrows and then left to run while AFK.This currently works in the Minecraft 1.9 snapshots, but of course there's no guarantee that Mojang wont change something, making it break. MSBT: Small Adjustable Arc Ventral TNT Scattershot Cannon for Movecraft Warships Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Spigot/Bukkit server plugin Movecraft to make the turret turn. The redstone will work without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Note that the belly turret requires a hole cut out of the airship's body for the turret to fire at its highest arc. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Scattershot: This specific TNT cannon fires 8 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator clock to rapidly dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 8 propellant, the cannon has a 240 block range). Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between four different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory:After the two successes of Henry Geolovich for the Slokovian Worker's Union, he was once again called upon to build a turret with the same mechanics,. except this time the cannon was to be mounted under the airship instead of on top of it. Henry set to work using the same mechanics that his previous design used, only moving around the wiring so the turret could fit under the airship with minimal difficulty. He succeeded in his design, and the turret was pushed forth into the industry of airship construction. Redstone Device, Small, Tnt, Cannon, Arc, Scatter, Adjustable, Compactor

MSNT: Small Adjustable Arc Naval TNT Turret for Movecraft Vehicles Redstone Device Map Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Scattershot: This specific TNT cannon fires 8 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator clock to rapidly dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber. Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 8 propellant, the cannon has a 240 block range). Note with naval cannons there is a dispenser that contains water. This is for dispensing and retracting the water during firing. Do not load TNT into this dispenser. Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between for different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory: After the ingenious success of the MSST, Henry Geolovich was called upon to build a turret that could fit on submesible warships. He set to work building the turret using the same mechanics and specifications as the original design. Upon finishing the turret, the total increase in size was about 30 cubic meters more than the original. This was necessary as naval cannons include an extra wire for retracting the water. Like the MSST, the cannon became a standard model used in their warship designs. Redstone Device, Small, Tnt, Naval, Cannon, Movecraft, Arc, Adjustable

MSST: Adjustable Arc Compactor Cannon for Movecraft Vehicles/Warships Redstone Device Map This cannon requires the Spigot/Bukkit server plugin Movecraft to make the turret turn. The redstone will work without any mods or commands. Features: Adjustable Arc: The arc can be set on the cannon from the repater next to the trigger button. The cannon has three different arcs to choose from. Compact Size: This turret has incredibly small size due to the redstone that makes the entire cannon work. Using advancements from some of the best cannon designers in minecraft, this cannon is easy to place as it consumes little volume around it. Scattershot: This specific TNT cannon fires 8 TNT of projectiles per round. It uses a comparator clock to rapidly dispense the TNT projectiles into the blasting chamber.Compacting Water Stream: This feature only works with minecraft PC versions 1.8 or higher. Using water to push all the propellant to less than 1 block from the projectiles, the cannon has tremendous range for the amount of TNT it uses to fire(Using 8 propellant, the cannon has a 240 block range).Turning Capability: Using the Movecraft Plugin, the cannon can turn between for different orientations. This is the only feature that will not work in minecraft vanilla versions. Backstory: Designers in the Slokovian Worker's Union soon realized the horrid innefficiency of their heavy artillery cannons after the War of Acquisition had finished. Consuming vast amounts of TNT upon firing, the huge complexity of the gun along with it's resource consumption had become too much of a burden to keep. Scrapping the design, the engineers set to the drawing board to redesign the old artillery turret. After many failed attempts to compacting the technology down to sizeable degree, their expert engineer Henry Geolovich set to work on the project. He designed a new method of holding back the propellant until the gun was ready to fire, and combined that with a new locking and delay systems for the turret. He ended up creating a more resource friendly turret that consumed only 16 TNT per shot, less than half the old design. Not only that, the miniscule size of the cannon would allow it to be mounted on nearly any airship. The cannon, with its large spreadshot, was more than a rival to the other turrets of the era. The MSST was immediately put into production once the first working model was built, and became the new standard cannon for the nation. Guardian "Electric" Fence Land Structure Map From the engineers at Mortissian Military Industries, we bring you the survival friendly, 100% eco friendly, command block free, redstone free (well, except for the on/off switch), guardian powered, electric fence in minecraft! Due to the fact that it doesn't use command blocks, we've incorperated guardians into the design, meaning that it will automatically sort out hostile threats to your home. Yes, you heard right, no more pesky squid wreaking havoc in the pantry any more! Our initial testing of the Guardian "Electric" Fence had our willing volunteers getting attacked four blocks away from the actual fence, and that was not okay. So we added a blinder system that reduced the range to be two blocks away from the fence when it kicks in (what we deemed as a more realistic range).Specs:Tower Range- The electric fence will need a tower every 12 blocks so that the guardians will be able to attack you. (10 iron bars between the tower and blinder).Damage- The electric fence will deal approximately 12 () damage on normal difficulty to an unarmored player.Charge Time- The fence will take around 3 seconds to fully charge between zappings. Range- When a player (or those pesky squid) get within 2 blocks of the fence the system will charge up and zap the unwanted visitor.Size- Each section of the fence (with a tower at both ends) is 20 blocks long, 3 blocks wide, and 4 blocks tall.Note: Some rewiring of redstone is necessary if you are planning to make the fence longer if you want to have an on/off switch. The trap doors may break when rotating the fence section. I have not found a work around yet. My apologies. Mortissian Military Industries is not responsible for any loss of personal items or deaths caused by using the Guardian "Electric" Fence. Land Structure, Redstone, Vanilla, Electric, Free, Fence, Guardian, Protection

Sikorsky submitted the S-70 design for the United States Army's Utility Tactical Transport Aircraft System (UTTAS) competition in 1972. The Army designated the prototype as the YUH-60A and selected the Black Hawk as the winner of the program in 1976, after a fly-off competition with the Boeing Vertol YUH-61. The Argent Worker's Union: Argentum Armoured Transport Land Structure Map Length: 16 metersWidth: 12 metersHeight: 5 metersNation of Origin: ArgentumManufacturer: Argent Mining Inc.Era: Karkassian WarDescription: While Argentum is moreover known for its slums than its military prowess, those who make up the Argent people excel at salvage and repair. Those outcasts who were thrown from the nations of Karkasse, Telucani, and Augsne used past knowledge to help the nation of the poor prepare for battle against the Karkassian Elite. Their vehicles, such as this armoured transport, were created from old mining machinery and salvaged technology dumped into the Pits by foreign powers. Argent soldiers were armed with simple tools, relying on surprise and strength in numbers rather than true tactics. The Argentum Armoured Transport would very uncomfortabley carry 8 into battle (2 drives and 6 soldiers), and was designed to take hits, capable of resisting Karkassian landmines and traversing the harsh terrains of Argentum and Karkasse. Other uses for these vehicles included makeshift blockades and IEDs. Land Structure, Tank, Transport, World, Armoured, Dead, Armored, Company

Mysterious Altar Redstone Device Map Place this altar in your server and see what happens when a curious unsuspecting player lights the netherrack. '/gamerule commandBlockOutput false' recommended. Make sure the bedrock is underground, so that only the altar is visible above ground.For concerned server admins, highlight the following to see the commands contained in this schematic:!SPOILERS!/testforblock ~ ~4 ~1 minecraft:fire/tellraw @a {"text":"Herobrine has joined the game","color":"yellow"}/playsound mob.wither.death @a ~ ~ ~ 1 0.1 0.5/playsound ambient.weather.thunder @a ~ ~ ~ 1 0.1 0.5/effect @a 20 10 1/weather thunder!SPOILERS! Ritual of Fire that makes fire rain from the sky Redstone Device Map One of my viewers requested fire that rains down from the sky with a message in chat - so I came up with this ritual of fire where you place one standing log of jungle wood surrounded by hay bales and throw on a torch to summon a rain of fire from the sky.Not the most polished of concepts, perhaps, but I thought it was pretty cool anyway. You can get it by downloading the world or the schematic, or you can use the "one command" form - just paste the command into a command block, place a button on it and press the button. When you have the machine in your world, press the button on one of the command blocks.If you want a full explanation of how it works - take a look at the video. Block, Fire, Command, Redstone Device, Rain, Ritual

Clifford-Warren House, Plymouth, Massachusetts, USA 3D Art Map The Clifford-Warren House is an historic First Period house at 3 Clifford Road in Plymouth, Massachusetts. The 1-1/2 story gambrel-roofed Cape style house was built c. 1695. It is five bays wide, with a large central chimney. The house is believed to be the third on the property, which was granted to Richard Warren in 1627. Its most notable resident was probably James Warren, a noted political opponent of British rule and a signer of the United States Declaration of Independence. 3d Art, Art, House, Home, Usa, Century, Period, Massachusetts

Custom Unimog Camper Other Map What is a Unimog?Unimog stands for “Universal-Motorgerät” which roughly translated means “universal motorized implement machine”.Unimogs are multipurpose, all-terrain, utility vehicles built by Mercedes-Benz. In addition to extreme off-road capabilities, they are designed to be operated in some of the harshest conditions in the world. Unimogs are widely recognized as the most capable off-road vehicles in the world. There are many types and models of Unimog and the term is similar to "Jeep" in that in refers to many different models within a brand name. The Unimog camper is a grat offroad vehicle plus the edition of being in shelter!. This is my current version my next will have 6 axels and pop outs!

STAG 13X Troop transporter Land Structure Map This is a game inspired vehicle only. This vehicle does not appear in Saints Row 3. Description:STAG is an elite paramilitary police force directed by Commander Cyrus Temple and his subordinate, Kia. It operates under the control and supervision of the United States Government, and acts as a replacement for the SNG at higher Notoriety levels, although the Steelport Police and a minor SWAT presence still remain. STAG has their own, unique arsenal of futuristic weapons and vehicles.STAG is deployed to Steelport following a devastating attack on the Hughes Memorial Bridge in Stilwater, perpetrated by the Luchadores. Senator Monica Hughes, wife of the late Alderman Richard Hughes, gains unanimous approval from the US Senate to initiate "The STAG Initiative" upon the city, essentially putting it under martial law with the intent of eliminating the 3rd Street Saints and The Syndicate for control of the city.STAG arrives in force aboard the aircraft carrier Thermopylae, ambushing The Protagonist, Oleg and Viola DeWynter in Technically Legal, and begins deploying troops and mobile bases throughout the city. Initially relegated to a peacekeeping role in Steelport, STAG's role and actions intensify following the sinking of theThermopylae by the Saints. The city is placed under lockdown and STAG begins to actively combat the four gangs with their specialised commando units, focusing primarily on the Saints. Land Structure, Vehicle, Army, Transporter, Row, Stag, Saints

The Royal Family's Horse Stables 3D Art Map In a world where the king rules, he must be able to travel around with a trustworthy and reliable noble steed. By constructing state-of-the-art stables designed specifically for the king and his family, his noble steed and the horses of his family will be well-fed, well-sheltered, and well-hydrated. The Super-Furnace Redstone Device Map The Super-FurnaceOnce you get your furnace,make a hole into the inside, being careful not to break the dirt blocks. In here, you'll find two droppers.the right dropper is operated by the right button and vice versa. The right dropper is currently full of coal, and the left one is full of porkchops. You can change the porkchops to whatever you want but changing the coal is not recommended. To use your furnace,press the right button once and the left button eight times to put eight porkchops (if you didn't change it) and one coal into the furnace. If you don't see the porkchops then go under the furnace in front of the small furnace and dig in front of it to reveal a hopper. I accidentally put that into the schematic. Punch out the dirt block to reveal the small furnace. 3d Art, Redstone Device, Furnace

Afk System - [Vanilla | Multiplayer] Complex Map Fef-Afk-System — In Vanilla Minecraft!The Fef-Afk-System is a great alternative to the /afk command, which doesn't exist in Vanilla Minecraft.With a very simple command you can experience the feeling of afking once again.The Fef-Afk-System is, of course, MultiPlayer compatible. Install it on your Server, or use it in your own Map. Download the Fef-Afk-System world and learn how to customize it with the built-in tutorial.Download the Fef-Afk-System schematic file and put it into your world/server!Features:- The Fef-Afk-System automatically un-afks players when they move or fly.- The Fef-Afk-System has an integrated cool down system, with customizable times.- Anything can be added to Fef-Afk-System, making it perfect for map-makers that want to allow afking on their maps.- The Fef-Afk-System can be customized, allowing only players matching certain criterias, such as scores, xp levels etc, to use it.- If you download the world, you'll find a built-in tutorial explaining how to customize the most important features!!Rules:You may use and modify this creation in your own world, server or map.You must give appropriate credit.You may not upload it to any other site.It doesn't work?- Check if the command blocks are enabled in the config file of your server- Check if the redstone fill clocks are working. To do that find the two pairs of command blocks with the sign "clock" on them. Break the redstone block between each pair: if the game automatically replaces it, the clock is working correctly. If nothing happens, place manually a redstone block between those two command blocks.- Check if the chunks with the command blocks are fully loaded. If you have pasted the schematic in your world, you may want to move it to the spawn chunks, which always stay loaded. Map, Complex, Server, Block, Command, Blocks, Tutorial, Custom

Create and control you own ENDER DRAGON! Redstone Device Map Hello Minecraft lovers, today I have something nice for you!I made an Ender Dragon that can be summoned, ridden and freezed.How? Well, there are some instructions:♦ Step 1) Activate the redstone clock by breaking and replacing the redstone block next to the sign.♦ Step 2) Put on slot 1 of your hotbar a Nether Star, on slot 2 a Glass Block. Then take another nether star and throw it in ground. This will summon an Ender Dragon. IT IS RECOMENDED to be in air while throwing the nether star, otherwise the Dragon can be buggy. ♦ Step 3) Click on the green particles to ride it! Holding the Nether Star will make it move in the direction you are facing ( North, South, East, West, NE, NW, SE, SW , Up, Down ). Holding the Glass on slot 2 will make it freeze. IT IS RECOMENDED to freeze it before you dismount the Dragon. DO NOT PRESS SPACE while riding the Dragon. If you have problems and want to reset, write /kill @e[type=EnderDragon,c=1] and /kill @e[name=Apasa,type=EntityHorse,c=1] . It is a little buggy, but is the best I can made by the time being.So I hope you will enjoy it! Redstone Device

ATVOTA-1 Airship Personnel Carrier Air Structure Map Overview:The ATVOTA-1 (Armored Transport Vehicle Of The Airborne) is an infantry fire support and personnel carrier vehicle designed by Gamebreaker Automations Pmc.This vehicle emphasizes on infantry protection and fire support and as such carries the least amount of fire power in exchange for the most amount of internal space for its overall size.History:Follownig the doctrine used in ground vehicles, the ATVOTA-1 derives its shape, design, and function from ground-based tracked armoured personnel carriers and infantry fighting vehicles.Bearing many similarities such as a minimal base operating crew, consisting of a single pilot and an engineer, as well as the ability to carry a fairly large complement of 9 reserve troops and their equipment in a protected rear compartment.The carried troops are geared for various roles, and are supplied with armor in three main camo schemes: Woodland, Desert, and Arctic. Additional tools and ammunition are also carried on board.Armament:The ATVOTA-1's armament consists of a single Model 4/1-120.The cannon fires low pressure explosive ammunition to a range of roughly 110-120 blocks, and has a fixed arc and velocity.1x Model 4/1-120 Low Pressure HowitzerProtection:The ATVOTA-1's armor is composed mainly of solidified QUARTZ type armor for the sides and most of the hull, while SLAB type plating is used to protect the top and bottom parts against explosions.The front face is sloped to provide maximum deflection capability against hard projectile attacks from frontal and ground attacking positions. View ports are multi-layered with ballistic glass, and the pilot's view port is further protected with SLAB block armor plating.The troop compartment is built with thicker, broader walls and floors so as to provide maximum protection against anti-personnel attacks.Crew:The ATVOTA-1 is crewed by the following operators:1x Pilot (controls the vehicle and its main gun)1x Engineer (responsible for the ship's engines and carried troops)9x Additional Troops (Equipment included) Air Structure, Redstone, Carrier, Transport, Airship, Movecraft, Apc, Troop

Redstone Hidden Underground Base Exit V1 Redstone Device Map There are a lot of designs for hidden trap doors out there, allowing you to enter your undergroud lair. But how, I asked, is one supposed to get back up and out of that hole. Why with this of course, it is my first design for a trap door style exit which is completely hidden against the groud from the surface. M113 APC/IFV (Summer Digital Version) Land Structure Map A replica of the M113 Armored Personnel Carrier / Infantry Fighting Vehicle. Summer Digital Camo Version. The M113 is light APC / IFV designed by Food Machine Corp from the US. It was designed in 1960 and first fielded in 1962. It is air-transportable and semi-amphibious due to its lightweight aluminium construction. Its armament varies according to its use, known weapons include machineguns, autocannons, grenade launchers, and missile launchers. With over 80,000 units of all variants built and used by over 50 countries to the present, the M113 is the most widely used armored fighting vehicle of its type to date.This version is armed with a single automatic Fireball autocannon fed through a dropper. The vehicle also contains three sets of armor and supplies. The weapon can be safely loaded from the inside of the vehicle. IMPORTANT: Several blocks such as Stairs, Dispensers, Droppers, and Hoppers may not rotate accordingly if the schematic is rotated, mirrored or flipped. US Navy PBR Mk.2 Water Structure Map Patrol Boat, River Mk.2 version.An attempted replica of the light patrol boat used by the US from 1966 to 1971. The PBR was used most prominently in the Vietnam War where it was used to harass weapon and supply boats in the rivers of Southeast Asia. The PBR's armament varied according to its role and users. Known weapons included the M2 heavy machinegun, M60, Hs.404, Mk 19, and even flamethrowers in some versions. This second version of the Patrol Boat is armed with a self-loading howizer/cannon, which can be fired from the inside of the bridge. The cannon has a range of approximately 110 blocks forward.Schematic comes with 3 named crew members (Helmsman, Gunner, and Deckhand), each of which sell custom items, consumables, and ammunition. All are immobile via attribute editing.Standard gear and ammunition are loaded on board.The buttons and levers in the bridge play radio-like sounds via command blocks. Place in rivers that are surrounded by swamps, forrests, roofed forrests, or jungles for best effect. Place three blocks into the water, such that the ladders on the sides are right above the surface. IMPORTANT: Several blocks such as Stairs, Dispensers, Droppers, and Hoppers may not rotate accordingly if the schematic is rotated, mirrored or flipped. Redstone, Ship, Water Structure, Boat, Patrol, Historical, Functional, Pbr

It was fitted with a 30mm RARDEN autocannon and crewed by three operators. With a combat weight of 4.6 tonnes, the Fox had a top speed of 104 kmh, and was light enough to be transportable by aircraft.This version is armed with a single automatic Fireball autocannon fed through a dropper. Redstone Dance Machine (Minecraft DDR Minigame) Redstone Device Map Redstone Dance MachineHello internet! As my first ever upload I thought I would share this with the world, since it is my first ever complex redstone machine.It took me about 10 hours to complete, with the first functional version completed after 6 hours. Then the next two hours was messing around, optimizing some parts and compacting it down, however that didn't work out so I trashed my "development build". The next hour was spent on implementing sZPeddy's randomizers, which were far more compact and far less messy than my randomizers. I gave this change the name "Revision II". I later altered the redstone clock to shorten the downtime of the machine. This means you're now constantly on the move to catch the next light. I called this change "Revision III". Then my final hour was spent on compacting the machine down, wich consisted of wedging the clock into some unused, hollow space on the inside of the circutry. I also fixed a bug where the randomizer had non-uniform timing. I call this Revision IV. (Revision I, II and III do not exist anymore)Thanks for checking this build out, and I hope you enjoy it!Note: The inputs via the pressure plates are slightly delayed, so you have to hit the plate just before the light goes out. The two dispensers are filled with prize items, such as diamond. After a successful round 14 items will be dispensed.Here is a list of resources you need to survival build this (Note: The items in the droppers are not included in the resources list!):2 dispensers8 sticky pistons31 white wool15 orange wool15 light blue wool33 yellow wool15 lime wool24 pink wool16 gray wool40 cyan wool15 purple wool16 blue wool6 brown wool73 green wool25 red wool38 black wool394 stone slabs183 redstone dust67 redstone torches1 jukebox67 repeaters18 redstone lamps9 gold plates15 comparators5 hoppers5 droppers1 lime stained clay1 red stained clay11 sea lanternsThe wool can be substituted for any building material (except the wool on the outside) since it only colorcodes the circuts:Instead of the above listed wool, use this:6 white wool15 yellow wool10 red wool3 black wool328 additional building materials (or 656 additional stone slabs, making a total of 1083 stone slabs; 16 stacks 14; craftable with 519 stones; 8 stacks 7; always place double stone slabs instead of wool)There are 5 droppers which require certain items. Fill dropper#1 with 58 16-stackable items (e.g. empty buckets or snowballs). Fill droppers #2 and #3 with a non-stackable item (e.g. a wooden hoe) and 5 16-stackable items. Fill droppers #4 and #5 with a non-stackable item, a 16-stackable item and 16 64-stackable items (e.g. redstone dust, cobblestone, etc.). Check the image "dropper info" as reference. You can also substitute the sea lanterns for glowstone, if you can't obtain any prismarine.I do not hold myself responsible for overexercising, starvation, physical injuries, etc. that occur during extensive gameplay. This is a passive machine with no exposed moving parts. Game, Redstone, Redstone Device, Fun, Advanced, Colorcoded, Mediumsize

HCZ - Hardcore Zombies Redstone Device Map Setup Guide (please watch before asking questions) -----> Click HereOriginal series ---> Hardcore ZombiesHey Planet Minecraft! Today I'm happy to bring to you HCZ - Hardcore Zombies. This is a spin-off of Shotbow's MineZ but with a vanilla twist. By clicking the emerald block you start your adventure somewhere random in the world and have to work with your teammates to survive and kill the Ender Dragon with only one life. In this game mode there are no mobs except for Zombies, Pigman, Giants, Spiders and Blaze. The first three on the list have unique qualities and I recommend that you watch the first video of the series in order to understand what they do completely. Because there are no Endermen in this world, you'll need to fight the Giant, a mini boss who drops 5 enderpearls which can also be used as grenades! Note, that it is very laggy when there are multiple people playing who are spread out from one another. Pick the "spawn together" option to avoid this lag and try and preload chunks before starting the game to maximise the experience. If you have any bugs to submit, or if something isn't working as it should, please let me know either here in a comment or a better option is to message me on reddit at www.reddit.com/u/fridge2177Good luck and enjoy!**Always check to make sure all clocks are on and working** Zombies, Redstone Device, Hardcore, Giant, Pigmen, Giants, Hcz, Fridge2177

A 1-wide super compact vending machine/shop Redstone Device Map Any youtubers wanting to make this tutorial in video form are 100% free to do so. Just send a link here, and give credit. I know alot of people could find this very useful.This was something made through trial and error. I've made tons of variants that evolved throughout the course of multiple months.My first vending machines were impressive enough, but they didn't have the needed redstone clock to allow the player to throw multiple items and dispense correctly.Then when I altered a clock's configuration to be 1 block wide, this allowed me to not only make it possible to dispense the right amount even if 64 was thrown in, but it also allowed me to make the clock this compact, without hoppers or quirks or glitches.All that aside, this won't work correctly if the hopper settings are changed (e.g. slowed down to "reduce lag") or if the redstone tick speed is adjusted Redstone Device

Insert 4 gold to go through! (How to make door open to a key or a fee) Redstone Device Map This is a redstone device that may appeal shopkeepers, vault makers, mapmakers, or just redstone lovers in general. When you throw 4 of your chosen item into the hopper, the door opens, but only for a short period of time.Ideas you can use this for: - Mapmaking: Use these 4 keys to open the door, but be quick, or you shall not pass (Unless you change the piston side of the mechanism into a T-Flipflop, or change around the wiring, so it just opens a regular door.) - Entrance Fee for something like perhaps a skin comp (Insert 4 gold to play) - Entrance fee for a ride? - Key to a VaultDimensions (redstone mechanism): 2 wide x 5 long x 5 tall (2 above floor level)Also, you can adjust how many items it costs to throw in with the 3 repeaters.3 repeaters makes it cost 42 repeaters makes it cost 31 repeater makes it cost 2Just make sure to put a block above any repeaters replaced with redstone dustEDIT: There is an MCEdit Schematic for you to see the whole thing in 3d Redstone Device

Automated Minecart Station Redstone Device Map Automatic Minecart StationThis little setup provides a convenient way of saving time when it comes to minecart rail systems. It might seem a little bit overcomplicated, but trust me, it's a sign of productivity and efficiency, which other players will respect you for. Also it definitely beats breking and placing the minecart by hand.So for those of you who are interested in building it yourself:You require- 4 redstone torches- 1 repeater- 1 comparator- 3 redstone dust- 1 dispenser- 1 dropper- 1 hopper- 1 sand- 1 cactus- any pressure plate (I prefer gold or iron, because they deactivate almost immediately after you get in the minecart)- some powered rail to get the minecart started- your preferred building materialsInfo: You don't have to make the connection between the two minecart lines, it's just there to ensure incoming minecarts don't accidentally go to the wrong side. If you make the connection you might have to power one or both curved rails to turn them to the correct position.Also yes, I know one of the rails is oriented the wrong way, the clone command somehow managed to mess that up. It displays how it would be in the Schemagic tho. Minecart, Redstone, Redstone Device, Station, Automatic

Flower Farm v3 Redstone Device Map Bonemeal-Piston Flower Farm, UPDATEDPlace Bonemeal in the renamed "Bone Meal" dropper.Wait a couple of minutes and gather flowers in the renamed "Flowers" dispenser.OPERATION RANGEPlace at least 3 bonemeal for the machine to work properly.We recommend using 1-2 stacks each time, wait and gather the flowers, repeat the process.Do not overload the machine with more than 9 stacks. Flowers may disappear in some servers due to a limit in dropped items.IMPORTANT: The type of flowers are defined by the biome u put the machine in.To reveal the flower pattern in the biome, place bonemeal directly to a flat land of grass, cut all the tall grass, and leave the flowers, repeat the process until u can notice the flower pattern. Flowers are defined by the X and Y coordinates, the exact same flower will spawn everytime u place bonemeal. Redstone, Redstone Device, Farm, Flower, Piston, Flowerfarm, Bonemeal

No mod - Random structure generation Redstone Device Map PS : I'm french = maybe some mistakes :p Hi guys, recently I made a little system which create structures randomly in your minecraft world (like the villages and desert temples). Actually There's only 9 structures, but I will add some more in the futur. There are chests in these structures, but it is empty --', so I'm gonna make loot table for it. You can make your own structure and send it (a picture, a NBT folder or a MCEDIT schematic) to me, like that I'll add it to the system (It can't be bigger than 32*32*32).Current number of structures : 32I'll add more in the next updatesVersion compatibility :1.9 : nop1.10 : okHow to install :Windows+R%appadata% .minecraft -> save -> "your world" Put the structures folder in this folderThen :.minecraft -> save -> "your world" -> dataPut the loot_tables folder in this folderIn minecraft : /give @p structure_block Put it in LOAD mode and rename it StructureCommand Load the structure (PS : Load the structure near your world spawn or the system won't work if you're too far)Don't forget to activate the button for the scoreboard I hope you'll have fun with this little vanilla mod :) Structure, Redstone Device, Vanilla, Mod, 16w21b

No mod - Better ArmorStand Redstone Device Map PS : I'm french = maybe some mistakes :p This system can :-add arms to ArmorStand-change the ArmorStands size-make them visible/invisible-change the ArmorStands position. There are 7 different position available for the moment. If you have idea for custom position, send me a picture of it, and I'll probably add it to the system ;)How does it work :There is a chest with items in it, throw these items on an ArmorStand and it'll change (you'll maybe have to wait a few second for more changes).Version compatibility :1.9 : ok Download the MCEdit1.10 : ok Download the world save / MCEditHow to install : Windows+R %appadata% .minecraft -> save -> "your world" -> structure Put the NBT documents in this folder In minecraft : /give @p structure_block Put it in LOAD mode and rename it ArmorStandCommandLoad the structure (PS : Load the structure near your world spawn or the system won't work if you're too far)Don't forget to activate the button for the scoreboard I hope you'll have fun with this little vanilla mod :) Redstone Device, Vanilla, Mod, Armorstand, 16w21b

Annihilator-Class Stealth fighter/bomber Air Structure Map I just wanted in on the ship-building action.STATSClass: Stealth Fighter/Bomber (SF/B)Usage: Recon, fast attack, aerial battles, bombing, hole pokingDims: 14x3x4Weapons: 1x nanostorm missile launcherShields: NoneArmor: Honeycombed obsidian and nether brick hullEngines: 1x darkness thrusterPower source(s): 1x darkness generatorDisplacement: 14 tonsMax velocity (Air): Mach 3 (3704.4 km/hMax range: Tests inconclusiveEndurance: Tests inconclusiveCarried vessels: NoneCrew: 1 pilotPerformance: Dependent on pilot (Slime Legion pilots are encouraged to create their own flying style and use it on solo missions)BACKGROUNDThe Annihilator-class is the most commonly used ship in the Slime Legion, and for good reason. The Annihilator-class boasts some of the Slime Legion's greatest technological advancements; honeycombed obsidian, the nanostorm missile, the darkness generator and thruster, and the time warp module. Honeycombed obsidian is created by pouring liquid obsidian into molds, creating obsidian that is both strong and light. The nanostorm missile is similar to a hellstorm missile, except instead of mini missiles, it deploys exploding nanites, creating an even larger area of destruction, making this weapon highly effective against both organic units and other fighters. The darkness generator absorbs shadows, an infinite resource, and converts them into a liquid form, which is then used used as fuel for the darkness thruster. Finally, the Slime Legion's greatest invention; the time warp module. Unlike a time-slow device, which slows down time for everyone except the user, the time warp module only temporarily alters the user's perception of time. In other words, the time warp module slows down time for everyone, including the user, so that even though the user moves slower, they have "more time" to react, because they don't have to make split-second decisions. To everyone else, everything is moving at normal speed, but to the user, everything moves extremely slow. The time warp module also solved the problem that came with the time-slow device; if everything except the user was slowed and/or stopped, the user would continue to age normally, with everything else aging slower. Also, the ship's tip is extremely sharp, making it useful for poking holes in other ships.LINK TO THE SHIP I TESTED ON HERE Air Structure, Fighter

Kestrel Mk.II / Mk.2 Corvette Air Structure Map Overview:The Kestrel 2 Corvette is an upgraded expansion of the earlier Kestrel Mk.1.It carries over many aspects in terms of armament, protection, and utility from more recently released designs that allow for improved firepower and survivability while still maintaining its low manufacture and deployment costs.History:The Kestrel 2 was conceived as a service-extension upgrade for the Kestrel 1, following user reports of extensive losses and disablements of active Kestrel 1's.These incidents were mostly attributed to mechanical failures and the small size of the ship which carried a very limited amount of lifting cells and internal space.As such, its hull size was expanded from a width of 17 blocks to 21 blocks to accommodate the larger gun turret and improved modules.The new gun would be a naval scattershot weapon, allowing for improved firepower and submersible capability.The lower half of its hull was also remodelled for amphibious movement. Since it had been fitted with the same weapon system as the Piranha TBD, the Kestrel 2 could also ambush from underwater using its high cannon arc.This expanded volume allowed a torpedo bay to be installed, giving the Kestrel 2 an added edge against larger heavily armored targets.Also added was a proper crew quarters just behind the torpedo bay. This was added in response to reports of earlier Kestrel 1's having very limited operating range due to crew fatigue.Similar to its predecessor, the Kestrel 2 would be fielded for light to medium risk operations including but not limited to light skirmishing, fire support, patrolling, and ground attack.It still functioned well as a complement or defensive vehicle as its size increment was not very significant, allowing it to maintain its small profile amongst larger battleships and destroyers.As its namesake implies, its main attacking pattern is to hover or otherwise "scan" the target area form a height of 30-50.Its frontal machineguns can also be loaded with Arrows or Splash Potions for anti-infantry effect.Armament:The Kestrel 2 carries a single 8ST (8-Shot Scatter Turret) mounted in the centre of the hull that is controlled from the cockpit. The weapon is modified from a licensed copy of the MNST Gun system from Heavy Hussar Industries.The forward armament has since been doubled from 4 to 8 machineguns, that can be loaded with Fire Charges, Arrows, and Splash Potions.The flanks of the vehicle have 3 embedded machineguns that are wired to fire from the cockpit.The tail section is guarded by a quad (improved from two) machinegun array under the engine room.A Torpedo Bay has now been added due to the larger size of the Kestrel 2, further improving its armor penetrating capabilities against larger targets. These tubes fire the M7T Tandem-charge Torpedo. These can be remotely fired from the helm.1x 8ST Gun System8x Frontal Machineguns3x Broadside Machineguns (Left and Right sides)4x Rear Machineguns2x M7T Torpedo TubesProtection:The hull of the Kestrel is encased in cyanized, solidified CLAY-type armour casing. Glass parts of the vehicle such as the windshield and viewports are double-layered with ballistic glass, and additional SLAB-type plating is used to reinforce the engine deck and belly. Since the Kestrel 2 has been remodelled for naval use, much of the lower body has since been rebuilt with cast iron.As is now standard with current production GameBreaker Automations vehicles, the Kestrel 2 is now fitted with an APS (Active Protection System) module that is activated from the gunner's position. The APS protects against explosive and incendiary projectiles.The APS module has now been corrected following user reports of malfunctions after firing of the main gun.Crew: The crew layout consists of 4 operators: 1. Pilot/Commander2. Cannoneer3. Broadside Gunner4. Tail Gunner Equipment, consumables, and ammunition are carried onboard. Air Structure, Redstone, Warship, Corvette, Airship, Movecraft, Functional

HMA Daring (aka the Flying Fishbowl) Air Structure Map The Daring class were built as scout vessels to find hostile ships and sink them if possible. the ships normaly attacked in groups of 3. the Darings or Flying Fishbowls as they were nicknamed by there crews were fast ships with a top speed of 36 knots, they would have been faster but there sphere shaped hulls ment they could not go faster without structural failure. the ships had 3 inch thick armour, a single foreward facing 4 inch gun, 2 4m torpedos in a turret, and 12 AA machine guns, 6 on each side 3 on the front and 1 on the tail. the ships were heavily engaged in the first britain-japan war, of the 30 ships built only 15 still flew by the end of the war, and by the end of the second war only 10 were still operational. the fishbowls had crews of about 4 men who worked and slept in shifts.the Darings never really had much success aganst the IJN, and had developed a bad reputation with crews by the end of the 2 wars, the reason was that when the ship sank or took a hit due to the positions of the torpedo bay and the gun, if the ship took a hit it was almost impossible for the gun crew and the torpedo crews to escape, also the fishbowls were very fragile and easy to kill.the only success the fishbowls really saw was aganst italian fighters after the wars and in escorting convoys during the wars.the ship and torpedos work using movecraft but the guns should work without it.credit: Baccayarro for movecraft and the gun design, Vpoliisi for helping me put it up on here. Air Structure, Airship, Movecraft, Flight

While obviously an important piece of UNSC field equipment, the M831 is rarely committed to combat because of its equally obvious lack of weaponry, with the rear bed of the vehicle featuring an expanded seating compartment. Realistic Survival Challenge / Adventure Map Hey guys :D How's it going? I'm back with a cool long term challenge, it's realistic survival. In this world you have thirst, temperature, and infection to worry about. Your thirst will go down every so often and running or jumping will accelerate that process. If your thirst drops to zero you will begin to die, drink water bottles to bring your thirst back down. Your temperature will go down be default as the entire world is a cold tundra, you can either build a fire, by dropping a stick and a flint on the ground or by wearing leather armor. Standing on snow, in water or holding snow in your inventory will drastically decrease your temperature, being in the nether will raise your temperature very high and being in the end will decrease it by a lot. You will start to die if your temperature is 110 and above or 31 and below. Your infection is increased by being near zombies, if your infection reaches 100 you will die, the only way to decrease it is to wait it out; your infecting level will go down every 10 minuets There are only zombies in the over world, that being said the zombies will spawn a lot more, and be careful because there is no natural regeneration and it is hardcore. You only get 16 enderpearls, so use them wisely.Although is isn't required there are 30 custom goals to give you some sort of purpose. (If you make a video out of this please tell me) One of the goals is cut, due to formatting errors out so just ignore it. This challenge is sadly only single player compatible. sorry >.< But it is good for live streaming (*cough* CaptianSparklez *cough cough*) or just having fun.Features I wish to add:1. Stamina bar2. Special boss zombies3. More custom crafting recipes4. All the mechanics put into one command block format5. Multiplayer compatibilityBugs: None that I know of, though if you see one PLEASE tell me so I can fix it :)There will be the schematic for download if any one wants to add the mechanics to their own world. :) And that's about it, as always feedback is awesome :D and if we can make it to 10 diamonds I'll release a second. better version for you guys :D Please Donate!Thanks :) TrinityCraftP.S. I would like a video to use on this project , so if any one makes a video I'd love to use it on this project. Thanks :D Adventure, Minecraft, Challenge, Realistic, Block, Command, Hardcore, Hard

Fully functional Katyusha rocket launcher vehicle, high fire rate [schematic] Redstone Device Map "Katyusha multiple rocket launchers are a type of rocket artillery first built and fielded by the Soviet Union in World War II. Multiple rocket launchers such as these deliver explosives to a target area more quickly than conventional artillery, but with lower accuracy and requiring a longer time to reload. They are fragile compared to artillery guns, but are inexpensive and easy to produce. Katyushas of World War II, the first self-propelled artillery mass-produced by the Soviet Union, were usually mounted on trucks. This mobility gave the Katyusha (and other self-propelled artillery) another advantage: being able to deliver a large blow all at once, and then move before being located and attacked with counter-battery fire."This rocket launcher vehicle contains a functional redstone tnt cannon which has a very high fire rate. It can be fired by activating a lever on the side of the vehicle. To load it go on the platform under the rockets and put TNT into all dispensers. Update: I built in a safety mechanism which makes sure that the cannon fires only when all dispensers are loaded. I also added a lamp near the activation lever, when the lamp is on it means that the redstone pulse is active and the cannon should not be loaded (if you load it nonetheless it will consume tnt, but it won't blow up thanks to the safety I added)I used the 1.6.4 version of Minecraft to build this (I know it's old, but I'm a traditionalist ;)). I hope that in the newer versions nothing relevant for the proper functioning of this machine has changed in the redstone mechanics and TNT physics. Kalesa - Spanish colonial transportation from the Philippines (118th Independence day Special) Land Structure Map First at all. Happy 118th Independence day of the Republic of the Philippines!A kalesa (also caritela/karitela) is a horse-drawn calash used in the Philippines. It was one mode of transportation introduced to the islands in the 18th century by Spanish colonizers, and was initially reserved for only nobles and high-ranking civic officials.These are today rarely used in the streets except in the tourist areas of old cities and some rural areas.When the kalesa was introduced in the 18th century, it grew into a significant mode of transportation in the islands. Rich, educated Filipinos known as the ilustrados used the kalesa for personal travel as well as for the transport of goods to nearby areas. During the American Occupation, the City of Manila was teeming with kalesas, but these declined in popularity after the devastation of the Second World War.The kalesa driver is commonly called as kutsero (Tagalised from cochero, "car driver"). When a kutsero wants the horse to turn right, he says "mano” while he says "silla” to make the horse turn.Although the kalesa has become a rarity, century-old examples are still preserved in areas of the Philippines, such as in Vigan and Laoag. Kalesas can also be found in Intramuros, where they cater to tourists and Binondo in the City of Manila, a well as in Iligan, where decorated calesas can be taken for a ride along a specific street. In Cagayan, kalesas are common, especially in Tuao and other municipalities of the province. In Tuguegarao, the carriages are a part of the traffic along with private cars, motorcycles, tricycles, jeepneys, trucks, and bicycles.Project Guide line :This Project is for only Personal and non-commercial use.Wanna use my project to your server/s? Armed Fighter Drone Air Structure Map Hey guys, I'm finally back with another project. This time I've built an armed fighter drone. The drones are designed to help bigger ships in combat.The engine and cannons are state-of-the-art technology. The cannons have a very high output, so they are capable of destroying ships many times larger than itself. The powerful engine on the back allows the drone to travel at very high speeds and to be very maneuverable at the same time.The arms at the side are also capable of turning 360 degrees, so the cannons can fire at every direction except sideways.Well, there is nothing much else to this drone. Anti-Mob Hut Redstone Device Map SCHEMATIC HAS BEEN ADDED! Go to the schemagic tab (above the picture) to view in your browser!Hey guys, this is a cool little hut that I made. It has pistons which can make the hill push out and pull in. It is completely mob proof.There is a lever inside the house to push and pull the hill. When the hill is pushed out, the trap is covered. When monsters come, you can pull in the hill and they will fall in the trap and will be unable to get out. Then, push the hill out again and monsters in the trap will suffocate and die, and their items will be transported to you through a hopper system. The world is currently 13*13, which is slightly smaller than a chunk.Please leave a diamond if you liked! House, Redstone Device, Piston, Mob, Safe, Proof

Calculate time from just seconds w/h timer Redstone Device Map Time calculation by subtraction:I made this device to calculate Hours ,Minutes , and seconds. It can take an unformatted second count such as 256 and by subtraction find out how many minutes.Here is how it would look like in code: pastebin linkTo use the device click the button to add the scoreboard values, then use this command:/scoreboard players (username) set seconds The larger the seconds value is, the longer it takes. Just thought this may be somehow useful for you guys to have.UPDATE: Added timer functionFixed bug where it wouldn't calculate seconds count under 60 UPDATE 2:Reduced size from 19W x 8L x 7H to 19W x 7L x 5H Redstone Device, Time

And he answered, saying, 'My name is Legion, for we are many.'" ~ Luke 8:30Length: 19 metersWidth: 19 metersHeight: 24 metersManufacturer: Pegasus Corp.Era: Karkassian WarDescription: The Legion-Class bomber is an egg-shaped ship within Fonte's fleet, built with the capability to remotely activate its functions. While the ship can be used manually, the Legion-Class was built with Fonte's limited population in mind. An entire fleet of these ships, as well as others, can be controlled from a single ship, negating the need for massive amounts of soldiers and allowing for wide-scale destruction of terrain. For piloting the ship manually, the lower deck allows for the creation of a "ship marker," making sure that the ship can be tracked and scanned by other ships in Fonte's fleet. The upper deck allows for the placement of bomb markers, removal of all markers, and the scanning of bomb markers, triggering the explosives. Hellcat-Class Light Gunship Air Structure Map Built for Norzeteus Space Resource Pack by Norzeteus.[CLASSIFIED]The Hellcat-Class Light Gunship is the most common gunship utilized by the United Nations Armed Forces. It was introduced in C.E. 2344.Being a gunship, the Hellcat is equipped with generally heavier weaponry than other crafts of similar size, namely its four Class-2 Fully-Automatic Plasma Cannons. Accommodating such heavy weaponry on a small ship adds mass and reduces maneuverability, limiting the Hellcat's effectiveness in dog-fighting. Instead, the Hellcat is well-suited for defensive positions and sustained assaults against larger ships, especially when paired in a squad with other Hellcats.Technical InformationDimensions (m): 11L x 9W (7 w/recessed cannons) x 3HDimensions (feet): 36.1L x 29.5W (23 w/recessed cannons) x 9.8HMax Speed (Vacuum): ~625,000 kph (~390,000 mph)Max Speed (Atmospheric): ~2,750 kph (~1,710 mph)Armaments: 4x Class-2 Fully-Automatic Plasma Cannon (max 300 rpm each)Engines: 1x 2m Class-A Nuclear Fusion EngineCrew: 1 pilot, 1 gunnerAccommodations: Air: 15 man-hours; Food: None; Water: NoneDesk of:Commander Archibald HaddockDirectorOffice of Naval TechnologyUnited Nations Armed Forces Air Structure, Spaceship, Space, Ship, Craft, Starship, Machine, Hell

No mod - Special gear Redstone Device Map PS : I'm french = maybe some mistakes :p Hi guys, This system'll add new armors which will allowed you to use some spells.To create your armor, build the altar like this (there is an altar with the system) :Then, drop 1 nether star, 1 diamond boots/ leggings/ chestplate/ helmet.You need to have more than 20 level.After, drop one of the element you want to merge with your armor (there is a chest with the different element available).PS : Drop the items on the diamond blockWhen you wear all the armor with the same element, you'll be able to use your spells.You need experience to use your spell.Spell 1 :Sneak + Look down + JumpSpell 2 :Sneak + Look up + JumpCurrent number of gear : 2I'll add more in the next updatesVersion compatibility : 1.9 : ok Download the MCEdit1.10 : ok Download the world save / MCEditHow to install : Windows+R %appadata% .minecraft -> save -> "your world" Put the structures folder in this folder In minecraft : /give @p structure_block Put it in LOAD mode and rename it GearCommandLoad the structure (PS : Load the structure near your world spawn or the system won't work if you're too far) Don't forget to activate the button for the scoreboard I hope you'll have fun with this little vanilla mod :) Redstone Device, Vanilla, Mod, Power, Gear, 16w21b
