7 Custom Mobs Schematic Other Map This is a set of 7 custom mobs that spawn naturally in your world. It is a mostly lag free system (I will be working on updating it so that it is even less lag filled). Special Mob Abilities1. The Dracaenae -Every 30 or so seconds, the Dracaenae will get a large speed boost, and the player will get slowness -Has an 8.5% chance of dropping the Dracaenaen Thorn, which gives status effects when in the offhand2. The Creator -Takes no knockback -Doesn't do much else3. The Vashta Nerada -When a player is within 10 blocks of the Vashta Nerada, they are given a blindness effect and the Vashta Nerada will teleport randomly around the player -Switches between two swords, one with a powerful knockback and one with a powerful fire effect4. The Mogadorian -When a player is within 5 blocks of a Mogadorian, they are given a blindness and slowness effect5. The Magonian -Every 90 seconds, the Magonian is given a levitation effect for 5 seconds and a resistance effect for 10 seconds, making it invulnerable after flight -Has a 8.5% chance to drop the Magonian Spyglass, which when held in the offhand, zooms in on where the player is looking, but the player cannot move6. The Shaman -Has a very high percent chance of summoning more zombies when attacked, and naturally summons a few in every now and then. Very slow, but hits like a truck. -Drops its own head, which gives status effects when held in the offhand, and the Shaman's Hoe, which when held in the offhand, summons a zombie every 75 seconds that will not attack you. 7. The Grunt -Not shown in the pictures, but it is just a buffed Husk. Nothing special about it. Can spawn in any biomeIf you have any ideas for more mobs that you would like to see, I would love to hear them!Enjoy! Zombies, Custom, Commands, Mobs

Cow Cooker 6x6x6 Redstone Device Map Hey again!This is no way the BEST cooker out there but suits my needs just fine and works pretty well. Thought I'd share it.ADDITIONAL NOTES- Needs to be pasted while facing "EAST".- I've put a few signs here and there in this build so you know how to get it started.- I've also placed cobblestone on the outsides to show where you can access the dispensers and cow breeding area if you even need to get to them.EXTRA INFO- Get cows in the top section (in front of the top dispenser) and breed them until you're happy with the amount you'd like in there.- Let them grow.- Remove the left and right stone slabs behind the top two glass blocks.- Breed adult cows to produce baby cows and let them filter down each side (make sure to turn the water off before the baby cows drown!).- Let them grow and cook em'....cook em' good!- Walk into the area where the two buttons are to collect your loot and enjoy your munch. Fully Automatic Brewing Station 2 (FABS2) Redstone Device Map Here is version 2 of the "Fully Automatic Brewing Station"!Finally after 2 years I've made an update to this which is more compact, but still has similar characteristics as my original one. I've tested this out by pasting it into a fresh world and all seems to paste as it should as long as you paste it while facing "EAST".ADDITIONAL NOTES- Paste it facing East.- It will paste at your feet position (the block your character is standing on).- Works in 1.10.2, I've not tried this in lower versions of Minecraft.- More compact compared to my original one.EXTRA INFO- Purple Section = Water Bottles, Blaze Powder for the Brewing Stand to work, Brewing Stand and potion output.- First Red Section = Nether Wart.- Green Section = Potions that can only be made to last longer, stronger affect, splash and lingering.- Yellow Section = Potions that can have a "Fermented Spider Eye" added to make an alternative potion (Alternative potions are the ones labelled in grey text on the sign) these also can be made to last longer, stronger affect, splash and lingering.- Purple Section = Weakness potion when added to water bottles. Can also be used to make alternative potions from the "Yellow Section" potions.- Last Red Section = These ingredients are used to make the potions last longer, have a stronger affect, turn potions into splash potions and also turn potions into a lingering potions.- When adding "Dragon's Breath" to make a lingering potion, you do NOT need to add Gun Powder first. Pressing the "Make it LINGER" button will automatically add the "Gun Powder" first to make a splash potion and it will then add the Dragon's Breath for the lingering potion.. 3x3 Redstone Keypad Redstone Device Map 3x3 Redstone Keypad, with 9 colour coded output lines. Provided schematic uses wooden buttons, although any redstone signal can be used (stone button, lever, etc.). By default, the outputs are all low (no signal), and pressing a button sets the corresponding output line to high (redstone signal present). The Stone Bricks are purely decorative, and can be removed or replaced at will.Built using Ragecraft Faithful 64x Texturepackhttp://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/resource-packs/2128869-ragecraft-faithful-64x64-a-traditional-styled Built on cubecraft.mcserver.ws Redstone, Redstone Device, Buttons, 3x3, Keypad, Numerical

M1 Abrams Tank Land Structure Map M1 Abrams Tank The M1 Abrams is an American third-generation main battle tank. It is named after General Creighton Abrams, former Army chief of staff and commander of United States military forces in the Vietnam War from 1968 to 1972. Highly mobile, designed for modern armored ground warfare,[14] the M1 is well armed and heavily armored. Notable features include the use of a powerful multifuel turbine engine, the adoption of sophisticated composite armor, and separate ammunition storage in a blow-out compartment for crew safety. Weighing nearly 68 short tons (almost 62 metric tons), it is one of the heaviest main battle tanks in service. Land Structure, Tank, Cannon, Abrams

WW2 Chevrolet 1533X2 30 CWT Reconnaissance Vehicle (Tutorial+Download) Other Map HELLO LADIES AND GENTLEMEN! In this tutorial I show you how to build the WW2 Chevrolet 1533X2 30 CWT Reconnaissance Vehicle! If you use this design be sure to credit me for it! Enjoy! -------------------------------------------------- WANT TO SEE VEHICLES SIMILAR TO THIS?: www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL_srQtgv5Kja2qe9q8kNv_N8i9iB5_2WD -------------------------------------------------- WHAT IS THE "CHEVROLET 1533X2 30 CWT RECONNAISSANCE VEHICLE"?: After several false starts, the LRDG finally had an acceptable all around Patrol Truck. Once again the truck is two wheel drive. The 1533x2 used by the LRDG were purpose built military modifications of the 1 ½ ton YR series Chevrolet trucks. These modifications included a special truck bed as well as modifications to cab, front grill and suspension. Further modifications were made to the trucks once they reached the LRDG machine shops. Because the trucks were being made for the British Army they were now right hand drive. The popular "water fall" grill of the civilian truck was replaced by a grill with fewer slats to allow better air flow. By now the old Bofors guns used in the earlier trucks was being replaced by the Italian Model 35 Bredas. 1 in 6 trucks mounted a Breda. 1 in 6 trucks were also a radio truck. Tamiya released a model kit which has a "command car" towing a Breda. This is actually the W/T or Radio Truck which is not the commanders vehicle. Also the LRDG was not in the habit of towing guns on patrol, ever.-------------------------------------------------- TEXTURE PACK: -Minecraft Default Pack SHADERS: -SEUS V.10 -------------------------------------------------- SOCIAL MEDIA: YOUTUBE: www.youtube.com/channel/UCMA6Wzub2NM2Wgs8Ak8NCbw TWITTER: twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4 DISCORD: GARRETT2BY4 TWITCH: Follow me on Twitch: www.twitch.tv/garrett2by4 XBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4 STEAM: GARRETT2BY4 -------------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING!

SkyHQ Sequencer Delay Unit Redstone Device Map NOTE: This unit is needed for the SkyHQ 5 Track Music Studio.DIRECTIONS: remove trapdoor covers on BACK of extendable unit and delay. use as many delay units as how many extensions you added. link up redstone from OUT on extendable unit then to IN on delay unit, OUT from the delay unit, and to IN on the next delay unit. Repeat this process until you return the signal to the IN on the back of the extendable unit. CAUTION: do not use any repeaters in your redstone as that will completely throw off the timing of the entire circuit (it will mess up your music). Redstone Device

Solstice Cirrus - Civilian Airship Air Structure Map Hello, I'm not dead! Here's something I built as a side thing, something I've never tried before. As a very airship-heavy society, it's not unusual to imagine the skies and driveways of the United Territories of the Skylords filled with small private airships alongside larger commercial and military ones, so I decided to try one out. This is kind of inspired by a convertible and a luxury yacht, and represents a slightly high-level entry airship.Specs!Make: Solstice Aviation, Inc.Model: 2017 Cirrus ELXLength: 18 mWidth: 11 mHeight: 8 mLift: 4 Electrium Gas CellsPropulsion: 2 Solstice JC4 Jet Turbine EnginesRange: 900 milesTop Speed: 420 mphMaximum Operating Ceiling: Recommended 5,300 feet.Capacity: 3Cargo Volume: 3 cubic metersCost: $9,000 SD ($18,000 USD)Solstice Aviation is a household name for inexpensive yet high-quality personal airships, with their flagship line being the Cirrus. The ELX is a sporty convertible model with high-powered engines and lightweight construction that makes for a maneuverable and fast lighter-than-air airship. Even as Solstice has begun developing heavier than air offerings, it is still best known for its LTA, and the Cirrus line is a common sight all over the UTS. Affordable, reliable, and fast, Cirrus is the perfect choice for beginner and advanced pilots alike! Contact your local Cirrus dealer and schedule a test flight today! Semi Safe Base (early base design) Land Structure Map Welcome to a Semi Safe BaseNote - Built in Survival Mode(respawned into world for cropping out extras and clear screen clips)This is one of my early base designs. It was built I think around my second week of playing. The idea was simple a safe place to hide at night but still be able to use anything I had in my base. It has all the basic items you would need to survive from crafting tables to an enchanting room.It was very effective in keeping me alive, but even I died. The idea remains unchanged with a ton of torches for lighting and a sleeping area up the ladder. However as I learned more I learned that it was necessary to have more then just wheat to survive(which is all you'll find here). Yes I could wonder in search of animals to eat but that meant a chance of death and losing all my gear and well that just didn't always work out to well.Still for an early design it worked and it kept me alive. The screen shots show what you'll find, and that is it. I would urge you to grab this if you are wanting to just play around and get a start. But if your wanting something better then wait for my next upload (because that is what I built after this) or grab a build from another Minecrafter because there are some great ideas out there.And with that said feel free to use this in your own worlds, or on a server. Just please give me some credit for this build.Enjoy Land Structure

Villager Blacksmith Survival Improvement Land Structure Map DescriptionWhat I have done, is taken the standard villager blacksmith and 5x5 hut and created a mid-level survival home that, I think, looks fairly good. This is more than just a starter home that will see you though the night, but it is less than a full-fledged base with all the contraptions you could want. I personally like to live among the villagers, especially with the Minecraft Comes Alive mod, as it gives me a little more incentive (and quiet) to live alongside the villagers.InspirationI was inspired by two YouTube crafters before I took this challenge on. The roofing and the rooftop garden were inspired by Andyisyoda, a very talented creative builder. The sunken storage area was inspired by JeraCraft, and is copied from a portion of his mass-storage area in an underground base he was demonstrating how to build.I highly recommend them both as they are fun to watch (and Andy is really funny when he gets distracted by the "derpers" watching him build). Land Structure, Survival, Storage, Village, Simple, Blacksmith, Improved

Banner Making Home Base Land Structure Map Welcome to my Banner Making Home BaseBuilt in Survival mode - updated lighting in creative mode. So what is a Banner Making Home Base? Well in short it's a base and it's a chest filled crafting area with everything you need to make banners all in one. WAIT, WHAT!?! So you can have all the banners you want and a Base to be safe at the same time. Yes yes you can.Outside you'll find sheep for wool trees for sticks and yes a garden for food. And on the inside you'll find a bunch of chest some filled with supplies to make your own banners and some filled with the nearly 50 banners designed by myself and SMAWarrior. We placed a copy of each banner into a chest opposite the originals. You'll also find crafting tables a furnace and then you can go upstairs to relax. That's right there's a base upstairs with all the basic supplies. for survival. Although this time around I was living the golden life(you figure that out when you see my survival gear)And with all that said I leave you to create your own banners and start an adventure from within this new home. Feel free to use on your own worlds or a server if you wish to. All we ask is that you give myself and SMAWarrior credit for our hard work on banners and of course a fun convenient and easy to use home base.Enjoy Land Structure

Missile Flying Machine Piston Map Rocket/Missile Flying MachineThis build is inspired by Mumbo Jumbo's recent YouTube video, in which he built a missile silo, but keeps failing the rocket. I decided to give building a missile a go and this is the result. It moves very fast at 2 blocks per second and is completely symmetrical.If you decide to build the TNT version, you must place a redstone block at your destination to ignite it.To build this missile you need:- 5 observers- 9 slime blocks- 1 regular piston- 4 sticky pistonsand for the decoration an additional:- 1 slime block- 5 cobblestone walls- 9 iron bars- or you could use 25 TNTSome notes on the construction of the missile:- In order to avoid weird behavior, build from the bottom to the top- All of the observers are facing upwards- The sticky pistons face down, the regular piston faces up- Leave a one block gap between the ground and the missile, since you need to trigger one of the bottom observers to start the machine Machine, Piston, Flying, Rocket, Missile, Observer

Flying Expandable Block Slimeblock Carrier Redstone Device Map Flying Expandable Block Slimeblock CarrierBy tatoyoda600This block carrier can carry 72 blocks per section and 72 blocks on the engine, just replace the tnt with whatever block you want. It may not be the best block carrier ever since it was my first big slimeblock creation and the fist one where I actually used observer blocks. To set it up just use MCEdit to place the engine and then as many sections as you would like. To stop it just place an unmovable block in front of the piston that is on the front. To start it back up after doing that you must use a flint and steel on every piston in the middle row starting at the front and ending on the back.To dowlnload the engine just click the Download MCEdit schematic button.Section download: https://www.dropbox.com/s/688a15defrqsavk/Slimeblock%20Flying%20TNT%20Transport%20v2.0%20Section.schematic?dl=0 Redstone, Block, Carrier, Redstone Device, Piston, Flying, Contraption, Mcedit

Shuttlecraft Dove Other Map At the moment I'm working on a sequel to my previous project, the Redbird. However in-between the Redbird and the currently unnamed project I thought I'd do a small build continuing within the theme of Sci-Fi Ships. Thus I decided to create a shuttlecraft I have decided to christen, "Dove". As a major fan of the Star Trek TV series it's design is loosely based on crafts depicted throughout the show. Within contains the bridge, (With Warp pad +command block so you can set your destination at will), generic "back room" which contains the bedding and storage, as well as a miniature engine room. Just like the Redbird I give full permission for anyone to use this shuttlecraft within their roleplays, machinimas, servers, adventure maps etc. etc. as long as you give me full credit for creation of the ship*. Jetpack In Vanilla Minecraft | 1.11+ Other Map Welcome to the Jetpack 1.11 command! This command I originally developed back in Minecraft 1.9 but never released it to the public arena. I revamped this command for 1.11+ so it could be used in all kinds of survival worlds and creative testing grounds. To craft the Jetpack you need: 2 diamonds, 1 iron chestplate, 1 firework, 2 ender pearls.Let me know if you think the crafting recipe is balanced enough.Once you receive the Jetpack, press F, then you will gracefully float in the air. Press F again if you would like to stop floating upwards. But be careful! You will take fall damage so find some Feather Falling and keep toggling the Jetpack so you don't fall to your death.Youtube Video/Tutorial Link:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pdC1KW_NeS8 Minecraft, Pack, Vanilla, Jetpack, Jet, Cubic, Cubicplays

Post Mill Land Structure Map This is my version of a 'Post Mill', the earliest type of European windmill.The mechanics of the mill are situated in the upper part of the mill, in the housing, which can turn a full 360 degrees around the pole on which it stands. The last M103s were withdrawn from service in 1974. The M103 was the last heavy tank to be used by the US military as the concept of the Main Battle Tank evolved, making heavy tanks obsolete.-------------------------------------------------- TEXTURE PACK: -Minecraft Default Pack SHADERS: -SEUS V.10 -------------------------------------------------- SOCIAL MEDIA: YOUTUBE: www.youtube.com/channel/UCMA6Wzub2NM2Wgs8Ak8NCbw TWITTER: twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4 DISCORD: GARRETT2BY4 TWITCH: Follow me on Twitch: www.twitch.tv/garrett2by4 XBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4 STEAM: GARRETT2BY4 -------------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING Land Structure

Modern Warfare Merkava Mk. IV | Main Battle Tank (Tutorial + Download) Land Structure Map HELLO LADIES AND GENTLEMEN! Here is a showcase for my Merkava Main Battle Tank. This is available for a tutorial and the schematic file is up for download as well. Enjoy! -------------------------------------------------- CHECKOUT MY TUTORIAL SERIES FOR THESE KIND OF BUILDS!: www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL_srQtgv5KjY2nrnfdU3NJJPCIX6Okexw-------------------------------------------------- WHAT IS THE "MERKAVA MK.IV"?: The Merkava is a main battle tank used by the Israel Defense Forces. The tank began development in 1973 and entered official service in 1978. Four main variants of the tank have been deployed. It was first used extensively in the 1982 Lebanon War. The name "Merkava" was derived from the IDF's initial development program name.Design criteria include rapid repair of battle damage, survivability, cost-effectiveness and off-road performance. Following the model of contemporary self-propelled howitzers, the turret assembly is located closer to the rear than in most main battle tanks. With the engine in front, this layout is intended to grant additional protection against a frontal attack, especially for the personnel in the main hull, such as the driver. It also creates more space in the rear of the tank that allows increased storage capacity and a rear entrance to the main crew compartment allowing easy access under enemy fire. This allows the tank to be used as a platform for medical disembarkation, a forward command and control station, and an infantry fighting vehicle. The rear entrance's clamshell-style doors provide overhead protection when off- and on-loading cargo and personnel.-------------------------------------------------- TEXTURE PACK: -Minecraft Default Pack SHADERS: -SEUS V.10 -------------------------------------------------- SOCIAL MEDIA: YOUTUBE: www.youtube.com/channel/UCMA6Wzub2NM2Wgs8Ak8NCbw TWITTER: twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4 DISCORD: GARRETT2BY4 TWITCH: Follow me on Twitch: www.twitch.tv/garrett2by4 XBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4 STEAM: GARRETT2BY4 -------------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING Land Structure

Consequently, trade agreements by Romania were created, particularly with the French and Czechoslovakians. The initial trade negotiations between the Czechoslovakians involved LT vz. 35s and AH-IVs. As a result, 126 LT vz 35s and 35 AH-IVs were bought in 1937 and redesignated as the R-1 (AH-IV) and the R-2 (LT vz 35). Additionally, the R-1 was chosen as the first vehicle to be made by the Romanians, but the German occupation of Czechoslovakia extinguished this prospect. The second sphere from the rear contains the garden, with an observation deck accessible by ladder. The rear sphere contains the main reactor, thruster controls, and shield generator controls.Ship is created in Minecraft 1.12Used the Faithful 1.10 64x resource packUsed Sildur's Shader Pack for screenshots Air Structure, Space, Ship, Garden, Starship, Air, Glass, Iron

V-1 Flying Bomb "Doodlebug" Air Structure Map The V-1 missile or V-1 flying bomb (German: Vergeltungswaffe 1 "Vengeance Weapon 1")—also known to the Allies as the buzz bomb, or doodlebug, and in Germany as Kirschkern (cherrystone) or Maikäfer (maybug)—was an early cruise missile and the only production aircraft to use a pulsejet for power.The V-1 was developed at Peenemünde Army Research Center in 1939 by the Nazi German Luftwaffe during the Second World War. During initial development it was known by the codename "Cherry Stone". The first of the so-called "Vengeance weapons" (V-weapons or Vergeltungswaffen) series designed for terror bombing of London — because of its limited range, the thousands of V-1 missiles launched into England were fired from launch facilities along the French (Pas-de-Calais) and Dutch coasts. The first V-1 was launched at London on 13 June 1944, one week after (and prompted by) the successful Allied landings in Europe. At its peak, more than one hundred V-1s a day were fired at south-east England, 9,521 in total, decreasing in number as sites were overrun until October 1944, when the last V-1 site in range of Britain was overrun by Allied forces. After this, the V-1s were directed at the port of Antwerp and other targets in Belgium, with 2,448 V-1s being launched. The attacks stopped only a month before the war in Europe ended, when the last launch site in the Low Countries was overrun on 29 March 1945. -Wikipedia Air Structure, War, Ww2, World, Jet, Rocket, Pulse, Buzzbomb

MH-6 Little Bird 3D Art Map The MD Helicopters MH-6 Little Bird (nicknamed the Killer Egg), and its attack variant AH-6, are light helicopters used for special operations in the United States Army. Originally based on a modified OH-6A, it was later based on the MD 500E, with a single five-bladed main rotor. The newest version, the MH-6M, is based on the MD 530F and has a single, six-bladed main rotor and four-bladed tail rotor.RoleLight Observation HelicopterAir interdictionForward air controlSpecial Patrol Insertion/ExtractionNational originUnited StatesManufacturerHughes HelicoptersMcDonnell Douglas Helicopter SystemsMD HelicoptersFirst flight27 February 1963Introduction1980StatusIn servicePrimary userUnited States ArmyDeveloped fromHughes OH-6 CayuseVariantsBoeing AH-6CrewAlthough Little Birds can be crewed by just one pilot, it's more common that they are crewed by 2 Night Stalkers i.e. a Pilot and Co-pilot.FeaturesBased around the MD530 airframe, the AH-6M gunship features lightweight pylons for the loading over a number of weapons systems including:M134 minigunsM260 FFAR rocket podsAGM-114 Hellfire laser-guided anti-tank missilesGAU-19 .50 cal 3-barrel gatling guns 3d Art, Helicopter, Little, Bird, Mh6

F4U-corsair Air Structure Map The Vought F4U Corsair is an American fighter aircraft that saw service primarily in World War II and the Korean War. Demand for the aircraft soon overwhelmed Vought's manufacturing capability, resulting in production by Goodyear and Brewster: Goodyear-built Corsairs were designated FG and Brewster-built aircraft F3A. From the first prototype delivery to the U.S. Navy in 1940, to final delivery in 1953 to the French, 12,571 F4U Corsairs were manufactured,[​2] in 16 separate models, in the longest production run of any piston-engined fighter in U.S. history (1942–53).[​3][​4][​5]The Corsair was designed as a carrier-based aircraft but its difficult carrier landing performance rendered it unsuitable for Navy use until the carrier landing issues were overcome by the Royal Navy Fleet Air Arm. The Corsair thus came to and retained prominence in its area of greatest deployment: land based use by the U.S. Marines.[​6] The role of the dominant U.S. carrier based fighter in the second part of the war was thus filled by the Grumman F6F Hellcat, powered by the same Double Wasp engine first flown on the Corsair's first prototype in 1940.[​7] The Corsair served to a lesser degree in the U.S. Navy. In addition to its use by the U.S. and British, the Corsair was also used by the Royal New Zealand Air Force, the French Navy Aéronavale and other, smaller, air forces until the 1960s. Some Japanese pilots regarded it as the most formidable American fighter of World War II,[​8] and the U.S. Navy counted an 11:1 kill ratio with the F4U Corsair.[​9]After the carrier landing issues had been tackled, it quickly became the most capable carrier-based fighter-bomber of World War II.[​10] The Corsair served almost exclusively as a fighter-bomber throughout the Korean War and during the French colonial wars in Indochina and Algeria.[​11] Air Structure, Ww2, Plane, Navy, Fighter, Marines, America, Vought

Grumman F9F panther Air Structure Map The Grumman F9F Panther was the manufacturer's first jet fighter and one of the United States Navy's first successful carrier-based jet fighters. A single-engined, straight-winged day fighter, it was armed with four 20 mm (0.79 in) cannon and could carry a wide assortment of air-to-ground munitions.The Panther was used extensively by the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps in the Korean War. It was also the first jet aircraft used by the Blue Angels flight team, used by them from 1949 through late 1954. The aircraft was exported to Argentina and was the first jet used by the Argentine Naval Aviation.Total F9F production was 1,382. The design evolved into the swept wing Grumman F-9 Cougar.they need colored stairsRoleFighter-bomberManufacturerGrummanFirst flight21 November 1947Retired1958, U.S. Navy1969, ArgentinaPrimary usersUnited States NavyUnited States Marine CorpsArgentine NavyNumber built1,382Developed intoGrumman F-9 Cougar Air Structure, Ww2, Plane, F9f, Grumman, Panther

Money wars egg defence schematic for PrestonPlayz Other Map This Is a egg defense schematic for the popular You Tuber PrestonPlayz: https://www.youtube.com/user/PrestonPlayz The egg is not centered in the defense but is in a unexpected corner but still well defended. The goal of this is to have the attacking opponent break through the defense only to get lost inside the defense and get killed preserving the egg. The most important part is the insides and the obsidian lair the outside lair of ladders, cakes and glass are optional and prioritized If possible leave an empty space under the designed holes for attackers to fall in. This uses clay, ladders, glass, cake, obsidian, chests and hay bales. Boeing AH-64 Apache Helicopter 3D Art Map The Boeing AH-64 Apache is an American four-blade, twin-turboshaft attack helicopter with a tailwheel-type landing gear arrangement and a tandem cockpit for a two-man crew.Top speed: 293 km/hWeight: 5,165 kgLength: 18 mUnit cost: AH-64A: US$20M (2007); AH-64D: US$65M (2010); AH-64E: US$35.5M (FY2014)Engine type: TurboshaftThe Boeing AH-64 Apache is an American four-blade, twin-turboshaft attack helicopter with a tailwheel-type landing gear arrangement and a tandem cockpit for a two-man crew. It features a nose-mounted sensor suite for target acquisition and night vision systems. It is armed with a 30 mm (1.18 in) M230 chain gun carried between the main landing gear, under the aircraft's forward fuselage. It has four hardpoints mounted on stub-wing pylons, typically carrying a mixture of AGM-114 Hellfire missiles and Hydra 70 rocket pods. The AH-64 has a large amount of systems redundancy to improve combat survivability.RoleAttack helicopterNational originUnited StatesManufacturerHughes Helicopters (1975–1984)McDonnell Douglas (1984–1997)Boeing Defense, Space & Security(1997–present)First flight30 September 1975IntroductionApril 1986StatusIn servicePrimary usersUnited States ArmyIsraeli Air ForceEgyptian Air ForceRoyal Netherlands Air ForceProduced1983–presentNumber built2,000 as of March 2013Unit costAH-64A: US$20M (2007)AH-64D: US$65M (2010)AH-64E: US$35.5M (FY2014)VariantsAgustaWestland ApacheThe Apache originally started as the Model 77 developed by Hughes Helicopters for the United States Army's Advanced Attack Helicopter program to replace the AH-1 Cobra. The prototype YAH-64 was first flown on 30 September 1975. The U.S. Army selected the YAH-64 over the Bell YAH-63 in 1976, and later approved full production in 1982. After purchasing Hughes Helicopters in 1984, McDonnell Douglas continued AH-64 production and development. The helicopter was introduced to U.S. Army service in April 1986. The first production AH-64D Apache Longbow, an upgraded Apache variant, was delivered to the Army in March 1997. Production has been continued by Boeing Defense, Space & Security; over 2,000 AH-64s have been produced to date. 3d Art, Helicopter, Boeing, Ah64, Apachelicopter

Primarily used by the United States military, it is also used by numerous other countries and organizations and even in civilian adaptations. Vanilla Money System Other Map This is my third attempt at a money system I feel that every time I make a money system I get better and better. Hopefully one day I can make an amazing money system like no other!To change the visible name of your currency change it from Cash to the name of your currency. Example:From: /scoreboard objectives add Money dummy CashTo: /scoreboard objectives add Money dummy RubiesIf you want to give players starter money you can use a custom system. Sadly I was never able to get a system like this working personally, but I wish you luck!To change to item you are selling / buying just change it from:Minecraft:CobbleStone to what you want. Example: Minecraft:DiamondTo change the Buy / Sell price just change the number in the testfor, add, and remove commands./scoreboard players add @p Money 1 (->) /scoreboard players add @p Money 50 ## Used to Give Players Money after selling said item./testfor @p[score_Money_min=2] (->) /testfor @p[score_Money_min=100] ## Used to check if Players have Money./scoreboard players remove @p Money 2 (->) /scoreboard players remove @p Money 100 ## Takes Money from Players balance. Mil Mi-24 [Hind] 3D Art Map The Mil Mi-24 is a large helicopter gunship, attack helicopter and low-capacity troop transport with room for eight passengersTop speed: 335 km/hUnit cost: 12,000,000–12,000,000 USDPrimary users: Russian Air Force; ca. 50 other users (see Operators section below)National origin: Soviet Union/RussiaNumber built: 2,648Engine type: TurboshaftThe Mil Mi-24 (Russian: Миль Ми-24; NATO reporting name: Hind) is a large helicopter gunship, attack helicopterand low-capacity troop transport with room for eight passengers.[1] It is produced by Mil Moscow Helicopter Plant and has been operated since 1972 by the Soviet Air Force and its successors, along with more than 30 other nations.In NATO circles, the export versions, Mi-25 and Mi-35, are denoted with a letter suffix as "Hind D" and "Hind E". Soviet pilots called the Mi-24 the "flying tank" (летающий танк; letayushchiy tank), a term used historically with the famous World War II Soviet Il-2 Shturmovik armored ground attack aircraft. More common unofficial nicknames were "Crocodile" (Крокодил; Krokodil), due to the helicopter's camouflage scheme and "Drinking Glass" (Стакан; Stakan), because of the flat glass plates that surround earlier Mi-24 variants' cockpits.RoleAttack helicopter with transportcapabilitiesNational originSoviet Union/RussiaManufacturerMilFirst flight19 September 1969Introduction1972StatusIn servicePrimary usersRussian Air Forceca. 50 other users (see Operators section below)Produced1969–presentNumber built2,648Unit costMi-24: US$12 million(2015)Developed fromMil Mi-8 3d Art, Helicopter, Mil, Mi24, Hind

McDonnell Douglas F/A-18 Hornet Air Structure Map The McDonnell Douglas F/A-18 Hornet is a twin-engine supersonic, all-weather carrier-capable multirole combat jet, designed as both a fighter and attack aircraft (hence the F/A designation). Designed by McDonnell Douglas (now Boeing) and Northrop, the F/A-18 was derived from the latter's YF-17 in the 1970s for use by the United States Navy and Marine Corps. The Hornet is also used by the air forces of several other nations and, since 1986, by the U.S. Navy's Flight Demonstration Squadron, the Blue Angels.The F/A-18 has a top speed of Mach 1.8 (1,034 knots, 1,190 mph or 1,915 km/h at 40,000 ft or 12,200 m). It can carry a wide variety of bombs and missiles, including air-to-air and air-to-ground, supplemented by the 20-mm M61 Vulcan cannon. It is powered by two General Electric F404 turbofan engines, which give the aircraft a high thrust-to-weight ratio. The F/A-18 has excellent aerodynamic characteristics, primarily attributed to its leading-edge extensions. The fighter's primary missions are fighter escort, fleet air defense, Suppression of Enemy Air Defenses (SEAD), air interdiction, close air support, and aerial reconnaissance. Its versatility and reliability have proven it to be a valuable carrier asset, though it has been criticized for its lack of range and payload compared to its earlier contemporaries, such as the Grumman F-14 Tomcat in the fighter and strike fighter role, and the Grumman A-6 Intruder and LTV A-7 Corsair II in the attack role.The Hornet first saw combat action during the 1986 United States bombing of Libya and subsequently participated in the 1991 Gulf War and 2003 Iraq War. The F/A-18 Hornet provided the baseline design for the Boeing F/A-18E/F Super Hornet, its larger, evolutionary redesign. Air Structure, Carrier, Plane, Navy, Fighter, Jet, Fa18, Hornet

Rangatira - The Maori Chief 3D Art Map Kia Ora, Ko Taylor toku ingoa, i kore anake toku tamataraa mo Octovon engari ahau hanga ano hoki tenei hanga te reira rite te kanohi o te tikanga Māori. Tatou Maori, ko te iwi Kiwa taketake o Aotearoa. hiahia ahau ki te tohu Aotearoa ki tenei whakairo i roto i tūmanako o te faaururaa iwi ki te ako e pā ana ki to tatou tikanga. Tenei hanga whakaatu he rangatira Māori, mau ana Korowai me te piupiu me te hapai i te taiaha i roto i te ngahere tikitu Aotearoa. Kua tamata ahau ki te waihanga i tētahi tikitu waho te whakamahi o te rakau kia rite ki e haere ki tua atu i te rangi i nga rakau, pera hei utu kua hanga e ahau te manu taketake o Aotearoa, te Kiwi, me te ponga, to tatou whakato tino tohu, e hua te koru.Te ti'aturi nei e ahau ki a koutou katoa oaoa i.Hello, my name is Taylor, this build was not only my trial for Octovon but I also created it as a representation of the Maori culture. We Maori, are the indigenous Polynesian people of New Zealand. I wanted to represent New Zealand with this build in hopes of inspiring people to learn about our culture, as recent studies have shown that fewer than one million Maori people are on our earth today. This build showcases a Maori chief, wearing his Korowai, piupiu and wielding his Taiaha in a New Zealand rainforest. I have tried to create a rainforest without the use of trees as the trees would go beyond the build limit, so instead I have created the native bird of New Zealand, the Kiwi, and the silver fern, our most symbolic plant, that produces the koru. To represent a New Zealand rainforest instead.I hope you all enjoy the build. :) 3d Art, Organic, Forest, Schematic, New, Man, Kiwi, Maori

[Vehicle] Heavy tank HL 15 "Hyäne" Land Structure Map This vehicle is a breaking tank sent to put an end to a fairly tough tank battle and a powerful cannon to destroy a fortification.-A 130 mm MaK 44 Anti-Tank Gun.-A Mortar systems for attack trench and tower.-A satelite radio . -A NBC protection (Nuclear biological and Chimical).-A Autoload for the best rate of fire.-A 100mm hull of carbon fiber.This tank Was built at the request of the officers of the land to allow the destruction of super heavy tanks and fortifications. The HL 15 is Product at 850 Units for the Federation and the other army of the earth. [Black Iron] "Everything is possible if we give ourselves means..." Land Structure

Stryker IAV Armored vehicle 3D Art Map The IAV (Interim Armored Vehicle) Stryker is a family of eight-wheeled armored fighting vehicles derived from the Canadian LAV III and based on the Swiss Piranha III 8×8. Stryker vehicles are produced by General Dynamics Land Systems Canada for the United States Army. It has 4-wheel drive (8×4) and can be switched to all-wheel drive (8×8).The vehicle is named for two American servicemen who posthumously received the Medal of Honor: Private First Class Stuart S. WW2 GMC CCKW LWB 353 | 2 1/2-Ton 6x6 Cargo Truck Land Structure Map HELLO LADIES AND GENTLEMEN! Here is a showcase for my WW2 GMC CCKW LWB 353 2 1/2-ton 6x6 cargo truck. This is available for a tutorial and the schematic file is up for download as well. Enjoy! -------------------------------------------------- WANT TO SEE VEHICLES SIMILAR TO THIS?: WW2 TUTORIAL PLAYLIST: goo.gl/fftXkW -------------------------------------------------- WHAT IS THE "GMC CCKW"? The GMC CCKW was 2½-ton 6x6 U.S. Army cargo truck that saw heavy service in both World War II and the Korean War. The original "Deuce and a Half", it formed the backbone of the famed Red Ball Express that kept Allied armies supplied as they pushed eastward after the Normandy invasion.The CCKW came in many variants, including open or closed cab, long wheel base (LWB 353) and short (SWB 352), and over a score of specialized models. It began to be phased out with the deployment of the 6×6 M35 in 1950, but remained in active U.S. service until the mid-1960s. It is related to the Chevrolet G506, built at the same factory.-------------------------------------------------- TEXTURE & SHADER PACKS: TEXTURE PACK: Minecraft Default Pack SHADERS: SEUS ------------------------------------------------------ SOCIAL MEDIA: TWITTER: https://twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4 DISCORD:https://discord.gg/3TJREYX PLANET MINECRAFT: https://goo.gl/16jmfR XBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4 STEAM: GARRETT2BY4 ORGIN: TheGARRETT2BY4 BATTLENET: GARRETT2BY4 ---------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING Land Structure

WW2 ZIS-6 | 6x4 Cargo Truck Land Structure Map HELLO LADIES AND GENTLEMEN! Here is a showcase for my WW2 ZIS-6 6x4 cargo truck. Enjoy! -------------------------------------------------- WANT TO SEE VEHICLES SIMILAR TO THIS?: WW2 TUTORIAL PLAYLIST: goo.gl/fftXkW -------------------------------------------------- WHAT IS THE "ZIS-6"? The ZIS-6 is a Soviet general purpose 6×4 army cargo truck, a three-axle version of the ZIS-5 two-axle truck. It was built from 1933 until October 1941 at the Moscow Zavod imeni Stalina factory and reached a total production of 21,239.The robust and reliable base was used for many different bodies, for example as a searchlight truck or mobile workshop. But is best known for its role as the first multiple rocket launcher in July 1941. It was built by the "Compressor" Plant's Design Office during World War II (1941–45). Very few ZIS-6 trucks survive till today.-------------------------------------------------- TEXTURE & SHADER PACKS: TEXTURE PACK: Minecraft Default Pack SHADERS: SEUS ------------------------------------------------------ SOCIAL MEDIA: TWITTER: https://twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4 DISCORD:https://discord.gg/3TJREYX PLANET MINECRAFT: https://goo.gl/16jmfR XBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4 STEAM: GARRETT2BY4 ORGIN: TheGARRETT2BY4 BATTLENET: GARRETT2BY4 ---------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING Land Structure

p-80 shooting star Air Structure Map The Lockheed P-80 Shooting Star was the first jet fighter used operationally by the United States Army Air Forces (USAAF).[2] Designed and built by Lockheed in 1943 and delivered just 143 days from the start of the design process, production models were flying, and two pre-production models did see very limited service in Italy just before the end of World War II. Designed with straight wings, the type saw extensive combat in Korea with the United States Air Force (USAF) as the F-80. America's first successful turbojet-powered combat aircraft, it helped usher in the "jet age" in the USAF, but was outclassed with the appearance of the swept-wing transonic MiG-15 and was quickly replaced in the air superiority role by the transonic F-86 Sabre. The F-94 Starfire, an all-weather interceptor on the same airframe, also saw Korean war service. The closely related T-33 Shooting Star trainer would remain in service with the U.S. Air Force and Navy well into the 1980s, with the last NT-33 variant not retired until April 1997. Many still serve in a military role in foreign air arms or are in private hands. Air Structure, Star, Ww2, Plane, Jet, Shooting, P80

WW2 M22 Locust | Airborne Light Tank Land Structure Map HELLO LADIES AND GENTLEMEN! Here is a showcase for my WW2 M22 Locust. This is available for a tutorial and the schematic file is up for download as well. Enjoy! -------------------------------------------------- WANT TO SEE VEHICLES SIMILAR TO THIS?:WW2 TUTORIAL PLAYLIST: goo.gl/fftXkW--------------------------------------------------WHAT IS THE "M22 LOCUST"? The M22 Locust, officially Light Tank (Airborne), M22, was an American-designed airborne light tank which was produced during World War II. The Locust began development in 1941 after the British War Office requested that the American government design a purpose-built airborne light tank which could be transported by glider into battle to support British airborne forces. The War Office had originally selected the Light Tank Mark VII Tetrarch light tank for use by the airborne forces, but it had not been designed with that exact purpose in mind so the War Office believed that a purpose-built tank would be required to replace it. The United States Ordnance Department was asked to produce this replacement, which in turn selected Marmon-Herrington to design and build a prototype airborne tank in May 1941. The prototype was designated the Light Tank T9 (Airborne), and was designed so that it could be transported underneath a Douglas C-54 Skymaster transport aircraft, although its dimensions also allowed it to fit inside a General Aircraft Hamilcar glider.--------------------------------------------------TEXTURE & SHADER PACKS:TEXTURE PACK: Minecraft Default PackSHADERS: SEUS------------------------------------------------------SOCIAL MEDIA: TWITTER: https://twitter.com/GARRETT2BY4DISCORD:https://discord.gg/3TJREYXPLANET MINECRAFT: https://goo.gl/16jmfRXBOX GAMERTAG: GARRETT2BY4STEAM: GARRETT2BY4ORGIN: TheGARRETT2BY4BATTLENET: GARRETT2BY4---------------------------------------------- DON'T FORGET TO DIAMOND, COMMENT, AND SUBSCRIBE! -------------------------------------------------- THANKS FOR VIEWING Land Structure

Amazing Piston Door schematic Piston Map A 3 part piston door that consists of pistons facing in almost all directions.The first button, the one on the left wall, moves the entire wall downwards.The second button, behind the wall, at the top in the middle, moves the wall to the right.The third button, the one on the right wall, moves the entire wall to the left and upwards.I used a variation of the Painterly Pack by Rhodox. The bones are redstone, the angels are redstone repeaters, and the rest is either stone brick or lapis lazuli.You can use this as an entrance to your mansion, a puzzle in your adventure map, or a doorway to your secret crafting workshop. Just be sure to send me a comment or note saying thanks. Piston

Improved Secure, Compact, Combination Lock Redstone Device Map After I saw this and this, both from CNBMinecraft, I got inspired to test and improve it, because he said in one of his videos that with his design you would not be able to press the buttons as fast as possible.The main change is that I added a pulse limiter, which only may contain torches and repeaters because they are stacked next to each other. This allows you to press buttons faster (as fast as I was able to do).The other thing I changed is that I came up with my own RS NOR Latch Array.To enter a code, press four buttons of the 9-button numpad and than press the button next to it (the enter button).The code I programmed in both the world as schematic file is: 1337 Redstone Device, Lock, Combination, Numpad

(Pamel Vaul Starr)Carvel Ships and other Sailboats like the Twilight Courscare are simple and quick in their transportation of people and materials, especially if a wind spirit or a magic-user can be convinced to help blow in a certain direction. Sailboat travel has also been charted across any number of routes, making such travel highly predictable and reliable as well. Making it the premier form of transport between the various islands that dot the vast ocean that is the Sanian Archipelago. ((Closing Remarks: I honestly don't quite know what to describe the Twilight Courscare as, (it's Latin for Twilight Sparkle if you didn't know) I drew a lot of inspiration in it's design from several middle age ships of both Asian and European origin but above all it ended up most similar to a Portuguese Caravel and a solely sailing vessel. But design cliff notes aside, I built it about two weeks ago and have been improving upon it's design and whatnot up until this point, though I've yet to figure out a nice layout for the ship's, captain's quarters (similarly to my problem with the Lorem Ipsum). But other then that minor detail, it's completely finished and fully furnished with all the arms and provisions any adventuring party would need in a strange land, along with ample storage space for all of their loot.)) Compact Combination Lock Redstone Device Map Features:128 Possible CombinationsOrder Does Not MatterRepetition Not AllowedReprogramableExtremely CompactEasy to Reproduce in SSP & SMPHack Proof DoorThe main features behind this lock is that it is programmable and compact to all hell. Levers surround the doorway, giving it a compact and intimidating feel. Pulling only the correct levers will open the door. The order in which the levers are pulled does not matter. There are 128 possible combinations. There are also two levers within the vault. One will open the door despite an incorrect combination entered outside. The other will lock the door shut no matter what. These two levers exist so you cannot be locked in, or snuck-up-on. The vault room can easily be resized or removed.See the button powered, order sesitive version here.Additional NotesPrevious Versions:All previous schematics and worldsaves can be found here.Credits:The texture pack being used is Ovo's Rustic Pack.This project was featured in:Sangrose Mountain Castle by plyr_783 Redstone Device, Door, Lock, Compact, Vault, Combination, Blanknot

It can be food, building materials, just about anything. Right above the payment window is a label. That shows what the machine is dispensing. 1-4 binary splitter (edu. version) Redstone Device Map A must have for programable combanation locks, the one to for binary splitter takes one input and splits it into four controlable outputs. To hook up to a combanation lock, set (example) 4 of these side by side, hook up the inputs to the buttons in order and hook all of the same number outputs together (ie. 1111, 2222, 3333, 4444,) and send the combined outputs (1,2,3,4) in order to your rs nor latch combo lock and then set the levers inside of each box to indacate which order the buttons are pressed (ie. 2431) this educational version has a room where you can see how everything works without everything packed together tightly. Redstone Ore Punch Door Redstone Device Map A secret door design, simply punch the ore and the a hidden door will open.A good idea in concept except that the mechanics this system are based on need the ore block to update a second time with random ticks. Which means after the door is opened it can not be opened from the outside for between 3 and 30 seconds , however long it takes the block to update.I designed a discrete design for the outside to be able to tell when the door can actually be opened. The block below the ore is retracted down when the door can not be opened. on the inside there is a lamp which is lit when the door can be opened from the outside. Redstone Device

Kezur-class bomber Air Structure Map Author's NotePlease link my PMC account or this page if you use this project in any public post, whether it be a server, blog, map, etc.Programs used:Minecraft (for building)Mcedit (for building)Blender (for renders)Paint.net (for pictures)Technical InformationProduction InformationManufacturerBumdotClassKezurProduct lineBomberModelStandardCapacityCrew requirements (standard config.)Maximum capacity1 crew1 pilotsCargo capacityStorage12^3 metersFuel2 daysSupplies16 daysTechnical SpecificationsDimensionsLength16Build24LoreWidth21Build31.5LoreHeight3.5Build5.25LorePowerplantPrimaryMark 2 (2x) (2E10 W)Fusion reactor PropulsionPrimary thrustersCPPS-fr32xAcceleration1800g'sInertial dampenersSIFS standardCounterforce of 120,000g's1xInterial compensatorsTuak IISCS standardCounterforce of 92,000g's1xGyroscopesLp 2SensorsParticle sensorshort range1 nodesCommunication systemsSytnet transceiverPriority 9.3ArmorDuruam alloymediumShieldsDeflector shields3.4E10 J shield capacity2 projectorsArmament(4x) G-ceres I7light laser cannons1E9 J per volley1.5s cooldown(24x) Firan missilesnuclear warheads5E10 J non replenish-ableUsageAffiliationGotal FederationYear introduced1800 BBS'rErasCremevlian warRolesBomberHistoryThe Kezur-class is a relic of the early days of the Cremevlian War, when technology was crude and inefficient. The ship was produced several centuries into the conflict, by the Gotal Federation. The ship was substandard even for its time, using outdated technology and suffering from poor manufacturing. The Kezur was extremely bulky - much of the internal structure was occupied by a monstrous twin reactor system, far larger than practical and overflowing with unnecessary systems. Although unconfirmed (as no Kezur-class bombers remain, and the ship wasn't well documented or recorded during its time) historians suspect that the reactors were so large because of numerous safety systems, installed as a reaction to the Battle of YW13, where the carrier Shrika was vaporized by a malfunction in a docked bomber's reactor. Regardless, the Kezur had little space for the most modern iterations of the technologies used, and thus was unpopular and unsuccessful.The Kezur-class was armed with four laser cannons produced by Bumdot, the bomber's manufacturer. These were slow to fire and lacked sufficient yield to be effective against capital ship armor - conversely, the ship's poor maneuverability meant they could not reliably be used against other strike craft. The bomber also carried outdated Firan nuclear missiles, as opposed to the new Lek'hr model with improved tracking and a stronger warhead. The bomber also carried no torpedoes of any kind, making it ill-suited to its role. The Kezur was quickly discontinued, and Bumdot would lose prestige and standing in its civilization.. Air Structure, Spaceship, Space, Bomber, Strikecraft

warhead4E18 J non replenish-ableUsageAffiliationGalactic NavyYear introduced278 ABS'rErasCremevlian warRecovery periodTaris rebellionGalactic civil warRolesEscort, anti-fighter, corvette hunterHistoryThe Harradox-class was an extremely powerful gunship designed and manufactured by Kualin Stardrives during the Taris Rebellion. The Harradox-class was sold exclusively to the Galactic Navy, and saw extensive use throughout its lifespan. The design was named after the current Director of Offensive Actions, Harradox. Built with his vision and requirements for a suitable gunship in mind, the Harradox excelled in its role. The gunship was bought in bulk, and remained in service for more than a millennium. Even after the ship stopped being produced, those still in the Navy stayed in duty and continued flying missions and participating in battles for centuries. The Harradox-class is the best known gunship ever utilized by the Galactic Navy, and would serve as a landmark in engineering and performance for the model.The Harradox bristled with weaponry: it had four blaster cannons to chew through armor and concussion shields, four heavy laser cannons that could break a starfighter in half, and two blaster turrets on the dorsal hull that could swing three hundred sixty degrees to track pursuing enemies and slippery targets. Its combination of various weapon types, the inclusion of turrets, and superb maneuvering systems and thrusters meant the Harradox-class was more than capable of dealing with many enemies simultaneously - even multiple hostile gunships. The ship also incorporated limited stealth systems, making it difficult to track for missiles and other ships. It didn't help that the Harradox was absurdly fast for its time, with a thousand g's of acceleration more than the next fastest gunship. Even the best strike craft pilots found it difficult to follow a Harradox-class, especially while under pressure from the dorsal turrets. The Harradox-class was designed as a gunship to combat strike craft, but it was also a deadly corvette hunter. The Harradox carried eighteen LIRAX submatter torpedoes, giving it the ability to disable small capital ships and threaten even larger combatants. The Harradox also carried eighty missiles, each designed to evade point defense fire, and programmed to identify vulnerable subsystems and destroy them. The Harradox was frequently used to knock large capital ships out of a fight, by disabling exposed sensors, shield projectors, weapon systems, and point defense cannons. The Harradox was just as feared by the crew of capital ships and starfighter pilots, and the Galactic Navy capitalized on their gunship's strength and notoriety.. Air Structure, Spaceship, Space, Gunship

Tilanex Empire, Crystaline Empire, Taris EmpireYear introduced1680 ABS'rGalactic Civil WarXenocide WarShadow Fleet CrisisRolesStrike craft, scoutHistoryThe Buzzirek-class was designed and constructed by Kualin Stardrives, as a superiority fighter for their defense force. It received attention and support from some of the best in starfighter construction: Cyxtess technologies, Lottex Stardrives, Qi’natc SP - and of course, the legendary Zenlian Drives. The Buzzirek went through intense prototype and testing phases, where the most modern and capable technologies were put through rigorous combat trials and stress tests. The resulting starfighter was one of the best ever produced, able to match the Xexon and Jorac classes in performance and durability. The fighter was bought in large quantities by major civilizations in the Galactic Alliance, including the Crystaline Empire and the Tilanex Empire. Constant minor improvements and modifications, coupled with a fairly modular and modifiable layout, allowed the Buzzirek to remain in service for more than a millennia. The Buzzirek came the closest to checking Zenlian Drives' monopoly on starfighter design, and has been heavily featured in documentaries and museums. The ship remains one of Kualin Stardrives' crowning achievements, and made huge profits for the company and its subsidiaries.The Buzzirek did not carry a great numbers of weapons, nor was it significantly more economic than the competition. Instead, the primary draw for the Buzzirek was its two beam cannons - the very first successfully mounted on a starfighter. Utilizing a heat dispersion system built from the ground up, and greatly improved venting systems and gas storage, the starfighter was able to wield twin Zefin CDBw beam cannons on either side of the fuselage. These could maintain a solid beam for two seconds, and put out considerably more power than standard laser cannons. In addition, the beam cannons could fire off-center, and had a well-designed targeting system to help the weapon track a target and maintain contact. This made the Buzzirek a deadly adversary if caught from behind - few fighters had the maneuverability to swing out of the way before being cut through, and the fighter had twin laser cannons to aid in an enemy's destruction. To top off the Buzzirek's destructive capabilities, thirty missiles were housed in a single launcher below the ship.The Buzzirek was equipped with powerful shields; however, in this aspect the ship fell short of competitors. The space needed for a mark three reactor on the small fighter, and the various systems which aided the beam cannons, meant that shielding system size was constrained. The ship had barely enough shield strength to withstand a blow from its own weapons, and was considered somewhat of a glass cannon by its pilots. Fortunately, the Buzzirek had powerful repulsorlifts, inertial systems, and sensors, making evasion and maneuver effortless. The fighter was able to carry a powerful darkspace drive, giving it good range for scouting and patrolling space.. Air Structure, Spaceship, Space, Starfighter

Soratiah-class heavy fighter Air Structure Map Author's NotePlease link my PMC account or this page if you use this project in any public post, whether it be a server, blog, map, etc.Programs used:Minecraft (for building)Mcedit (for building)Blender (for renders)Paint.net (for pictures)Technical InformationProduction InformationManufacturerQi’natc SPClassSoratiahProduct lineStarfighterModelHeavyCapacityCrew requirements (standard config.)Optimum capacity1 crew1 pilotsCargo capacityStorage8^3 metersFuel24 daysSupplies2 monthTechnical SpecificationsDimensionsLength17Build25.5LoreWidth17Build25.5LoreHeight3Build4.5LorePowerplantPrimaryMark 3 (1x) (4.5E14 W)Fusion reactor PropulsionPrimary thrustersHVPA cs31xRepulsorliftsSL Mari m102xAcceleration4200g'sAtmospheric velocity8150 kph maximumDarkspace driveClass 38,900,000cInertial dampenersHexai NN80 mediumCounterforce of 640,000g's2xInterial compensatorsDSICS mediumCounterforce of 516,500 g’s2xGyroscopesQi 1PGP iiiSensorsParticle sensorLong range2 nodesEnergy sensorshort range2 nodesSubspace scannerMedium range1 nodesCommunication systemsNetspace connectorPriority 2.9.1Intsys transceiverLong rangeArmorExoterramic hull platingMediumInterwoven nanotubesDurasteel reactive armorLightSuperconductiveShieldsDeflector shields8E13 J shield capacity2 projectorsConcussion shields2.6E13 J shield capacity2 projectorsParticle shields6E13 J shield capacity2 projectorsEnergy shields3E12 J shield capacity2 projectorsArmament(2x) Qi Sty-m3laser cannon7E11 J per volley0.8s cooldown(2x) Qi Sty-t5laser cannon7.3E11 J per volley0.8s cooldown(2x) Qi F166-CIRblaster cannon1E12 J per volley1.5s cooldown(40x) Lek'hr missiles3E13 J per volleynon replenish-ableUsageAffiliationRoccho NavyYear introduced1008 ABS'rTaris rebellionGalactic civil warRolesStrike craftHistoryThe Soratiah-class is a design evolution of the Phosiorate-class produced by the Roccho Republic in the year 950 ABS'r. Initially intended as a replacement for the Phosiorate in its role as a strike craft, the Soratiah grew beyond the physical limitations of a standard-model fighter, and was re-designated as a heavy fighter. Significantly larger than its predecessor, and proportionally more armed, the Soratiah was produced in limited numbers and reserved for elite pilots on the larger capital ships and stations of the Roccho Republic. Soratiah fighters were a common sight around Stykeer Station and the Roccho capital system Talaisa. They were discontinued after the Jorac-class was produced, although a limited number remained in service for as long as a century and a half. Soratiahs were sold to other civilizations in the region for minor profit - this was only marginally successful, as by then the Jorac had achieved its immense popularity, and Xexon interceptors were also circulating in the sector. The Soratiah faded into obscurity in the centuries afterwards.The Soratiah-class was heavily armed, with eight individual weapon systems. In addition to the four laser cannons mounted in the center of the ship, two blaster cannons attached to the wings gave the Soratiah more utility against gunships and escort craft. The Soratiah carried twice as many missiles as the Phosiorate, and incorporated an improved launch system and targeting computer. The ship also boasted powerful shields, able to tank multiple missiles and many laser blasts; this was a necessary improvement due to the Soratiah's large ventral and dorsal profile, rendering the ship an easy target from above or below. The Soratiah also had a relatively small thruster for its size, making it much slower than other heavy fighters of similar size - this would be a major factor in the rise of the Jorac-class over the Soratiah.. The Phosiorate was first conceptualized during final stages of the Taris Rebellion by the Rodain Empire. Shortly after the secession of the Roccho as their own nation, the designs came into the possession of the newly founded starship corporation Qi, which was based around the burgeoning facilities at Stykeer Station over Jefitik. Qi saw the potential benefits of the design, which was well equipped, and chose to push the strike craft through development. The project caught the attention of the Roccho Navy, which were mostly using the inexpensive Uetyph-class as their standard strike craft. The navy was deeply impressed by the combat capabilities of the Phosiorate, and funded the fighter under the condition it would not be marketed to other nations. The Phosiorate-class entered production in 949 ABS'r, at Stykeer Station.The Phosiorate proved itself a formidable adversary during the Galactic Civil War - although the ship only had two main weapons, they were powerful and the ship was extremely maneuverable and well shielded. The Phosiorate also carried twenty missiles to deal with other fighters and light capital ships. The ship was produced in considerable bulk, replacing the Uetyph as the Roccho's primary strike craft. It would eventually be retired around two centuries later, when the Roccho's economic success allowed their navy to purchase Xexons from the Zelosian Empire.. fairchild republic a-10 thunderbolt II Air Structure Map i did one of these last year and it wasn't that good so i re did itThe Fairchild Republic A-10 Thunderbolt II is a single-seat, twin turbofan engine, straight wing jet aircraft developed by Fairchild-Republic for the United States Air Force (USAF). Commonly referred to by the nicknames "Warthog" or "Hog", its official name comes from the Republic P-47 Thunderbolt, a World War II fighter that was effective at attacking ground targets.[citation needed] The A-10 was designed for close air support(CAS) of friendly ground troops, attacking armored vehicles and tanks, and providing quick-action support against enemy ground forces. It entered service in 1976 and is the only production-built aircraft that has served in the USAF that was designed solely for CAS. Its secondary mission is to provide forward air controller – airborne (FAC-A) support, by directing other aircraft in attacks on ground targets. Aircraft used primarily in this role are designated OA-10. The A-10 was intended to improve on the performance of the A-1 Skyraider and its lesser firepower. The A-10 was designed around the 30 mm GAU-8 Avenger rotary cannon. Its airframe was designed for durability, with measures such as 1,200 pounds (540 kg) of titanium armor to protect the cockpit and aircraft systems, enabling it to absorb a significant amount of damage and continue flying. Its short takeoff and landing capability permits operation from airstrips close to the front lines, and its simple design enables maintenance with minimal facilities. The A-10 served in the Gulf War (Operation Desert Storm), the American intervention against Iraq's invasion of Kuwait, where the A-10 distinguished itself. The A-10 also participated in other conflicts such as Operation Urgent Fury in Grenada, the Balkans, Afghanistan, Iraq, and against ISIL in the Middle East. The A-10A single-seat variant was the only version produced, though one pre-production airframe was modified into the YA-10B twin-seat prototype to test an all-weather night capable version. In 2005, a program was started to upgrade remaining A-10A aircraft to the A-10C configuration, with modern avionics for use with precision weaponry. The U.S. Air Force had stated the F-35 would replace the A-10 as it entered service, but this remains highly contentious within the Air Force and in political circles. With a variety of upgrades and wing replacements, the A-10's service life may be extended to 2040; the Air Force has no planned retirement date as of June 2017. During its period of production, between 1960 and 1999, 13,991 powered units and 122 unpowered trailers were sold worldwide, mostly in Central and Eastern Europe and the Soviet Union.The design of the T3 had to meet difficult specifications. The car should have the same capacity as its predecessor (the Tatra T2), but be easier to build. In order to achieve this goal for example the vehicle walls were thinner and were fitted with laminate seats instead of cushioned leatherette seats the T2 used. The T3 was delivered to all tramway companies in the former Czechoslovakia. It was most numerous in Prague, where over 1,000 vehicles were delivered. The T3 still forms (mostly in various modernised versions) the backbone of the Czech tram fleet.The modification T3SU (SU stands for Soviet Union)As with the T2SU the first T3SU was delivered with the modification of removing the middle door and replacing it with seats. Later cars, however, were delivered with the third door in place. Again the vehicles had a closed operator's compartment and were adapted for the harsh climate. Altogether 11,368 T3SU were delivered, making it worldwide the largest production of a single type of streetcar. But because so many of one type were made, their replacement by more modern cars was slow. The T3SU was delivered from 1963, first to Moscow and later to 33 further Soviet cities.Enjoy my builds. Feedback from you guys is very welcome! :) 3d Art, Ussr, Russia, Soviet, Vehicle, Red, Transport, Moscow

All Terrain Open Transport Minecart Map All Terrain Open Transport All Terrain Open TransportProduction informationModelAll Terrain Open TransportClassWalkerUsageRole(s)Troop transportAffiliationGalactic RepublicThe All Terrain Open Transport (AT-OT) was an eight-legged walkerdesigned for the transportation of infantry used by the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars. It was deployed during the Battle of Felucia towards the end of the war.ContentsDescriptionThe All Terrain Open Transport was a walker with eight legs, four laser cannons, an open top, and space to fit several clone troopers.RoleAT-OTs were used primarily for transporting infantry across battlefields.HistoryThe AT-OT was developed for use in the Grand Army of the Republicduring the galaxy-spanning Clone Wars between the Galactic Republicand the Confederacy of Independent Systems. The transports were used during the Battle of Felucia near the end of the war, and were positioned behind Jedi General Aayla Securawhen Order 66 was issued and her clone troopers shot her down.Behind the scenesEditAT-OTs first appeared in the 2005 film Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith on the planet Felucia.The walker's first non-film canon appearance was in the 2014 mobile game Star Wars: Galactic Defense. All Terrain Tactical Enforcer Minecart Map All Terrain Tactical Enforcer All Terrain Tactical EnforcerProduction informationManufacturerRothana Heavy EngineeringModelAll Terrain Tactical EnforcerClassWalkerTechnical specificationsLength22.02 metersHeight/depth9.57 metersArmamentLaser cannon turrets (6)Mass-driver cannon(1)ComplementAll Terrain Recon Transports (2)Passengers20UsageAffiliationGalactic RepublicGrand Army of the RepublicGalactic EmpireImperial MilitaryImperial ArmyAlliance to Restore the Republic Skywalker: "Activate those walkers, Admiral."Yularen: "You are not thinking of using those to transport the clones to that frigate."Tano: "Well, they are pressurized…"Rex: "And they're equipped with magnetic feet. Mm. Good call."Tano: "Master, you're a genius."Yularen: "Those walkers are designed for terrain, not space!"Skywalker: "Rex, load 'em up."―Anakin Skywalker, Ahsoka Tano, Wulff Yularen, and Captain Rex debate the use of AT-TE walkers aboard the ResoluteThe All Terrain Tactical Enforcer (AT-TE), also referred to as a tankby clone troopers, was a multipurpose military ground walker used by the Galactic Republic during the Clone Wars. They boasted six legs that could be magnetized, six laser cannon turrets located along the body of the walker, and a heavy projectile mass-driver cannon on top.ContentsCharacteristicsFront view of an AT-TE walkerThe All Terrain Tactical Enforcer was a low-built vehicle that featured six articulated legs for propulsion. Its body consisted of two armored halves that were connected by a flexible concertina section, which increased the walker's mobility on the field. Because its legs were low to the ground, the walker had a relatively low top speed, but its also enjoyed greater stability. As its name suggests, the AT-TE was suitable for all terrains; not only was it able able to climb sheer surfaces, but it could also survive in the vacuum of realspace. The AT-TE measured 22.02 meters in length and 9.57 meters in height.The AT-TE's most powerful weapon was a single mass-driver cannon located on the vehicle's dorsal surface. Four smaller ball-turret laser cannons were mounted at the front, and two others at the rear. The hexapod's armor could easily deflect small arms fire. The AT-TE could be pierced by tanksmasher rockets, which could result in the destruction of the vehicle's complex propulsion mechanisms.The walker's pilot sat in a forward compartment, while a gunner sat exposed atop the walker to operate the mass-driver cannon.The standard version of the AT-TE carried 20 troops,and some variants carried smaller All Terrain Recon Transports in their rear hold.Their crews were filled out by an IM-6 medic droid, who attended to any injured clone troopers.History[img]blob:https://www.planetminecraft.com/d5d026ea-214e-4c18-8994-9b24caababec[/img]Built by Rothana Heavy Engineering,the All Terrain Tactical Enforcer became the principal battle tank of the Grand Army of the Galactic Republic during the Clone Wars.A blast from an AT-TE was Clone Commander Cody's chosen method in executing Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi when received Order 66, but the blast only succeeded in knocking Kenobi into water, and he later escaped to safety.A Rebel AT-TEFifteen years after the end of the Clone Wars, Captain Rex, along with Commander's Wolfe and Gregor, were living in a modified AT-TE on Seelos. They, along with the Lothal Rebels, later used the tank to evade Imperial forces, which consisted of three All Terrain Armored Transport walkers. The tank was able to destroy one AT-AT in the sandstorm before Rex ordered a direct assault on the other two while the Rebels escaped. The Mass-driver cannon, unfortunately, was not strong enough to penetrate the AT-AT armor. The AT-TE was able to sustain multiple shots from both walkers before Wolfe drove it into one of the walkers. The cannon was temporarily knocked out, but Gregor was able to restore power when the rebels returned and hijacked one of the AT-ATs, giving Rex the opening to shoot the last walker in the neck. The AT-TE was destroyed when the AT-AT collapsed on it.Several AT-TEs were later modified by Rebel Alliance mechanics in order to be used as an attack vehicle during the Galactic Civil War. A number were modified with thicker armor and more powerful armament, becoming known as Elite AT-TEs.At least one AT-TE was used in the Imperial defense of the Kuat Drive Yards. Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry Minecart Map Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantryLow Altitude Assault Transport/infantryProduction informationManufacturerRothana Heavy EngineeringClassGunshipTransportStarfighterBomberTechnical specificationsLength17.69 metersHeight/depth6.94 metersMaximum atmospheric speed620 kphArmamentPair of Laser cannonturrets (Chin-mounted)Pair of laser-beam turrets (optional)Pair of Rocket Launchers (Dorsal surface)Missile belts (Rear-mounted)CrewPilot (1)Co-pilot/Gunner (1)Gunner (2-4)(optional)Passengers30UsageRole(s)Infantry transportAir-to-ground supportAir-to-air supportYear introduced22 years before the Battle of YavinAffiliationGalactic RepublicRepublic militaryGrand Army of the RepublicRepublic NavyGalactic EmpireImperial MilitaryImperial NavyAlliance to Restore the RepublicThe Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry (LAAT/i), also known as the Low Altitude Assault Transport, Republic attack gunship or Assault Gunship, was a gunship used by the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars. Its role was to transport troopers as well as offering air-to-ground and air-to-air support for the Republic against the Separatists.After the formation of the Galactic Empire, the remaining LAAT/is were absorbed into the Imperial Navy.During the Galactic Civil War, LAAT/is were used by the Alliance to Restore the Republic against Imperial garrisons.A variant of this gunship, the Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier, was often used to transport a single All Terrain Tactical Enforcer.Another version was modified to function within the vacuum of space.After the First Battle of Geonosis several LAAT/i gunships were modified by removing the side-mounted turrets in order to make more room for the sliding doors.Years after the Clone Wars, another model of low-altitude transport, the low-altitude Imperial transport, was used by the remnant of the Galactic Empire led by Grand Moff Lozen Tolruck on the planetKashyyyk. Oil Pumpjacks Land Structure Map Hello,these are oil pumpjacks used to extract oil from the underground. The first design looks nice but makes from a technical point of view no sense. That's why I added the second design.The counterweights on the crankshaft should support the horse head's upward movement. Eurofighter Typhoon Air Structure Map The Eurofighter Typhoon is a twin-engine, canard-delta wing, multirole fighter. The Typhoon was designed originally as an air superiority fighter and is manufactured by a consortium of Airbus, BAE Systems and Leonardo that conducts the majority of the project through a joint holding company, Eurofighter Jagdflugzeug GmbH formed in 1986. NATO Eurofighter and Tornado Management Agency manages the project and is the prime customer.The Eurofighter Typhoon is a highly agile aircraft, designed to be a supremely effective dogfighter in combat. Later production aircraft have been increasingly better equipped to undertake air-to-surface strike missions and to be compatible with an increasing number of different armaments and equipment, including Storm Shadow and the RAF's Brimstone. The Typhoon had its combat debut during the 2011 military invention in Libya with the UK's Royal Air Force and the Italian Air Force, performing aerial reconnaissance and ground-strike missions. Among stone giants, the craft is considered the greatest asset. They create intricate frescoes on cave walls, paint these murals and engage in other kinds of art. They consider stone carving to be the greatest skill. Some giants serve as settlements for border guards. When violators penetrate too deeply into the guarded territory, these guards meet them with flying cobblestones and a shower of chopped stone.Bergslaforg is one of the oldest representatives of mountain giants. He is known not only as the strongest geomancer of the east coast, but an artful warrior. 7000 years before the arrival of the colonists on the Forgotten Continent Bergslaforg spent a deep hibernation in one of the valleys, while the expedition of the magicians accidentally woke him up. Blaze spawner with some bounce :) Redstone Device Map Have some fun before you kill them :)I have change the glass to blue, just 1 pic shows blue glass :)Didn’t think slime was a good choice for a piston based blaze spawner, I was SO wrong :)I have made like 6 or 7 different Blaze farms, from ethos old, old version to modern once. If we don’t count in “wandering blaze farms” that are amazing :) this one is good and fun at the same time.Paste it to north (look at pic) and don’t forget, you can always “/undo” and “/redo” you also have “//rotate 90” Do not use “//rotate 180” or “//rotate 270” sometimes the redstone and pistons mess up. So use “//rotate 90” 4 times to go a full circle instead. You might have to make the roof a bit bigger, depending on where you have it.You can close of killchamber :) on all levers. The button is the killswitch, down to 1 hit kill. You can also take away most of the redstone and just kill them with looting and sweeping sword. I use killswitch and sword :)Farm is active as long as you are in the marked area. (look pic)I also made a small item elevator and some storage.If someone needs help with schematic or Worldedit send a mess, not a full blown pro in Worldedit, but I know my way around!!! Also, I need a redstone friend!!!I have seen a version of this one on youtube but this one is more efficient :) Redstone Device, Farm, Slimeblock, Slime, Blaze
